Definition.en: This test case is designed to be overwitten by other content
Definition.zh: 该测试案例将被其他内容覆盖

Definition.en:
Physical damage is one of the five [DamageTypes|Damage Types]. It is the most common and the only one reduced by [Armour], rather than by a [Resistances|Resistance]. 

Most physical damage comes from [MartialWeapon|Weapon] [Attack|Attacks], but some [Spell|Spells] and other skills deal physical damage as well. Physical damage over time can be inflicted with [Bleeding].
Definition.zh:
物理伤害是五种[DamageTypes|伤害类型]之一。这是最常见，也是唯一会被[Armour|护甲]减免的伤害类型，但不受[Resistances|抗性]影响。

大部分物理伤害来自于[MartialWeapon|武器][Attack|攻击]，但有些[Spell|法术]和其他技能也会造成物理伤害。[Bleeding|流血]能够造成持续物理伤害。

Definition.en: Fire damage is one of the five [DamageTypes|Damage Types]. It is reduced by [Resistances|Fire Resistance]. Fire [HitDamage|Hits] inflict [Flammability] based on how much Fire damage is dealt, which provides a chance to [Ignite].
Definition.zh: 火焰伤害是五种[DamageTypes|伤害类型]之一。会被[Resistances|火焰抗性]减免。火焰[HitDamage|击中]根据造成的火焰伤害量施加[Flammability|易燃]，从而提供[Ignite|点燃]几率。

Definition.en: Cold damage is one of the five [DamageTypes|Damage Types]. It is reduced by [Resistances|Cold Resistance]. Cold hits apply [Chill] and build up [Freeze], but cannot build up [HeavyStun|Heavy Stun].
Definition.zh: 冰霜伤害是五种[DamageTypes|伤害类型]之一。这类伤害会被[Resistances|冰霜抗性]减免。冰霜击中会施加[Chill|冰缓]并积蓄[Freeze|冻结]，但无法累积[HeavyStun|重度晕眩]。

Definition.en: Lightning damage is one of the five [DamageTypes|Damage Types]. It is reduced by [Resistances|Lightning Resistance]. Lightning hits have a chance to [Shock] based on how much Lightning damage is dealt.
Definition.zh: 闪电伤害是五种[DamageTypes|伤害类型]之一。这类伤害会被[Resistances|闪电抗性]减免。闪电击中有几率根据造成的闪电伤害施加[Shock|感电]。

Definition.en:
Chaos damage is one of the five [DamageTypes|Damage Types]. It is reduced by [Resistances|Chaos Resistance]. 
Chaos damage is the least common damage type, and removes twice as much [EnergyShield|Energy Shield] as the damage value when taken.
Definition.zh:
混沌伤害是五种[DamageTypes|伤害类型]之一。这类伤害会被[Resistances|混沌抗性]减免。
混沌伤害是最罕见的伤害类型，受到混沌伤害时扣除的[EnergyShield|能量护盾]为伤害量的两倍。

Definition.en: Ailments are a family of common [Debuff|Debuffs] associated with specific damage types. The list of Ailments is: [Bleeding], [Ignite], [Chill], [Freeze], [Shock], [Electrocute], and [Poison].
Definition.zh: 异常状态是一类常见的[Debuff|减益状态]，与特定的伤害类型相关。异常状态包括[Bleeding|流血]、[Ignite|点燃]、[Chill|冰缓]、[Freeze|冻结]、[Shock|感电]、[Electrocute|触电]和[Poison|中毒]。

Definition.en:
[Strength], [Dexterity], and [Intelligence] are the 3 primary attributes. The most important use of Attributes is to meet requirements to use Equipment and Gems.

Each Attribute provides a different inherent bonus.
Definition.zh:
[Strength|力量]、[Dexterity|敏捷]和[Intelligence|智慧]是三种主要属性。属性至关重要，是装备许多物品和宝石的必需条件。

每种属性都能提供不同的固有加成。

Definition.en:
Strength is an [Attributes|Attribute] required to equip most equipment that grants [Armour], as well as various melee-aligned Weapons and Skills.

Strength provides an inherent bonus of +2 to maximum Life per 1 Strength.

Strength does not grant damage to Skills or any other benefits except where specifically stated.
Definition.zh:
力量[Attributes|属性]是装备大部分提供[Armour|护甲]的物品，以及众多近战武器和技能的必需条件。

力量能提供固有加成，每 1 点力量可提供 +2 生命。

除非另有说明，否则力量不提供技能伤害加成或其他效果。

Definition.en:
Dexterity is an [Attributes|Attribute] required to use most equipment that grants [Evasion|Evasion Rating], as well as various range-aligned Weapons and Skills.

Dexterity provides an inherent bonus of +8 to [Accuracy|Accuracy Rating] per 1 Dexterity.

Dexterity does not grant damage to Skills or any other benefits except where specifically stated.
Definition.zh:
敏捷[Attributes|属性]是使用大部分提供[Evasion|闪避值]的物品，以及众多远程武器和技能的必需条件。

敏捷能提供固有加成，每 1 点敏捷可提供 +8 [Accuracy|命中值]。

除非另有说明，否则敏捷不提供技能伤害加成或其他效果。

Definition.en:
Intelligence is an [Attributes|Attribute] required to use most equipment that grants [EnergyShield|Energy Shield], as well as various spell-aligned Weapons and Skills.

Intelligence provides an inherent bonus of +2 to maximum Mana per 1 Intelligence

Intelligence does not grant damage to Skills or any other benefits except where specifically stated.
Definition.zh:
智慧[Attributes|属性]是使用大部分提供[EnergyShield|能量护盾]的物品，以及众多法术类武器和技能的必需条件。

智慧能提供固有加成，每 1 点智慧可提供 +2 魔力。

除非另有说明，否则智慧不提供技能伤害加成或其他效果。

Definition.en:
Bleeding is an [Ailments|Ailment] that deals [Physical|Physical] damage over time, and lasts 5 seconds by default. Damage from Bleeding bypasses [EnergyShield|Energy Shield]

Bleeding deals an extra 100% damage while the target is moving, or if the Bleeding is [Aggravate|Aggravated].

[Physical] damage from [HitDamage|Hits] [Contributes|Contributes] to Bleeding [BuffMagnitude|Magnitude].

Damage does not [Contributes|Contribute] to Bleeding chance, so it cannot be inflicted without an explicit source of Bleeding chance.

The base [BuffMagnitude|Magnitude] of Bleeding is [Physical] damage per second equal to 15% of the [Premitigation|Pre-mitigation] [Physical] damage of the [HitDamage|Hit] that inflicted it. This magnitude is not further affected by any modifiers to the damage you deal. 

Modifiers and [Debuff|Debuffs] that affect the enemy's ability to mitigate damage (such as [Shock]) can affect the damage the enemy takes from Bleeding, but any such modifiers that specifically apply to [HitDamage|Hit] damage (such as [ArmourBreak|Armour Break]) do not affect Bleeding damage.
Definition.zh:
流血[Ailments|异常状态]会造成持续的[Physical|物理]伤害，默认情况下持续 5 秒。流血伤害会穿透[EnergyShield|能量护盾]。

目标移动时，或者流血效果为[Aggravate|恶性]时，流血会造成 100% 的额外伤害。

[HitDamage|击中]造成的[Physical|物理]伤害会[Contributes|作用于]流血[BuffMagnitude|强度]。

伤害不[Contributes|作用于]流血几率，没有外延的流血几率时无法造成流血。

流血的基础[BuffMagnitude|强度]，其每秒[Physical|物理]伤害相当于造成该效果的[HitDamage|击中]的[Premitigation|减免前][Physical|物理]伤害的 15%，这一强度不会再受到伤害词缀的影响。

影响敌人抵御伤害的能力的词缀和[Debuff|减益状态]（例如[Shock|感电]），可以影响敌人受到的流血伤害。但仅作用于[HitDamage|击中]伤害（例如[ArmourBreak|护甲破损]）的词缀无法影响流血伤害。

Definition.en: Being Blinded causes 20% less [Accuracy|Accuracy] Rating and [Evasion|Evasion] Rating, and lasts for 4 seconds unless otherwise specified.
Definition.zh: 致盲状态会导致[Accuracy|命中]值和[Evasion|闪避]值总降 20%，除非另有说明，否则持续 4 秒。

Definition.en:
Chill is an [Ailments|Ailment] that [Slow|Slows] the afflicted target, and lasts 2 seconds on players or 8 seconds on non-players by default. Chill [BuffMagnitude|Magnitude] depends on the Chilling damage dealt relative to the target's [AilmentThreshold|Elemental Ailment Threshold], with a minimum of 30% and a default maximum of 50%.

[Cold] damage from [HitDamage|Hits] can Chill by default, and does not require a chance to inflict Chill. However, Chills smaller than 30% will be ignored, so small [HitDamage|Hits] can fail to Chill.
Definition.zh:
冰缓是一种[Ailments|异常状态]，会[Slow|减缓]受影响目标，对玩家默认持续 2 秒，对非玩家默认持续 8 秒。冰缓[BuffMagnitude|强度]取决于造成冰缓的伤害相对于目标[AilmentThreshold|元素异常状态阈值]的比例，最低 30%，默认最高 50%。

[HitDamage|击中]造成的[Cold|冰霜]伤害默认可以造成冰缓，无需几率。但比例小于 30% 的冰缓会被无视，所以伤害较低的[HitDamage|击中]可能无法造成冰缓。

Definition.en: Chilled Ground [Chill|Chills] those standing in it, and lasts 6 seconds by default.
Definition.zh: 冰缓地面会对站在其中的单位施加[Chill|冰缓]，并且默认持续 6 秒。

Definition.en: You and [Allies|Allies] standing on your Consecrated Ground Regenerate 5% of their maximum Life per second, and [Curse|Curses] have 50% reduced effect on them.
Definition.zh: 你和站在你的奉献地面上的[Allies|友军]每秒回复生命上限的 5%，并且受到的[Curse|诅咒]效果降低 50%。

Definition.en: Culling Strikes kill Normal enemies if their life is at 35% or below. Magic enemies are instead killed at 20%, Rare at 10% and Unique at 5%. These thresholds are checked before the damage of the [HitDamage|Hit] is applied.
Definition.zh: 终结会立刻击败生命不高于 35% 的普通敌人，魔法敌人的阈值为 20%，稀有敌人为 10%，传奇敌人为 5%。终结阈值会在[HitDamage|击中]的伤害生效之前进行检测。

Definition.en: [HitDamage|Hits] against Full Life Enemies remove between 5% and 30% of Life, before the damage of the [HitDamage|Hit] is applied.
Definition.zh: [HitDamage|击中]满血敌人时，在[HitDamage|击中]的伤害生效前先移除5% - 30% 的生命。

Definition.en: The damage types are [Physical], [Fire], [Cold], [Lightning] and [Chaos].
Definition.zh: 伤害类型分为[Physical|物理]、[Fire|火焰]、[Cold|冰霜]、[Lightning|闪电]和[Chaos|混沌]。

Definition.en: [Ailments] that deal damage are [Bleeding], [Ignite], and [Poison].
Definition.zh: 造成伤害的[Ailments|异常状态]包括[Bleeding|流血]、[Ignite|点燃]和[Poison|中毒]。

Definition.en: You take [Chaos] damage over time while standing in Desecrated Ground.
Definition.zh: 站在腐化地面上时，你会受到持续[Chaos|混沌]伤害。

Definition.en: Elemental [Ailments] are [Ignite], [Chill], [Freeze], [Shock], and [Electrocute|Electrocute].
Definition.zh: 元素[Ailments|异常状态]包括[Ignite|点燃]、[Chill|冰缓]、[Freeze|冻结]、[Shock|感电]和[Electrocute|触电]。

Definition.en:
Freeze is an [Ailments|Ailment] that causes targets to be unable to move or act, and lasts 4 seconds by default.

[Cold] damage from [HitDamage|Hits] [Contributes] to Freeze Buildup on enemies until they become [Frozen].
Definition.zh:
冻结[Ailments|异常状态]会使目标无法移动或做出行动，默认持续 4 秒。

[HitDamage|击中]造成的[Cold|冰霜]伤害[Contributes|作用于]冻结积蓄，直到将敌人完全[Frozen|冻结]。

Definition.en: Hinder is a [Debuff] that [Slow|Slows] movement speed by 30% unless otherwise specified. Unless Specified, Hinder has a duration of 4 seconds.
Definition.zh: 缓速是一种[Debuff|减益状态]，除非另有说明，会使移动速度[Slow|减缓] 30%。除非另有说明，缓速持续 4 秒。

Definition.en:
Ignite is an [Ailments|Ailment] that deals [Fire] damage over time, and lasts for 4 seconds by default.

The chance for a [HitDamage|Hit] to Ignite a target is determined by the total [BuffMagnitude|Magnitude] of [Flammability] on the target, including the amount added by that [HitDamage|Hit].

[Fire] damage from [HitDamage|Hits] [Contributes] to the [BuffMagnitude|Magnitude] of Ignite, so [HitDamage|Hits] dealing more [Fire] damage inflict stronger Ignites.
The base [BuffMagnitude|Magnitude] of Ignite is [Fire] damage per second equal to 20% of the [Fire] damage dealt by the [HitDamage|Hit] that inflicted it. This is calculated using the final damage dealt by the [HitDamage|Hit], but not any modifiers on the target that affect how much damage they will take from the [HitDamage|Hit]. This [BuffMagnitude|Magnitude] is not further affected by any modifiers to the damage you deal.

Modifiers and [Debuff|Debuffs] that affect the enemy's ability to mitigate damage (such as [Shock]) can affect the damage the enemy takes from Ignite, but any such modifiers that specifically apply to [HitDamage|Hit] damage (such as [Penetration]) do not affect Ignite damage.
Definition.zh:
点燃[Ailments|异常状态]会造成持续的[Fire|火焰]伤害，默认情况下持续 4 秒。

[HitDamage|击中]点燃目标的几率由目标身上的[Flammability|易燃]总[BuffMagnitude|强度]决定，包括该[HitDamage|击中]添加的数值。

[HitDamage|击中]造成的[Fire|火焰]伤害会[Contributes|作用于]点燃[BuffMagnitude|强度]。造成更高[Fire|火焰]伤害的[HitDamage|击中]，点燃的效果也更强。
点燃的基础[BuffMagnitude|强度]，其每秒[Fire|火焰]伤害相当于造成该效果的[HitDamage|击中][Fire|火焰]伤害的 20%，取决于造成该效果的[HitDamage|击中]最终造成的伤害，但不受目标具有的影响[HitDamage|击中]伤害的词缀影响。这一[BuffMagnitude|强度]不会再受到伤害词缀的影响。

影响敌人抵御伤害的能力的词缀和[Debuff|减益状态]（例如[Shock|感电]），可以影响敌人受到的点燃伤害。但仅作用于[HitDamage|击中]伤害（例如[Penetration|穿透]）的词缀无法影响点燃伤害。

Definition.en:
Flammability is a [Debuff] that provides the chance for [HitDamage|Hits] to [Ignite] the target. It is not itself an [Ailments|Ailment], but is closely associated with [Ignite], which is.

[Fire] damage from [HitDamage|Hits] [Contributes] to the [BuffMagnitude|Magnitude] of Flammability, so [HitDamage|Hits] that deal more [Fire] damage will [Ignite] more often.

The base [BuffMagnitude|Magnitude] of Flammability is 1% chance to Ignite the target for every 5% of the target's [AilmentThreshold|Ailment Threshold] dealt as [Fire] damage. Flammability from a [HitDamage|Hit] is applied before that hit checks whether it should [Ignite] the target, and so will affect that chance for that [HitDamage|Hit] to [Ignite].

Since chance for [HitDamage|Hits] to [Ignite] comes from Flammability on the target, modifiers which increase the chance to inflict [Ailments] will increase the [BuffMagnitude|Magnitude] of Flammability inflicted.

Effects which do not [HitDamage|Hit] targets, but [Ignite] as if they had, such as [IgnitedGround|Ignited Ground], also inflict Flammability, but do not roll a random chance to [Ignite]. Such effects will only [Ignite] once the total Flammability on the target reaches 50%.

Multiple instances of Flammability stack, raising the chance for [HitDamage|Hits] to [Ignite] the target up to 100%. Each instance of Flammability has its own independent duration, lasting 8 seconds by default.
Definition.zh:
易燃是提供[HitDamage|击中][Ignite|点燃]目标几率的[Debuff|减益状态]。它本身不是[Ailments|异常状态]，但与[Ignite|点燃]密切相关。

[HitDamage|击中]造成的[Fire|火焰]伤害[Contributes|作用于]易燃[BuffMagnitude|强度]，所以造成更高[Fire|火焰]伤害的[HitDamage|击中]，[Ignite|点燃]的几率也会提高。
易燃的基础[BuffMagnitude|强度]是每造成目标[AilmentThreshold|异常状态阈值] 5% 的[Fire|火焰]伤害，就有 1% 几率点燃目标。[HitDamage|击中]产生的易燃在该击中检查是否应该[Ignite|点燃]目标之前应用，因此会影响该[HitDamage|击中][Ignite|点燃]的几率。

由于[HitDamage|击中][Ignite|点燃]的几率来自目标身上的易燃，增加施加[Ailments|异常状态]几率的词缀会增加施加的易燃[BuffMagnitude|强度]。

不[HitDamage|击中]目标但视作击中所造成的[Ignite|点燃]的效果，如[IgnitedGround|点燃地面]，也会施加易燃，但不会随机判定是否[Ignite|点燃]。此类效果在目标身上的总易燃达到 50% 仅会[Ignite|点燃]一次。

多个易燃会叠加，将[HitDamage|击中][Ignite|点燃]目标的几率提高到最多 100%。每个易燃都有独立的持续时间，默认持续 8 秒。

Definition.en: Ignoring [Resistances] means your damage cannot be modified in any way by the target's [Resistances|Resistance] stats.
Definition.zh: 无视[Resistances|抗性]意味着你的伤害不会被目标任何[Resistances|抗性]属性影响。

Definition.en: Knockback pushes Enemies away when [HitDamage|Hit].
Definition.zh: 击退会在[HitDamage|击中]时将敌人推向远处。

Definition.en:
When you deal damage with a [HitDamage|Hit], Life Leech causes you to recover an amount of Life to a percentage of the damage dealt, over a period of one second.

Hits that deal more than 40,000 total damage are treated as though they only dealt 40,000 damage for this calculation. If this damage is of multiple [DamageTypes|Damage Types], the ratios between them will stay the same.

Monsters have Leech Resistance that increases with monster level, reducing how much you recover from Leech from [HitDamage|Hits] against them.

You can only recover from a single instance of Life Leech at a time, and all Life Leech is removed when Life is filled.
Definition.zh:
当你造成[HitDamage|击中]伤害时，生命偷取会在 1 秒内回复一定数量的生命，数值等于造成伤害的一定比例。

若一次击中的总伤害超过 40,000，则在该计算中仅视为 40,000 伤害。若该伤害包含多种[DamageTypes|伤害类型]，其比例保持不变。

怪物拥有偷取抗性，抗性随怪物等级提升而增加，从而降低你通过[HitDamage|击中]获得的偷取回复量。

你每次只能从单个生命偷取实例中回复生命，且当生命值满时，所有生命偷取效果都会被移除。

Definition.en: You are on Low Energy Shield if you have 35% of your Maximum Energy Shield or less.
Definition.zh: 如果你的能量护盾达到或低于能量护盾上限的 35%，便处于低能量护盾状态。

Definition.en: A player or monster is on Low Life if it has 35% of its Maximum Life or less.
Definition.zh: 生命达到或低于生命上限 35% 的玩家或怪物处于低血状态。

Definition.en: You are on Low Mana if you have 35% of your Maximum Mana or less.
Definition.zh: 如果你的魔力达到或低于最大魔力上限的 35%，便处于低魔状态。

Definition.en: Lucky things are rolled twice and the better result used.
Definition.zh: 幸运会重复判断两次数值，取其中好的结果生效。

Definition.en: Maimed enemies suffer from 30% [Slow|Slower] Movement Speed and 15% reduced [Evasion|Evasion Rating]. Maim lasts for 4 seconds unless otherwise specified.
Definition.zh: 瘫痪敌人的移动速度[Slow|减慢] 30%，[Evasion|闪避]值降低 15%。除非另有说明，瘫痪持续 4 秒。

Definition.en:
When you deal damage with a [HitDamage|Hit], Mana Leech causes you to recover an amount of Mana to a percentage of the damage dealt, over a period of one second.

Hits that deal more than 40,000 total damage are treated as though they only dealt 40,000 damage for this calculation. If this damage is of multiple [DamageTypes|Damage Types], the ratios between them will stay the same.

Monsters have Leech Resistance that increases with monster level, reducing how much you recover from Leech from [HitDamage|Hits] against them.

You can only recover from a single instance of Mana Leech at a time, and all Mana Leech is removed when Mana is filled.
Definition.zh:
当你造成[HitDamage|击中]伤害时，魔力偷取会在 1 秒内回复一定数量的魔力，数值等于造成伤害的一定比例。

若一次击中的总伤害超过 40,000，则在该计算中仅视为 40,000 伤害。若该伤害包含多种[DamageTypes|伤害类型]，其比例保持不变。

怪物拥有偷取抗性，抗性随怪物等级提升而增加，从而降低你通过[HitDamage|击中]获得的偷取回复量。

你每次只能从单个魔力偷取实例中回复魔力，且当魔力值满时，所有魔力偷取效果都会被移除。

Definition.en:
When you deal damage with a [HitDamage|Hit], [Rage] Leech causes you to recover an amount of [Rage] to a percentage of the damage dealt, over a period of one second.

Hits that deal more than 40,000 total damage are treated as though they only dealt 40,000 damage for this calculation. If this damage is of multiple [DamageTypes|Damage Types], the ratios between them will stay the same.

Monsters have Leech Resistance that increases with monster level, reducing how much you recover from Leech from [HitDamage|Hits] against them.

You can only recover from a single instance of [Rage] Leech at a time, and all [Rage] Leech is removed when [Rage] is filled.
Definition.zh:
当你造成[HitDamage|击中]伤害时，[Rage|怒火]偷取会在 1 秒内回复一定数量的[Rage|怒火]，数值等于造成伤害的一定比例。

若一次击中的总伤害超过 40,000，则在该计算中仅视为 40,000 伤害。若该伤害包含多种[DamageTypes|伤害类型]，其比例保持不变。

怪物拥有偷取抗性，抗性随怪物等级提升而增加，从而降低你通过[HitDamage|击中]获得的偷取回复量。

你每次只能从单个[Rage|怒火]偷取实例中回复怒火，且当[Rage|怒火]值满时，所有[Rage|怒火]偷取效果都会被移除。

Definition.en: The Map Owner is the player who created the Map area.
Definition.zh: 地图拥有者指的是创建地图区域的玩家。

Definition.en: [Ailments] that do not deal damage are [Chill], [Freeze], [Shock], and [Electrocute].
Definition.zh: 不造成伤害的[Ailments|异常状态]包括[Chill|冰缓]、[Freeze|冻结]、[Shock|感电]和[Electrocute|触电]。

Definition.en: Overkill damage is any damage from a [HitDamage|Hit] in excess of the enemy's remaining Life when it is killed.
Definition.zh: 溢出伤害是一次[HitDamage|击中]造成的伤害超出敌人剩余生命的部分。

Definition.en:
Poison is an [Ailments|Ailment] that deals [Chaos] damage over time, and lasts 2 seconds by default. Damage from Poison bypasses [EnergyShield|Energy Shield].

[Physical] and [Chaos] damage from [HitDamage|Hits] [Contributes|Contribute] to Poison [BuffMagnitude|Magnitude].

Damage does not [Contributes|Contribute] to Poison chance, so it cannot be inflicted without an explicit source of Poison chance.

The base [BuffMagnitude|Magnitude] of Poison is [Chaos] damage per second equal to 20% of the [Premitigation|Pre-mitigation] [Physical] and [Chaos] damage of the [HitDamage|Hit] that inflicted it. This magnitude is not further affected by any modifiers to the damage you deal.

Modifiers and [Debuff|Debuffs] that affect the enemy's ability to mitigate damage (such as [Shock]) can affect the damage the enemy takes from Poison, but any such modifiers that specifically apply to [HitDamage|Hit] damage (such as [Penetration]) do not affect Poison damage.
Definition.zh:
中毒[Ailments|异常状态]会造成持续的[Chaos|混沌]伤害，默认情况下持续 2 秒。中毒伤害会穿透[EnergyShield|能量护盾]。


[HitDamage|击中]造成的[Physical|物理]和[Chaos|混沌]伤害会[Contributes|作用于]中毒[BuffMagnitude|强度]。

伤害不[Contributes|作用于]中毒几率，没有外延的中毒几率时无法造成中毒。

中毒的基础[BuffMagnitude|强度]，其每秒[Chaos|混沌]伤害相当于造成该效果的[HitDamage|击中]的[Premitigation|减免前][Physical|物理]和[Chaos|混沌]伤害的 20%。这一强度不会再受到伤害词缀的影响。

影响敌人抵御伤害的能力的词缀和[Debuff|减益状态]（例如[Shock|感电]），可以影响敌人受到的中毒伤害。但仅作用于[HitDamage|击中]伤害（例如[Penetration|穿透]）的词缀无法影响中毒伤害。

Definition.en:
Rage grants 1% more [Attack|Attack] damage per 1 Rage. By default, you have 30 maximum Rage and lose 1 Rage every 0.2 seconds. Rage loss is paused for 4 seconds upon gaining Rage, or after taking damage.

Only one [HitDamage|Hit] every 0.5 seconds can cause you to gain Rage.
Definition.zh:
每提升 1 点怒火使[Attack|攻击]伤害增加 1%。默认情况下，你最多拥有 30 点怒火，每 0.2 秒会失去 1 点怒火。在获得怒火，或受到伤害时，怒火损失会暂停 4 秒。

每 0.5 秒只能有一次[HitDamage|击中]使你获得怒火。

Definition.en: Recently refers to the past 4 seconds.
Definition.zh: 近期指过去 4 秒内。

Definition.en:
Shapeshifting changes you into a non-human form. Shapeshifting skills still use your character's stats as normal unless otherwise specified.

Using a skill that is not compatible with your Shapeshifted form will automatically Shapeshift you back to human form.
Definition.zh:
变形会将你变为非人类形态。除非另有说明，否则变形技能仍然使用你角色的属性。

使用不兼容变形形态的技能时，你会自动恢复到人类形态。

Definition.en:
Shock is an [Ailments|Ailment] that causes targets to take 20% increased damage, and lasts 4 seconds on players or 8 seconds on non-players by default.

[Lightning] damage from [HitDamage|Hits] [Contributes] to chance to Shock enemies. The higher the [Lightning] damage dealt, the higher the chance. By default a [HitDamage|Hit] has 1% chance to Shock for every 4% of the target's [AilmentThreshold|Ailment Threshold] dealt.
Definition.zh:
感电是一种[Ailments|异常状态]，使目标受到的伤害提高 20%，对玩家默认持续 4 秒，对非玩家默认持续 8 秒。

[HitDamage|击中]造成的[Lightning|闪电]伤害[Contributes|作用于]感电几率。造成的[Lightning|闪电]伤害越高，施加的几率就越高。默认情况下，[HitDamage|击中]每造成相当于[AilmentThreshold|异常状态]阈值 4% 的伤害，就有 1 %的几率造成感电。

Definition.en:
Enemies standing in Smoke Clouds are [Blind|Blinded].
Smoke Clouds have a radius of 2 metres unless otherwise specified.
Definition.zh:
站在迷雾中的敌人将被[Blind|致盲]。
除非另有说明，否则迷雾的范围为 2 米。

Definition.en: Your base Stun Threshold is equal to your maximum Life. A [HitDamage|Hit] that deals damage equal to or greater than your Stun Threshold is guaranteed to [Stun] you, and the chance scales down linearly for lower damage [HitDamage|Hits]. A [Stun] chance of less than 10% is treated as 0%.
Definition.zh: 你的基础晕眩阈值等于你的最大生命。[HitDamage|击中]造成的伤害大于或等于你的晕眩阈值时必定会使你[Stun|晕眩]，[HitDamage|击中]伤害降低时该几率线性递减。低于 10% 的[Stun|晕眩]几率视作 0%。

Definition.en: The lower an enemy's Stun Threshold, the less [Stun] buildup is needed to [Stun] or [HeavyStun|Heavy Stun] them.
Definition.zh: 敌人的晕眩阈值越低，使其[Stun|晕眩]或[HeavyStun|重度晕眩]所需的[Stun|晕眩]积蓄值就越低。

Definition.en: Freeze Threshold determines how much [Freeze] buildup is needed to [Freeze] a target.
Definition.zh: 冻结阈值决定了使目标[Freeze|冻结]所需的[Freeze|冻结]积蓄值。

Definition.en: Electrocute Threshold determines how much [Electrocute] buildup is needed to [Electrocute] a target.
Definition.zh: 触电阈值决定了使目标[Electrocute|触电]所需的[Electrocute|触电]积蓄值。

Definition.en: [Debuff|Debuffs] you are Unaffected by can still be placed on you, but will not actually apply their effect.
Definition.zh: 不受影响的[Debuff|减益状态]依然会施加在你身上，但不会产生效果。

Definition.en: Uncapped [Resistances|Resistance] is the value a [Resistances|Resistance] would have if ignoring Maximum Resistance. These values are shown in parentheses at the top of the Character Panel.
Definition.zh: 绝对[Resistances|抗性]指忽略抗性上限时的[Resistances|抗性]数值。该数值会显示在角色面板顶部的圆括号里。

Definition.en: Overcapped [Resistances|Resistance] is the amount by which your [UncappedResist|Uncapped Resistance] exceeds your [MaximumResistances|Maximum Resistance] for that damage type.
Definition.zh: 超量[Resistances|抗性]是你的[UncappedResist|绝对抗性]超过该伤害类型的[MaximumResistances|抗性上限]的数值。

Definition.en: Unlucky things are rolled twice and the worse result used.
Definition.zh: 不幸会重复判断两次数值，取其中最差的结果生效。

Definition.en: A target is immobilised if it cannot move, for example due to being [Frozen], [Pinned], [HeavyStun|Heavy Stunned], or [Electrocute|Electrocuted].
Definition.zh: 因为被[Frozen|冻结]、[Pinned|定身]、[HeavyStun|重度晕眩]或[Electrocute|触电]而无法进行移动的目标视作不可移动。

Definition.en:
[HitDamage|Hits] against any target can potentially cause a Stun on that target, depending on the damage dealt. Stunning a target interrupts their current action and prevents them from taking actions for a short time. There are two types of Stun:

[LightStun|Light Stuns] last a fraction of a second but can be inflicted frequently. Any [HitDamage|Hit] has a chance to cause a [LightStun|Light Stun]. The chance is based on the damage dealt, up to 100% base chance for [HitDamage|Hits] that deal 100% of the target's maximum Life. Chances lower than 15% are treated as 0%.

[HeavyStun|Heavy Stuns] occur when a target's Stun bar is filled and last multiple seconds. [HitDamage|Hits] cause Heavy Stun buildup based on the damage dealt. Players and their [Minion|Minions] usually cannot be [HeavyStun|Heavily Stunned], but players can receive [HeavyStun|Heavy Stun] buildup where specifically mentioned while taking specific actions (such as raising their [Shield], Parrying with a [Buckler], or riding a mount).

Player [Physical] damage and [Melee] Damage each have 50% more [LightStun|Light Stun] chance and [HeavyStun|Heavy Stun] buildup. These bonuses are multiplicative with each other.
Monster [Physical] damage and [Melee] Damage have 100% more and 33% more [LightStun|Light Stun] chance and [HeavyStun|Heavy Stun] buildup respectively. These bonuses are multiplicative with each other.
Definition.zh:
[HitDamage|击中]任何目标都有几率使其晕眩，由造成的伤害决定。使目标晕眩会打断他们当前的行动，并使其在短时间内无法做出其他行动。晕眩包含两种类型：

[LightStun|轻度晕眩]的持续时间不到一秒，但可以频繁造成。任何[HitDamage|击中]都有几率造成[LightStun|轻度晕眩]。该几率由造成的伤害决定，造成相当于目标最大生命的 100% 的[HitDamage|击中]具有 100% 的几率。低于 15% 的几率视作 0%。

[HeavyStun|重度晕眩]会在目标的晕眩条填满时生效，可以持续数秒。[HitDamage|击中]会根据造成的伤害而产生重度晕眩积蓄。玩家和[Minion|召唤生物]通常不会受到[HeavyStun|重度晕眩]，但在特定行动期间（例如举起[Shield|盾牌]、使用[Buckler|轻盾]招架或骑乘坐骑时）可以获得[HeavyStun|重度晕眩]积蓄。

玩家的[Physical|物理]伤害和[Melee|近战]伤害，其[LightStun|轻度晕眩]几率和[HeavyStun|重度晕眩]积蓄各总增 50%。这些加成可以按乘法叠加生效。
怪物的[Physical|物理]伤害和[Melee|近战]伤害，其[LightStun|轻度晕眩]几率和[HeavyStun|重度晕眩]积蓄分别总增 100% 和 33%。这些加成可以按乘法叠加生效。

Definition.en:
Any [HitDamage|Hit] has a chance to [LightStun|Light Stun] the target, interrupting their current action and preventing them from taking actions for a fraction of a second. The chance is based on the damage dealt, up to 100% base chance for [HitDamage|Hits] that deal 100% of the target's maximum Life. Chances lower than 15% are treated as 0%.

[Physical] damage, and player (but not monster) [Melee] Damage, each have 50% more [LightStun|Light Stun] chance. For players, these bonuses are multiplicative with each other.
Definition.zh:
任意[HitDamage|击中]都有几率使目标[LightStun|轻度晕眩]，打断他们当前的行动，并使其在不到一秒的时间内无法做出其他行动。该几率由造成的伤害决定，造成相当于目标最大生命的 100% 的[HitDamage|击中]具有 100% 的几率。低于 15% 的几率视作 0%。

[Physical|物理]伤害，以及玩家（并非怪物）的[Melee|近战]伤害，其[LightStun|轻度晕眩]几率总增 50%。对玩家而言，这些额外加成可以按乘法叠加生效。

Definition.en:
[HeavyStun|Heavy Stuns] occur when a target's [Stun] bar is filled, interrupts the target's current action and prevent them from taking actions for a few seconds. [HitDamage|Hits] cause Heavy Stun buildup based on the damage dealt. Players and their [Minion|Minions] usually cannot be [HeavyStun|Heavily Stunned], but players can receive [HeavyStun|Heavy Stun] buildup where specifically mentioned while taking specific actions (such as raising their [Shield], Parrying with a [Buckler], or riding a mount).

While an enemy is Heavy Stunned, they cannot act and count as [Immobilised]. It will also be harder to Heavy Stun them again for a short time afterwards.

[Physical] damage, and player (but not monster) [Melee] Damage, each cause 50% more [HeavyStun|Heavy Stun] buildup. For players, these bonuses are multiplicative with each other.
Definition.zh:
[HeavyStun|重度晕眩]会在目标的[Stun|晕眩]条填满时生效，打断他们当前的行动，并使其在数秒的时间内无法做出其他行动。[HitDamage|击中]会根据造成的伤害而产生重度晕眩积蓄。玩家和[Minion|召唤生物]通常不会受到[HeavyStun|重度晕眩]，但在特定行动期间（例如举起[Shield|盾牌]、使用[Buckler|轻盾]招架或骑乘坐骑时）可以获得[HeavyStun|重度晕眩]积蓄。

敌人受到重度晕眩时，他们无法行动并被视作[Immobilised|不可移动]，并且使其在短时间内更难以被重度晕眩。

[Physical|物理]伤害，以及玩家（并非怪物）的[Melee|近战]伤害，其[HeavyStun|重度晕眩]积蓄总增 50%。对玩家而言，这些额外加成可以按乘法叠加生效。

Definition.en: Players and their [Minion|Minions] usually cannot be [HeavyStun|Heavily Stunned], but players can receive [HeavyStun|Heavy Stun] buildup where specifically mentioned while taking specific actions (such as raising their [Shield], Parrying with a [Buckler], or riding a mount). A player's stun bar only empties when they are not taking these actions or [HeavyStun|Heavily Stunned]. While [HeavyStun|Heavily Stunned] players cannot [Block], [Deflect] or [Evasion|Evade].
Definition.zh: 玩家和[Minion|召唤生物]通常不会受到[HeavyStun|重度晕眩]，但在特定行动期间（例如举起[Shield|盾牌]、使用[Buckler|轻盾]招架或骑乘坐骑时）可以获得[HeavyStun|重度晕眩]积蓄。玩家的晕眩条只会在不处于这些行动期间或受到[HeavyStun|重度晕眩]时才会清空。在[HeavyStun|重度晕眩]期间，玩家不能[Block|格挡]、[Deflect|偏转]或[Evasion|闪避]。

Definition.en:
Electrocution is an [Ailments|Ailment] that interrupts the target's actions and prevents them performing any action, and lasts 5 seconds by default.

Only [Lightning] damage from [HitDamage|Hits] with specific skills or effects [Contributes] to Electrocution Buildup on enemies until they become [Electrocute|Electrocuted]. Other sources of [Lightning] damage will not build up towards Electrocution.
Definition.zh:
触电[Ailments|异常状态]可以打断目标的行动，并令其无法做出任何行动，默认持续 5 秒。

只有特定技能或消耗的[HitDamage|击中]造成的[Lightning|闪电]伤害能够[Contributes|作用于]敌人的触电积蓄，直到造成[Electrocute|触电]。其他来源的[Lightning|闪电]伤害无法积蓄触电。

Definition.en:
Certain skills and effects allow damage to build up Pinned. Once this build up passes the enemy's Pinned Threshold, they are Pinned, preventing them moving, being moved or [Evasion|Evading] for 3 seconds. They are also [LightStun|Light Stunned] when they become Pinned.

Pinned targets count as [Immobilised].
Definition.zh:
部分技能和效果可以使伤害产生定身积蓄值。该积蓄值超过目标的定身阈值后，目标就会被定身，使其无法移动、被强制移动或[Evasion|闪避]，持续 3 秒，被定身的时候还会造成[LightStun|轻度晕眩]。

被定身的目标也会被视作[Immobilised|不可移动]。

Definition.en: Overwhelm negates a certain amount of the target's [Physical|Physical] damage reduction, but never more than the total [Physical|Physical] damage reduction the target has.
Definition.zh: 镇压会消除目标一定数值的[Physical|物理]伤害减免，但无法超过目标的[Physical|物理]伤害减免总值。

Definition.en:
Melee [Attack|Attacks] are those that directly hit with a melee [Strike] or a [Slam], dealing Melee damage. Melee attacks usually scale from Weapon or Unarmed damage. 

Any [Projectile|Projectiles] these attacks create do not count as Melee damage.
Definition.zh:
近战[Attack|攻击]是近战[Strike|打击]或[Slam|猛击]的直接击中，造成近战伤害。近战攻击通常会受到武器或徒手伤害的调整。

这类攻击产生的[Projectile|投射物]不视作近战伤害。

Definition.en: Slams are [Melee] [Attack|Attacks] that cause damaging areas of effect, rather than [Strike|Striking] enemies with your weapon directly. Damage from Slams is still [Melee] damage.
Definition.zh: 猛击是造成伤害性范围效果的[Melee|近战][Attack|攻击]，而非直接用武器[Strike|打击]敌人。猛击造成的伤害依然属于[Melee|近战]伤害。

Definition.en:
Effects that Chain are redirected to another target after colliding with an enemy.
[Projectile|Projectiles] [Split|Splitting], [Pierce|Piercing] or [Fork|Forking] take priority over Chaining.
Projectiles have a base chaining distance of 6 metres whereas other effects have a chaining distance of 4 metres. Enemies cannot be targeted more than once in the same Chain.
Definition.zh:
连锁的效果在击中一个敌人后重新导向附近的另一个目标。
[Projectile|投射物]的[Split|分裂]，[Pierce|穿透]或[Fork|分叉]优先于连锁。
投射物的基础连锁距离为 6 米，其他效果的连锁距离为 4 米。在同一次连锁中，敌人不能被重复作为目标。

Definition.en: [Projectile|Projectiles] that Pierce can pass through a target while still damaging them.
Definition.zh: 穿透[Projectile|投射物]可以穿过一个目标，并依然会对其造成伤害。

Definition.en: [Projectile|Projectiles] that Fork split into two the first time they collide with an enemy and do not [Split] from it or [Pierce] it.
Definition.zh: 具有分叉效果的[Projectile|投射物]第一次击中敌人时会一分为二，并且不会触发[Split|分裂]或[Pierce|穿透]。

Definition.en: The first time a [Projectile] or beam that can Split collides with a target, it splits into a multiple which will all aim at different targets within 6 metres if able. If there aren't enough targets, the rest will be aimed in random directions.
Definition.zh: 具有分裂效果的[Projectile|投射物]第一次击中敌人时会分裂成多个投射物，并瞄准附近 6 米内的多个目标。如果没有足够的目标，其余投射物将向随机方向射出。

Definition.en: Deflection Rating provides a chance to Deflect damage from [HitDamage|Hits], preventing 40% of the damage from those Hits. Exact chance to Deflect also depends on the attacker's [Accuracy].
Definition.zh: 偏转值提供偏转[HitDamage|击中]伤害的几率，阻止这些击中伤害的 40%。成功偏转的实际几率也取决于攻击者的[Accuracy|命中]。

Definition.en: 50% of damage from Suppressed Hits and [Ailments] they inflict is prevented.
Definition.zh: 被压制的击中和[Ailments|异常状态]造成伤害的 50% 会被阻挡。

Definition.en:
Blocking completely prevents the damage of an incoming [HitDamage|Hit].

You will still take any [Stun] from the Blocked hit. You can't Block while [Stun|Stunned] or [Freeze|Frozen]. 

Some Skills used by Bosses cannot be blocked. These are indicated by a red glow and audio cue during the windup of the Skill.
Definition.zh:
格挡会完全阻挡一次即将受到的[HitDamage|击中]伤害。

你仍会受到被格挡的击中施加的[Stun|晕眩]状态。你无法在[Stun|晕眩]或[Freeze|冻结]时进行格挡。

首领使用的部分技能无法被格挡。这类技能在蓄力过程中会具有红光光芒和音效提示。

Definition.en: Chance to [Block] only includes modifiers that are explicitly chance-based. Guaranteed [Block] (such as raising your [Shield]) does not affect your Chance to [Block].
Definition.zh: [Block|格挡]几率仅包含几率类的词缀，必定[Block|格挡]（例如举起[Shield|盾牌]）不会影响你的[Block|格挡]几率。

Definition.en: Overcapped [ChanceToBlock|Block Chance] is the amount by which your [ChanceToBlock|Chance to Block] would exceed your maximum [ChanceToBlock|Chance to Block] if it were uncapped.
Definition.zh: 超量[ChanceToBlock|格挡几率]是指当你可超出上限时，你的[ChanceToBlock|格挡几率]超过[ChanceToBlock|格挡几率]上限的数值。

Definition.en: A Strike is a [Melee] attack that directly hits with weapons or body parts. [Slam] attacks do not count as Strikes.
Definition.zh: 打击是使用武器或身体部位直接击中目标的[Melee|近战]攻击。[Slam|猛击]攻击不视作打击。

Definition.en:
A Projectile is a moving [Attack] or [Spell] that usually impacts with targets when it hits them.

When a group of multiple Projectiles is fired from the same source at the same time, only one Projectile in the group can hit each target unless otherwise specified.
Definition.zh:
投射物是会移动的[Attack|攻击]或[Spell|法术]，通常会在撞击时击中目标。

同一来源在同一时间发射一组多个投射物时，除非另有说明，否则每个目标只会被该组投射物中的一个投射物击中。

Definition.en:
Resistances reduce damage taken of the corresponding damage type — [Fire], [Cold], [Lightning] or [Chaos] — up to a [MaximumResistances|Maximum]. [Fire], [Cold] and [Lightning] Resistances are Elemental Resistances. Resistances can be improved with Equipment, Passives & Quest items.

Your Elemental Resistances are lowered as you progress through the game. Elemental Resistances are a vital defensive tool, and should be one of the first things to check if you're having difficulty surviving.
Definition.zh:
抗性会降低受到的对应类型的伤害，包括[Fire|火焰]、[Cold|冰霜]、[Lightning|闪电]或[Chaos|混沌]伤害，但存在[MaximumResistances|上限]。[Fire|火焰]、[Cold|冰霜]和[Lightning|闪电]抗性属于元素抗性。抗性可以通过装备、天赋和任务物品来提高。

随着游戏进程推进，玩家的元素抗性将会降低。元素抗性是一种至关重要的防御手段，如果你在生存方面遇到困难，这应该是首要检查的事项之一。

Definition.en:
Critical Hits deal +100% extra damage (i.e. twice as much damage) by default. [CriticalDamageBonus|Critical Damage Bonuses] can further modify this value.

[Attack|Attacks] usually use your weapon's base Critical Hit Chance, while [Spell|Spells] and some other skills have their base Critical Hit Chance listed on the skill. 

Most modifiers to Critical Hit Chance are percentage based. For example, gaining 100% increased Critical Hit Chance on a base Critical Hit Chance of 7% would result in a final Critical Hit Chance of 14%.
Definition.zh:
暴击默认情况下会造成 +100% 的额外伤害（即双倍伤害）。
[CriticalDamageBonus|暴击伤害加成]可以进一步调整这一数值。

[Attack|攻击]通常会使用武器的基础暴击率，[Spell|法术]和一些技能则会使用在技能中列出的基础暴击率。

大部分暴击率词缀都是基于比例的。例如，如果基础暴击率为 7%，而暴击率提高 100%，则最终的暴击率为 14%。

Definition.en: Multiplies the damage dealt by [Critical|Critical Hits]. Default value is +100% (i.e. twice as much damage).
Definition.zh: 使[Critical|暴击]造成的伤害倍增。默认数值为 +100%（即双倍伤害）。

Definition.en: Jagged Ground [Slow|Slows] the movement speed of enemies in its area by 20%.
Definition.zh: 崎岖之地使区域内的敌人的移动速度[Slow|减速] 20%。

Definition.en:
Totems are [Allies|allied] constructs which use skills for you. Totems are not [Minion|Minions] and their skills benefit from your stats, though they have their own defensive stats and can be damaged or killed.

Totem Limit is shared between different types of Totem by default.
Definition.zh:
图腾是[Allies|友军]构造体，可以为你使用技能。图腾不属于[Minion|召唤生物]，它们的技能可以从你的属性中收益，但也具有独立的防御属性，可以受到伤害或被击败。

在默认情况下，不同类型的图腾共享图腾上限。

Definition.en: Enemies you Taunt can only target you, and deal 10% less damage with [HitDamage|hits] to anyone else. If not otherwise specified, Taunt lasts for 3 seconds.
Definition.zh: 受你嘲讽的敌人只会以你为目标，对其他单位造成的[HitDamage|击中]伤害总降 10%。除非另有说明，否则嘲讽持续 3 秒。

Definition.en: Empowered Skills do not have any inherent bonuses, but a number of stats and modifiers specifically apply to Empowered Skills.
Definition.zh: 强化技能不具有固有加成，但一些属性和词缀会专门对强化技能生效。

Definition.en:
Monster Power is a number that approximately reflects how strong and dangerous a monster is. An average monster has a Power of 1, strong monsters can have Power of 2 to 3, and weak monsters might have as little as 0.5, or very occasionally less. This value is then multiplied according to the monster's [Rarity]:

Normal: 1
Magic: 2
Rare: 5

Unique monsters always have 20 Power.
Definition.zh:
怪物威力值大致反映出了怪物的强度和危险性。平平无奇的怪物威力值为 1，强大怪物的威力值为 2 或者 3，较弱的怪物可能只有 0.5，偶尔还会更低。这一数值还会与怪物的[Rarity|稀有度]相乘结算：

普通：1
魔法：2
稀有：5

传奇怪物始终具有 20 威力值。

Definition.en:
Armour reduces [HitDamage|Damage taken from Hits]. By default, Armour only applies to [Physical] [HitDamage|Damage].

Damage reduction from Armour is proportional to the amount of [HitDamage|Damage], and is more effective at reducing smaller hits.
Definition.zh:
护甲会降低[HitDamage|击中伤害]。默认情况下，护甲只对[Physical|物理][HitDamage|伤害]有效。

护甲的伤害减免与[HitDamage|伤害]量成正比，对低伤害的击中更为有效。

Definition.en: Enemies taking [Fire] damage over time are Burning. Usually this occurs because the enemy is [Ignite|Ignited].
Definition.zh: 受到[Fire|火焰]持续伤害的敌人会处于燃烧状态，这通常是因为该敌人已被[Ignite|点燃]。

Definition.en: A Frozen target cannot move or act. Targets become Frozen when they reach 100% [Freeze] buildup.
Definition.zh: 被冻结的目标无法移动或行动。目标的[Freeze|冻结]积蓄达到 100% 时就会被冻结。

Definition.en: Evasion Rating grants a chance to Evade enemy [HitDamage|Hits], preventing them from [HitDamage|Hitting] you at all. Exact chance to Evade also depends on the attacker's [Accuracy].
Definition.zh: 闪避值提供闪避敌人[HitDamage|击中]的几率，完全避免被[HitDamage|击中]。实际闪避几率也取决于攻击者的[Accuracy|命中]。

Definition.en:
Accuracy is used to hit a target with an [Attack|Attack], and is checked against the targets [Evasion] to determine that chance. 

Player [Attack|Attacks] incur an Accuracy penalty based on distance from the origin of the damage to the target, with no penalty for targets within 2 metres and up to 90% less Accuracy for targets further than 9 metres away.
Definition.zh:
命中用于使[Attack|攻击]能够击中目标，并会根据目标的[Evasion|闪避]进行检测，以确定命中的几率。

玩家的[Attack|攻击]会根据伤害来源与目标之间的距离，获得一定的命中惩罚。对 2 米内的目标没有惩罚，对 9 米外的目标命中总降 90%。

Definition.en:
Energy Shield protects your Life by taking damage instead. Rapidly [ESRecharge|Recharges] if you don't lose Energy Shield for a short time.
[Chaos] damage removes twice as much Energy Shield.
Damage from [Bleeding] and [Poison] bypasses Energy Shield to remove Life directly.
Definition.zh:
能量护盾会代替生命承受伤害，短时间内未损失能量护盾时能够快速[ESRecharge|充能]。
[Chaos|混沌]伤害会扣除双倍的能量护盾。
[Bleeding|流血]和[Poison|中毒]的伤害会忽略能量护盾，直接扣除生命。

Definition.en: Normal enemies are Primed for [Electrocute|Electrocution] when they have at least 40% Electrocution buildup. Magic enemies are instead Primed at 50% buildup, Rare at 60%, and Unique at 70%.
Definition.zh: 普通敌人具有至少 40% 触电积蓄值时可被[Electrocute|触电]。魔法敌人为 50%，稀有敌人为 60%，传奇敌人为 70%。

Definition.en: Normal enemies are Primed for [Stun] when they have at least 40% Heavy Stun buildup. Magic enemies are instead Primed at 50% buildup, Rare at 60%, and Unique at 70%.
Definition.zh: 普通敌人具有至少 40% 重度晕眩积蓄值时可被[Stun|晕眩]。魔法敌人为 50%，稀有敌人为 60%，传奇敌人为 70%。

Definition.en: Normal enemies are Primed for [Freeze] when they have at least 40% Freeze buildup. Magic enemies are instead Primed at 50% buildup, Rare at 60%, and Unique at 70%.
Definition.zh: 普通敌人具有至少 40% 冻结积蓄时可被[Freeze|冻结]。魔法敌人为 50%，稀有敌人为 60%，传奇敌人为 70%。

Definition.en: [StatConversion|Converts] all [Evasion|Evasion Rating] to [Armour].
Definition.zh: 将所有[Evasion|闪避值][StatConversion|转化]为[Armour|护甲]。

Definition.en:
Slows are modifiers from [Debuff|Debuffs] that cause actions to take longer. Slows can apply to a specific stat (such as attack speed or movement speed) — if a specific type of slow is not specified, it applies to everything the affected entity does. Slows are always multiplicative with each other.

Higher [Rarity] enemies are less affected by Slows:

15% less Slow effect on Magic monsters
30% less Slow effect on Rare monsters
50% less Slow effect on Unique monsters

Additionally, Slows have 10% less effect on all monsters for each player in the area beyond the first and monsters cannot be slowed below 25% of their base speed.
Definition.zh:
减速是由[Debuff|减益状态]产生的词缀，能够使行动所需的时间延长。减速可以对特定属性生效（例如攻击速度或者移动速度）。如果未指定减速类型，则会对受影响目标的所有速度生效。多个减速效果始终为乘法叠加。

高[Rarity|稀有度]的敌人不太容易受到减速影响：

魔法怪物受到的减速效果总降 15%
稀有怪物受到的减速效果总降 30%
传奇怪物受到的减速效果总降 50%

另外，如果区域内的玩家多于一人，每多出一名玩家，所有怪物受到的减速效果总降 10%，且怪物速度不能被减慢至其基础速度的 25% 以下。

Definition.en: [ItemRarity|Item] or [MonsterRarity|Monster] rarity can be Normal (grey), Magic (blue), Rare (yellow) or Unique (brown). As a general rule, monsters increase in difficulty depending on their Rarity.
Definition.zh: [ItemRarity|物品]或[MonsterRarity|怪物]的稀有度包括了普通（灰色）、魔法（蓝色）、稀有（黄色）和传奇（棕色）。一般来说，怪物的难度会随稀有度的提高而提高。

Term.en: Faster Start of Energy Shield Recharge
Term.zh: 能量护盾充能启动速度加快

Definition.en: Affects the delay before your [EnergyShield|Energy Shield] starts [ESRecharge|Recharging] after losing Energy Shield.
Definition.zh: 影响损失能量护盾后，[EnergyShield|能量护盾]开始[ESRecharge|充能]前的延迟。

Definition.en: Affects how quickly [EnergyShield|Energy Shield] is recovered by [ESRecharge|Recharge] once it starts Recharging.
Definition.zh: 影响[EnergyShield|能量护盾]开始[ESRecharge|充能]之后的回复速度。

Definition.en:
Any damage that isn't damage over time is Hit damage.

[DamagingAilments|Damaging Ailments] which result from a Hit will calculate their damage from that Hit, and will not subsequently have Damage modifiers applied directly to them. As a result of this, raising Hit Damage will result in more powerful Damaging Ailments innately.
Definition.zh:
任何非持续伤害，都属于击中伤害。

由击中造成的[DamagingAilments|伤害性异常状态]将基于该次击中计算其伤害，并不会再直接受到伤害加成的影响。因此，提高击中伤害会自然提升异常状态的伤害。

Definition.en:
Spells are skills that use raw magic to destroy your enemies. [Attack|Attacks] are not Spells.

Spells have their own base damage, cast speed and [Critical|Critical Hit] chance determined by the skill. They do not benefit from a weapon's inherent damage, attack speed or [Critical|Critical Hit] chance.
Definition.zh:
法术是使用源生的魔法来摧毁敌人的技能。[Attack|攻击]不属于法术。

法术具有独立的基础伤害、施法速度和[Critical|暴击]几率，具体由法术本身决定。它们不受武器的固有伤害、攻击速度或[Critical|暴击]几率影响。

Definition.en:
Attacks are skills that directly damage enemies, usually using your equipped [MartialWeapon|Martial Weapon]. [Spell|Spells] are not Attacks.

The base damage, attack speed and [Critical|critical hit] chance of an attack are determined using your [MartialWeapon|Martial Weapon]'s stats unless the skill says otherwise.

Attacks do not necessarily deal [Physical] damage — they can deal any damage type.
Definition.zh:
攻击是直接使用装备的[MartialWeapon|战斗武器]对敌人造成伤害的技能。[Spell|法术]不属于攻击。

除非技能另有说明，攻击的基础伤害、攻击速度和[Critical|暴击]几率会基于你的[MartialWeapon|战斗武器]的属性。

攻击不一定会造成[Physical|物理]伤害，它们可以造成任意类型的伤害。

Definition.en:
Traps are [Two-Handed] ranged weapons that require [Dexterity] and [Intelligence] to equip. Traps cannot be used to [Attack] directly. 

Throwing a Trap places it on the ground, where it can either be detonated manually or triggered by [CloseRange|Close by] enemies depending on the Trap type.
Definition.zh:
陷阱是[Two-Handed|双手]远程武器，需要[Dexterity|敏捷]和[Intelligence|智慧]才能装备。陷阱无法直接进行[Attack|攻击]。

投掷陷阱会将其放在地上，随后可以手动引爆，或者由附近[CloseRange|接近]的敌人触发，具体取决于陷阱的类型。

Definition.en: Withered applies 5% increased [Chaos] damage Taken, and can be inflicted up to 10 times.
Definition.zh: 死亡凋零会使受到的[Chaos|混沌]伤害提高 5%，最多造成 10 次。

Definition.en: Crushed lowers [Physical] Damage Reduction by 15%. This can result in [Physical] Damage Reduction being negative, causing more damage to be taken.
Definition.zh: 碾压使[Physical|物理]伤害减免降低 15%。[Physical|物理]伤害减免可被降为负值，从而导致其承受更多伤害。

Definition.en: Crushing Blows cause a [HeavyStun|Heavy Stun] on enemies that are [PrimedStun|Primed for Stun].
Definition.zh: 粉碎打击会对[PrimedStun|可被晕眩]的敌人造成[HeavyStun|重度晕眩]。

Definition.en: Hits have up to +6% [Critical|Critical Hit] Chance against Brittle enemies, based on the [Cold] damage of the Hit which inflicted Brittle, for 4 seconds.
Definition.zh: 对脆弱的敌人的击中[Critical|暴击]几率提高最多 +6%，由造成脆弱的击中的[Cold|冰霜]伤害决定，持续 4 秒。

Definition.en: Quest items are used to progress the story. They cannot be sold or stashed, but can be discarded. Discarded quest items can be reobtained from their original source.
Definition.zh: 任务物品是推进剧情的关键，无法出售或储存，但是可以丢弃。丢弃的任务物品可以从原处重新获得。

Definition.en:
Swords are [Melee] weapons that can be [One-Handed] or [Two-Handed]. Swords require [Strength] and [Dexterity] to equip. 

Sword [Attack|Attacks] are commonly related to elemental damage.
Definition.zh:
剑类武器是[One-Handed|单手]或[Two-Handed|双手]使用的[Melee|近战]武器。剑类武器需要[Strength|力量]和[Dexterity|敏捷]才能装备。

剑类武器的[Attack|攻击]通常与元素伤害相关。

Definition.en:
Maces are [Melee] weapons that can be [One-Handed] or [Two-Handed]. Maces require [Strength] to equip. 

Mace [Attack|Attacks] are often [Slam|Slams] or slow [Strike|Strikes] that deal [Physical] or [Fire] damage.
Definition.zh:
锤类武器是[One-Handed|单手]或[Two-Handed|双手]使用的[Melee|近战]武器。锤类武器需要[Strength|力量]才能装备。

锤类武器的[Attack|攻击]通常为[Slam|猛击]或缓慢的[Strike|打击]，能造成[Physical|物理]或[Fire|火焰]伤害。

Definition.en:
Sceptres are [One-Handed] weapons that require [Strength] and [Intelligence] to equip. Sceptres can be equipped in your main hand or off hand, but you cannot [DualWield|Dual Wield] two Sceptres. 

Sceptres cannot be used to [Attack] and do not grant bonuses to [Spell|Spellcasting]. Instead, they grant additional [Spirit] and can provide bonuses to your [Allies].
Definition.zh:
权杖是[One-Handed|单手]武器，需要[Strength|力量]和[Intelligence|智慧]才能装备。权杖可以装备在主手或副手，但无法[DualWield|双持]两把权杖。

权杖无法用于[Attack|攻击]，也不提供[Spell|施法]加成。它们能提供额外的[Spirit|精魂]，还能为[Allies|友军]提供加成。

Definition.en:
Wands are [One-Handed] [Spell|Spellcasting] weapons that require [Intelligence] to equip. 

Wands cannot be [DualWield|Dual Wielded] and cannot be used to [Attack] directly. However, they grant inbuilt [Spell|Spells] based on the wand type and powerful bonuses to spells.
Definition.zh:
法杖是[One-Handed|单手][Spell|施法]武器，需要[Intelligence|智慧]才能装备。

法杖无法[DualWield|双持]，也不能直接用于[Attack|攻击]。法杖会根据自身的类型提供内置的[Spell|法术]，还能提供强大的法术加成。

Definition.en:
Axes are [Melee] weapons that can be [One-Handed] or [Two-Handed]. Axes require [Strength] and [Dexterity] to equip. 

Axe [Attack|Attacks] commonly involve throwing your axe and/or inflicting [Bleeding].
Definition.zh:
斧类武器是[One-Handed|单手]或[Two-Handed|双手]使用的[Melee|近战]武器。斧类武器需要[Strength|力量]和[Dexterity|敏捷]才能装备。

斧类武器的[Attack|攻击]通常与掷斧和/或造成[Bleeding|流血]相关。

Definition.en:
Bows are [Two-Handed] ranged weapons that require [Dexterity] to equip. Equipping a Bow allows you to also equip a [Quiver] in the off hand slot. 

Bows can [Attack] from long range and with high mobility using a variety of skills, but generally deal less damage than other two-handed weapon types.
Definition.zh:
弓类武器是[Two-Handed|双手]武器，需要[Dexterity|敏捷]才能装备。装备弓类武器可以允许你在副手栏位中装备[Quiver|箭袋]。

弓类武器可以进行远距离[Attack|攻击]，可以使用多种技能来获得高机动性，但造成的伤害低于其他双手武器。

Definition.en:
Daggers are [One-Handed] [Melee] weapons that require [Dexterity] and [Intelligence] to equip. 

Dagger [Attack|Attacks] are commonly related to ambushing or debilitating enemies. Some blade-related [Spell|Spells] also require a Dagger.
Definition.zh:
匕首是[One-Handed|单手][Melee|近战]武器，需要[Dexterity|敏捷]和[Intelligence|智慧]才能装备。

匕首的[Attack|攻击]通常与伏击相关，还能使敌人疲惫。部分利刃相关的[Spell|法术]也需要一把匕首。

Definition.en:
Staves are [Two-Handed] [Spell|Spellcasting] weapons that require [Intelligence] to equip. 
Staves cannot be used to [Attack]. However, they grant inbuilt [Spell|Spells] based on the staff type and powerful bonuses to spells.
Definition.zh:
长杖是[Two-Handed|双手][Spell|施法]武器，需要[Intelligence|智慧]才能装备。
长杖不能用于[Attack|攻击]。长杖会根据自身的类型提供内置的[Spell|法术]，还能提供强大的法术加成。

Definition.en:
Claws are [One-Handed] [Melee] weapons that require [Dexterity] to equip. Claws can be [DualWield|Dual Wielded] with another Claw, but cannot be combined with other equipped items in the off hand.

Claw [Attack|Attacks] are commonly fast and cause [Bleeding].
Definition.zh:
爪类武器是[One-Handed|单手][Melee|近战]武器，需要[Dexterity|敏捷]才能装备。爪类武器可以与另一把爪类武器一起[DualWield|双持]，但无法与副手装备的其他武器组合使用。

爪类武器的[Attack|攻击]通常非常迅捷，还能造成[Bleeding|流血]。

Definition.en:
Talismans are [Two-Handed] [Melee] weapons that require [Strength] and [Intelligence] to equip.

Talismans allow you to use [Shapeshift|Shapeshifting] Skills associated with the Talisman's current form, and grants a basic Attack for that form. You can change the Talisman's form at any time.

While you have a Talisman in your active weapon set you will [Shapeshift] into its associated form. As a result, Skills that cannot be used in a [Shapeshift] form cannot be used with Talismans. [Trigger|Triggered] Skills and [Persistent] Skills will continue to function.
Definition.zh:
魔符是[Two-Handed|双手][Melee|近战]武器，需要[Strength|力量]和[Intelligence|智慧]才能装备。

魔符可让你使用与当前形态关联的[Shapeshift|变形]技能，赋予你该形态下的基础攻击。你可以随时切换魔符的形态。

当你激活的武器组中装备有魔符时，你将[Shapeshift|变形]为其关联的形态。因此，无法在[Shapeshift|变形]形态下使用的技能，也无法与魔符一同使用。[Trigger|触发]类技能与[Persistent|永久性]技能将继续生效。

Definition.en:
Shields are armour items that are equipped in your off hand. While holding a Shield you have a chance to passively [Block]. Most Shields can also be raised to [Block] all incoming [Strike|Strikes] and [Projectile|Projectiles] from the front.

[Buckler|Bucklers] are a special type of Shield that do not grant any [Armour] and can Parry enemy skills instead of being raised to [Block].
Definition.zh:
盾牌是装备于副手的护甲类物品。持有盾牌时，你有几率被动地[Block|格挡]。你还可以举起大部分类型的盾牌，[Block|格挡]所有来自正面的[Strike|打击]和[Projectile|投射物]。

[Buckler|轻盾]是一种特殊类型的盾牌，不提供任何[Armour|护甲]，并且能够招架敌人的技能，而非举盾[Block|格挡]。

Definition.en: Armoured [Shield|Shields] are any [Shield|Shields] that grant the player [Armour] — that is, any type of [Shield] other than [Buckler|Bucklers].
Definition.zh: 护甲[Shield|盾牌]指的是任意为玩家提供[Armour|护甲]的[Shield|盾牌]，即除了[Buckler|轻盾]之外的所有[Shield|盾牌]。

Definition.en: Bucklers are a special type of [Shield] that do not grant any [Armour] and can [Parry] enemy skills instead of being raised to [Block].
Definition.zh: 轻盾是一种特殊的[Shield|盾牌]，不提供[Armour|护甲]，无法举盾[Block|格挡]，但可以[Parry|招架]敌人的技能。

Definition.en:
Foci are armour items that are equipped in your off hand and require [Intelligence] to equip. 

Foci can grant significant amounts of [EnergyShield|Energy Shield] and powerful bonuses to your [Spell|Spells].
Definition.zh:
法器是装备于副手的护甲物品，需要[Intelligence|智慧]才能装备。

法器可以提供大量[EnergyShield|能量护盾]，还能为[Spell|法术]提供强大的加成。

Definition.en:
Quarterstaves are [Two-Handed] [Melee] weapons that require [Dexterity] and [Intelligence] to equip. 

Quarterstaff [Attack|Attacks] often focus on high mobility in combat.
Definition.zh:
节杖是[Two-Handed|双手][Melee|近战]武器，需要[Dexterity|敏捷]和[Intelligence|智慧]才能装备。

节杖的[Attack|攻击]通常注重在战斗中维持机动性。

Definition.en:
Spears are [One-Handed] [Melee] weapons that require [Strength] and [Dexterity] to equip. Spears cannot be dual wielded. 

Spear combat is often a mix of both ranged and [Melee], as many spear skills enable you to throw your spear.
Definition.zh:
战矛是[One-Handed|单手][Melee|近战]武器，需要[Strength|力量]和[Dexterity|敏捷]才能装备。战矛无法双持。

战矛的战斗方式结合了远程和[Melee|近战]，包含了许多投掷战矛的技能。

Definition.en:
Crossbows are [Two-Handed] ranged weapons that require [Strength] and [Dexterity] to equip. Crossbow basic [Attack|Attacks] can be modified with [Ammunition|Ammunition Skills].

Multiple [Projectile|Projectiles] fired from a single Crossbow skill can all hit the same target, and single-[Projectile] skills fire additional [Projectile|Projectiles] in sequence rather than in a spread.
Definition.zh:
战弩是[Two-Handed|双手]远程武器，需要[Strength|力量]和[Dexterity|敏捷]才能装备。战弩的基础[Attack|攻击]可以通过[Ammunition|弹药技能]更改。

单个战弩技能发射的多个[Projectile|投射物]可以击中同一个目标，并且单发[Projectile|投射物]技能会连续发射额外[Projectile|投射物]，而非并排发射。

Definition.en:
Flails are [One-Handed] [Melee] weapons that require [Strength] and [Intelligence] to equip. Flails cannot be [DualWield|Dual Wielded]. 

Flail [Attack|Attacks] tend to reward careful placement and long wind-up times with devastating effects.
Definition.zh:
连枷是[One-Handed|单手][Melee|近战]武器，需要[Strength|力量]和[Intelligence|智慧]才能装备。连枷无法[DualWield|双持]。

连枷的[Attack|攻击]需要巧妙的站位，并且起手时间较长，但效果非常显著。

Definition.en:
Flasks can be used to recover your Life or Mana. Flasks are not consumable, but require charges to use. Flask charges can be regained by killing enemies. 

[Rarity|Normal] enemies grant Flask charges equal to half their [Power]
[Rarity|Magic] enemies grant Flask charges equal to their [Power]
[Rarity|Rare] and [Rarity|Unique] enemies grant Flask charges equal to twice their [Power]

[Checkpoint|Checkpoints] and [Wells] completely refill Flasks when activated. Flasks can only hold charges while in a Flask slot.
Definition.zh:
药剂可以用于回复生命或魔力。药剂不属于消耗品，但需要充能才可以使用。击败敌人可以补充药剂充能。

[Rarity|普通]敌人能够提供相当于[Power|威力值]一半的药剂充能。
[Rarity|魔法]敌人能够提供相当于[Power|威力值]的药剂充能。
[Rarity|稀有]和[Rarity|传奇]敌人能够提供相当于[Power|威力值]双倍的药剂充能。

[Checkpoint|记录点]和[Wells|水井]在激活时能够完全补满药剂。药剂仅有放置在药剂栏位时才能获得充能。

Definition.en:
Utility Flasks can only hold charges while in a flask slot. They can be bound to action buttons to trigger strategically during combat. Utility Flasks offer a buff or combat ability for a limited time. 

Flasks refill at [Checkpoint|Checkpoints], [Wells|Wells] or by killing Monsters. More powerful Monsters will grant more charges.
Definition.zh:
功能药剂仅有放置在药剂栏位时才能获得充能。它们可以绑定在操作按键上，在战斗中适时触发。功能药剂可在限定时间内提供增益状态或战斗能力。

药剂可在[Checkpoint|记录点]或[Wells|水井]处补充，也可以通过击败怪物补充。怪物越强大，提供的充能越多。

Definition.en: Quivers are off hand items that are only usable while you have a [Bow] equipped. Quivers provide a variety of bonuses to Bow [Attack|Attacks].
Definition.zh: 箭袋是副手物品，只能在装备[Bow|弓类]武器时使用。箭袋可为弓类武器的[Attack|攻击]提供多种加成。

Definition.en:
Spirit is a reserve of power used to activate and maintain skills with permanent effects. Spirit-powered skills are managed within the Skills Panel.

[WeaponSets|Weapon Sets] can have differing amounts of available Spirit, due to weapons with Spirit (such as [Sceptre|Sceptres]), [WeaponSetPassiveSkillPoints|Weapon Set Passive Skills], or [Persistent] Skills that are active in specific [WeaponSets|Weapon Sets].
Definition.zh:
精魂是一种保留的力量，能用于激活和维持永久性效果。可在技能面板中管理消耗精魂的技能。

[WeaponSets|武器组]可能有不同的可用精魂量，这取决于带有精魂的武器（如[Sceptre|权杖]）、[WeaponSetPassiveSkillPoints|武器组天赋技能]或在特定[WeaponSets|武器组]中激活的[Persistent|永久性]技能。

Definition.en: One-handed weapons can be placed in the main weapon slot. Some one-handed weapon types can be dual wielded in both main and off hand weapon slots.
Definition.zh: 单手武器可以放在主手武器栏位中。部分单手武器类型可以放在主手和副手武器栏位中，从而实现双持。

Definition.en: Two-handed weapons take up both weapon slots when equipped.
Definition.zh: 双手武器装备时会占用两个武器栏位。

Definition.en:
Your allies include other players, [Minion|Minions], and any other entity that fights alongside you and has its own stats. 

You do not count as your own Ally.
Definition.zh:
友军包括了其他玩家、[Minion|召唤生物]，以及其他与你并肩作战、具有独立属性的实体。

你不算作是自己的友军。

Definition.en: Dual Wielding refers to using two [MartialWeapon|Martial Weapons], one in each hand.
Definition.zh: 双持指的是装备两把[MartialWeapon|战斗武器]，每只手各握持一把。

Definition.en: Minions are summoned [Allies] which will accompany and fight alongside you. [Persistent] Minions will reserve a portion of [Spirit] while active.
Definition.zh: 召唤生物是陪伴你，并为你作战的[Allies|友军]。[Persistent|永久性]召唤生物激活时会保留一部分[Spirit|精魂]。

Definition.en: Warcries are skills which count enemy [Power] within their area and [Empowered|Empower] your subsequent Melee [Attack|Attacks], sometimes depending on the total [Power] of enemies counted.
Definition.zh: 战吼技能会计算作用范围内敌人的[Power|威力值]，并以此[Empowered|强化]你后续的近战[Attack|攻击]，效果有时取决于所统计的敌人的总[Power|威力值]。

Definition.en:
Curses significantly [Debuff] affected targets. By default a target can have one Curse on them at a time.

Higher [Rarity] enemies are less affected by Curses:

15% less Curse effect on Magic monsters
30% less Curse effect on Rare monsters
50% less Curse effect on Unique monsters
Definition.zh:
诅咒会大幅[Debuff|减益]受影响的目标。默认情况下，一个目标同一时间只能受到一种诅咒影响。

更高[Rarity|稀有度]的敌人受到的诅咒效果更少：
魔法怪物受到的诅咒效果总降 15%
稀有怪物受到的诅咒效果总降 30%
传奇怪物受到的诅咒效果总降 50%

Definition.en:
[Curse|Curses] you inflict have 4% increased [Curse] [BuffMagnitude|Magnitudes] for each Dark Whisper you have. You can have a maximum of 10 Dark Whispers.

Dark Whispers last for 8 seconds, and this duration is refreshed whenever you gain more.

When Dark Whispers expire, you Lose 3% of Life, Mana, and Energy Shield for each of them, over 4 seconds.
Definition.zh:
你施加的[Curse|诅咒]每拥有一层暗言，[Curse|诅咒][BuffMagnitude|强度]就提高 4%。你最多可拥有 10 层暗言。

暗言持续 8 秒，当你获得新层数时，此持续时间会刷新。

当暗言消失时，每一层会使你在 4 秒内失去 3% 的生命、魔力和能量护盾。

Definition.en: Aftershocks are bursts of area damage that occur after the initial impact of the skill causing them. If not otherwise specified, the Aftershock will deal the same damage as the initial impact, in the same area. Only Attack damage can cause Aftershocks.
Definition.zh: 余震是相关技能在初始冲击后产生的爆发，造成范围伤害。除非另有说明，否则余震的伤害量和效果区域都与初始冲击相同。只有攻击伤害能够造成余震。

Definition.en: The Elusive buff grants increased Movement Speed, and additional chance to avoid damage. The effects of Elusive are reduced over time.
Definition.zh: 灵巧增益会提高移动速度，还有额外几率避免伤害。灵巧的效果会随时间递减。

Definition.en: Shocked Ground [Shock|Shocks] those standing in it, and lasts 6 seconds by default.
Definition.zh: 感电地面会对站在其中的单位施加[Shock|感电]，并且默认持续 6 秒。

Definition.en:
When you deal damage with a [HitDamage|Hit], [EnergyShield|Energy Shield] Leech causes you to recover an amount of [EnergyShield|Energy Shield] to a percentage of the damage dealt, over a period of one second.

Hits that deal more than 40,000 total damage are treated as though they only dealt 40,000 damage for this calculation. If this damage is of multiple [DamageTypes|Damage Types], the ratios between them will stay the same.

Monsters have Leech Resistance that increases with monster level, reducing how much you recover from Leech from [HitDamage|Hits] against them.

You can only recover from a single instance of [EnergyShield|Energy Shield] Leech at a time, and all [EnergyShield|Energy Shield] Leech is removed when [EnergyShield|Energy Shield] is filled.

Modifiers specific to Life Leech will not apply to Energy Shield Leech.
Definition.zh:
当你造成[HitDamage|击中]伤害时，[EnergyShield|能量护盾]偷取会在 1 秒内回复一定数量的[EnergyShield|能量护盾]，数值等于造成伤害的一定比例。

若一次击中的总伤害超过 40,000，则在该计算中仅视为 40,000 伤害。若该伤害包含多种[DamageTypes|伤害类型]，其比例保持不变。

怪物拥有偷取抗性，抗性随怪物等级提升而增加，从而降低你通过[HitDamage|击中]获得的偷取回复量。

你每次只能从单个[EnergyShield|能量护盾]偷取实例中回复怒火，且当[EnergyShield|能量护盾]值满时，所有[EnergyShield|能量护盾]偷取效果都会被移除。

专门的生命偷取词缀不会应用于能量护盾偷取。

Definition.en: You are considered Unarmed while you have no equipped [MartialWeapon|Martial] or [CasterWeapon|Caster Weapon].
Definition.zh: 当你没有装备[MartialWeapon|战斗武器]或[CasterWeapon|施法武器]时，你被视为徒手状态。

Definition.en:
Unarmed [Attack|Attacks] are [Attack|Attacks] which are performed while [Unarmed] and use your character's base [UnarmedDamage|Unarmed Damage] where other [Attack|Attacks] would use the base [HitDamage|Damage] from a [MartialWeapon|Martial Weapon].

[Attack|Attacks] which can be performed while [Unarmed] but draw their base damage from other sources, such as skills which use a [Shield] to attack, are not considered Unarmed Attacks.
Definition.zh:
徒手[Attack|攻击]是在[Unarmed|徒手]状态下进行的[Attack|攻击]，它们使用角色的基础[UnarmedDamage|徒手伤害]来计算，而其他[Attack|攻击]则使用[MartialWeapon|战斗武器]的基础[HitDamage|伤害]。

可以在[Unarmed|徒手]状态下进行、但其基础伤害来源于其他途径的[Attack|攻击]，例如使用[Shield|盾牌]进行攻击的技能，不被视为徒手攻击。

Definition.en:
Unarmed Damage refers to the [HitDamage|Hit Damage] of [UnarmedAttack|Unarmed Attacks]. As such, Unarmed Damage is always [Attack] [HitDamage].

Players' base Unarmed Damage is [Physical], and has a minimum roll of 2, and a maximum roll between 5 - 8, depending on how aligned their class is with [Strength].

Other Damage is not considered Unarmed Damage, even if you are [Unarmed] while dealing it.
Definition.zh:
徒手伤害指的是[UnarmedAttack|徒手攻击]的[HitDamage|击中伤害]。因此，徒手伤害总是[Attack|攻击][HitDamage|击中伤害]。

玩家的基础徒手伤害为[Physical|物理]伤害，其最小值固定为 2，最大值在 5 - 8 之间，具体取决于角色的职业与[Strength|力量]属性的契合程度。

其他伤害即使是在[Unarmed|徒手]状态下造成的，也不视为徒手伤害。

Definition.en: Orb Skills create lasting effects at a location which damage enemies in an area around them.
Definition.zh: 法球技能会在一个位置产生长时间的效果，对周围的敌人造成伤害。

Definition.en:
Exposure is a type of [Debuff] that lowers the affected enemy's [Total] [Resistances|Elemental Resistances]. By default it lowers [Resistances] by -20% and lasts for 4 seconds, though some sources of exposure can override these values. Like most sources of lowering [Resistances], this can cause the enemy's [Resistances|Resistance] to become negative.

Higher [Rarity] enemies are less affected by Exposure:

15% less Exposure effect on Magic monsters
30% less Exposure effect on Rare monsters
50% less Exposure effect on Unique monsters
Definition.zh:
曝露是一种[Debuff|减益状态]，能够降低受影响敌人的[Resistances|元素抗性][Total|总值]。默认情况下，曝露会使[Resistances|抗性] -20%，持续 4 秒，但部分来源的曝露可以覆盖这些数值。和大部分降低[Resistances|抗性]的效果一样，曝露可以使敌人的[Resistances|抗性]变为负值。

更高[Rarity|稀有度]的敌人受到的曝露效果更少：
魔法怪物曝露效果总降 15%
稀有怪物曝露效果总降 30%
传奇怪物曝露效果总降 50%

Definition.en:
Several [Meta] Skills generate and use Energy. Each Skill which generates Energy has its own Energy count particular to that Skill. Most effects which use Energy do so to [Trigger] other effects or Skills, based on the use time of the triggered Skill. When calculating Energy gain or consumption from the use time of a Skill, modifiers to [Total] use time are treated as though they were double the value.

Energy cannot be gained from direct effects of [Trigger|Triggered] Skills.
Definition.zh:
部分[Meta|非凡]技能会生成并使用能量，每个技能生成的能量专属于该技能。大部分效果都会通过消耗能量来[Trigger|触发]其他效果和技能，取决于触发技能的使用时间。通过技能使用时间计算能量获取或消耗时，[Total|总]使用时间的词缀数值视为双倍。

[Trigger|被触发]的技能的直接效果无法获得能量。

Definition.en:
Ice Crystals are solid blocks of ice which can be damaged. When destroyed, Ice Crystals will deal [Cold|Cold] damage in an area. Ice Crystals will block the movement of smaller monsters, while larger monsters will destroy Ice Crystals in their path.

Skills which [Consume] [Freeze] will instantly shatter Ice Crystals, causing them to deal more damage in a larger area.
Definition.zh:
冰晶是坚固的冰块，可以受到伤害。被摧毁时，冰晶会在周围造成[Cold|冰霜]伤害。冰晶会阻挡较小体型怪物的移动，大体型怪物则会直接摧毁路径上的冰晶。

[Consume|消耗][Freeze|冻结]的技能会立即击碎冰晶，使其在更大区域造成更多伤害。

Definition.en: Skills which [Consume] [Freeze] will instantly shatter [IceCrystals|Ice Crystals], causing them to deal more damage in a larger area.
Definition.zh: [Consume|消耗][Freeze|冻结]的技能会立即击碎[IceCrystals|冰晶]，使其在更大区域造成更多伤害。

Definition.en: [Projectile|Projectiles] which Return will Return to the entity which originated them after reaching the end of their travel, or on hitting a final target.
Definition.zh: 归返[Projectile|投射物]会在抵达飞行终点或击中最终目标时，返回产生它们的实体处。

Definition.en: While Phasing, you can pass through enemies without being blocked by them.
Definition.zh: 在迷踪状态下，你可以穿越敌人，不会被他们阻挡。

Definition.en: Corpses are left behind by slain Enemies and can be used or consumed by a number of different Skills or effects, though Corpses of [Rarity|Unique] monsters cannot be destroyed or consumed. Generally, slain [Allies|Allies] do not leave usable Corpses.
Definition.zh: 被击败的敌人会留下灵柩，可以由多种技能效果使用或消耗，但[Rarity|传奇]怪物的灵柩无法被摧毁或消耗。通常而言，被击败的[Allies|友军]不会留下可以使用的灵柩。

Definition.en:
Charges can be gained from a number of Skills, passives, and other effects. They do not grant any inherent benefits, but can be consumed to fuel many skills and other effects. Charges last for 15 seconds by default, refreshing whenever you gain another charge of the same type.

There are three types of Charges — Endurance, Frenzy and Power. By default players can have up to 3 of each type of Charge at once.
Definition.zh:
能量球可以通过许多技能、天赋和其他效果来获得。能量球本身不提供固有效果，但可以消耗它们来支持许多技能和效果。能量球默认持续 15 秒，获得同种能量球时会刷新时间。

能量球共有三种类型——耐力球、狂怒球和暴击球。默认情况下，玩家同一时间可以拥有每种能量球最多 3 个。

Definition.en: The three Elemental damage types are [Fire|Fire], [Cold|Cold], and [Lightning|Lightning].
Definition.zh: 三种元素伤害类型分别是[Fire|火焰]、[Cold|冰霜]和[Lightning|闪电]。

Definition.en: Wells are present in every Town, and will refill your [Flask|Flasks] as well as restoring your Life and Mana when used.
Definition.zh: 每个城镇里都有水井，使用水井可以补满你的[Flask|药剂]，并恢复你的生命和魔力。

Definition.en: Your Presence is an area around your character within which certain effects (such as many [Aura|Auras]) are applied. By default this has a 4 metre radius. The size of this area can be modified by Presence Area modifiers, but not by Skill Area modifiers.
Definition.zh: 在场范围指的是角色周围的产生某些特定效果的范围（例如[Aura|光环]的生效范围）。该范围默认为 4 米，可以被在场范围词缀调整，但不受技能范围词缀影响。

Definition.en: Your Light Radius determines the distance from your character which will be illuminated in dark areas, and the radius within which terrain and points of interest are revealed on the map.
Definition.zh: 照亮范围决定了角色能够在黑暗区域中照亮的距离，以及在地图上揭示地形和重要地点的范围。

Definition.en:
Items can be Normal (grey), Magic (blue), Rare (yellow) or Unique (brown). Item Classes which do not have these rarities, such as Currency, have individual rarity for each item.
Magic items can have 2 Modifiers; a Prefix and a Suffix.
Rare items can have up to 6 Modifiers; 3 Prefixes and 3 Suffixes.
More powerful and dangerous enemies are more likely to drop rarer Items.
Definition.zh:
物品包括了普通（灰色）、魔法（蓝色）、稀有（黄色）和传奇（棕色）。有些类型的物品不具有稀有度，例如通货物品，这类物品每种都具有独立的稀有度。
魔法物品可拥有最多 2 个词缀，包括一个前缀和一个后缀。
稀有物品可拥有最多 6 个词缀，包括 3 个前缀和 3 个后缀。
越强大、越危险的敌人越有可能掉落高稀有度的物品。

Definition.en: [Frozen] enemies Shatter when killed, destroying their corpse.
Definition.zh: [Frozen|冻结]的敌人被击败时会被击碎，将其灵柩摧毁。

Definition.en:
Penetration causes the target's corresponding [Resistances|Resistance] to be treated as lower than its actual value by the specified amount when of calculating Damage taken from your [HitDamage|Hits]. [Resistances] can only be Penetrated down to a minimum of 0% by default.

Since Penetration only affects [HitDamage|Hits] and applies to the target's defensive stats rather than your own offensive stats, it does not affect damage with [DamagingAilments|Ailments].
Definition.zh:
抗性穿透会使目标的对应[Resistances|抗性]在结算你的[HitDamage|击中]时的视作数值降低。在默认情况下，穿透后的[Resistances|抗性]最小值为 0%。

由于抗性穿透仅影响[HitDamage|击中]，并且只影响目标的防御属性，不影响你的攻击属性，所以它无法影响[DamagingAilments|异常状态]造成的伤害。

Definition.en:
Some Skills, Items, Support Gems and other effects can Break [Armour|Armour], which lowers a target's [Armour|Armour] by a specified amount. If this brings the target's [Armour|Armour] value to 0, their [Armour|Armour] is Fully Broken for 12 seconds, or 4 seconds for players. On top of not benefitting from [Armour], non-player targets with Fully Broken [Armour] take 20% increased [Physical] damage from [HitDamage|Hits].

Players Break 3 times Armour against Normal Monsters and 2 times Armour against Magic Monsters.
Definition.zh:
部分技能、物品、辅助宝石和其他效果可以粉碎[Armour|护甲]，使目标的[Armour|护甲]降低一定数值。如果使目标的[Armour|护甲]值降低为 0，则视作[Armour|护甲]完全破损，并且持续 12秒，对玩家则为 4 秒。非玩家目标的[Armour|护甲]完全破损后，除无法受益于[Armour|护甲]外，其受到的[HitDamage|击中][Physical|物理]伤害还会提高 20%。

玩家对抗普通怪物时可以粉碎 3 倍的护甲，对抗魔法怪物时可以粉碎 2 倍的护甲。

Term.zh: 低于 0 时的护甲破损

Definition.en: Enemies with [Armour] [ArmourBreak|Broken] below 0 have negative [Armour]. This means they take more [Physical] damage from [HitDamage|Hits]. Armour broken below 0 is capped by the enemy's base [Armour].
Definition.zh: [Armour|护甲][ArmourBreak|破损]至 0 以下的敌人具有负值[Armour|护甲]，受到的[HitDamage|击中][Physical|物理]伤害提高。负值护甲的上限取决于敌人的基础[Armour|护甲]。

Definition.en: Channelling Skills can be held down to gain power or continue using the Skill for a longer period of time.
Definition.zh: 持续吟唱类技能可以按住按键来提高威力，或者在较长的时间内持续使用该技能。

Definition.en: Remote Skills are Skills that are performed for you by a different entity, such as a [Totem], [Trap], or Clone. [Minion|Minions] are not Remote Skills.
Definition.zh: 远距技能是其他实体，例如[Totem|图腾]、[Trap|陷阱]或复制体为你使用的技能。[Minion|召唤生物]不属于远距技能。

Definition.en: An Ancestrally Boosted [Slam] has 30% more damage and 25% increased area of effect, and an Ancestrally Boosted [Strike] will target 2 additional Enemies. [Trigger|Triggered Skills] cannot be Ancestrally Boosted. Ancestrally Boosted [Attack|Attacks] count as being [Empowered].
Definition.zh: 先祖加持的[Slam|猛击]造成的伤害总增 30%，效果范围总增 25%，先祖加持的[Strike|打击]能够以额外 2 个敌人为目标。[Trigger|触发]技能无法获得先祖加持。先祖加持的[Attack|攻击]视为[Empowered|强化]。

Definition.en: An Ancestrally Boosted [Spell] has 30% more damage and 25% increased area of effect. [Trigger|Triggered Skills] cannot be Ancestrally Boosted.
Definition.zh: 受先祖加持的[Spell|法术]造成的伤害总增 30%，效果范围总增 25%。[Trigger|触发]类技能无法享受先祖加持效果。

Definition.en:
Buffs are effects that boost a player or monster's stats for a duration or while a condition is met.

Unless otherwise stated, Buffs of the same type do not stack — only the copy with the strongest effect applies.
Definition.zh:
增益状态能够提高玩家或怪物的属性。持续一定时间，或在满足条件时持续。

除非另有说明，否则同类增益状态无法叠效，仅有最强效的增益状态能够生效。

Definition.en:
Debuffs are negative effects that deal damage or penalise an entity's stats, either for a set duration or when a condition is met.

Unless otherwise stated, Debuffs of the same type do not stack — only the copy with the strongest effect applies.
Definition.zh:
减益状态是负面效果，可以造成伤害，或扣除实体的属性。效果会持续一定时间，或在满足条件时持续生效。


除非另有说明，否则同类减益状态无法叠加，仅有最强效的减益状态能够生效。

Definition.en: Persistent Skills are toggled in the Skills Panel instead of being used normally and often need to [Reservation|Reserve] [Spirit] in order to be activated.
Definition.zh: 永久性技能需要在技能面板中开关，而非正常使用。激活永久性技能通常需要[Reservation|保留][Spirit|精魂]。

Definition.en:
Multiple effects on enemies can be Consumed. Only one Consumption benefit can occur at once, and Consumption effects from Skills will take priority over those from other sources.

Consuming a [Debuff] on an enemy causes the enemy to be immune to that [Debuff] for 1 seconds.
Definition.zh:
敌人身上的多种效果都可以被消耗。同一时间只能产生一个消耗效果，技能的消耗效果先于其他来源生效。

消耗敌人身上的[Debuff|减益状态]会使敌人在 1 秒内免疫该[Debuff|减益状态]。

Definition.en: Reforges a [ItemRarity|Magic] item with new random modifiers.
Definition.zh: 使用新的随机词缀重置一件[ItemRarity|魔法]物品。

Definition.en: Adds an [Augment] Socket to a [MartialWeapon|Martial Weapon] or Armour
Definition.zh: 为一件[MartialWeapon|战斗武器]或护甲添加一个[Augment|增幅器]插槽

Definition.en: Auras apply [Buff|Buffs] to [Allies|Allies] within a radius, or [Debuff|Debuffs] to enemies within a radius of the source of the Aura.
Definition.zh: 光环会对光环来源一定范围内的[Allies|友军]提供[Buff|增益状态]，或者为范围内的敌人提供[Debuff|减益状态]。

Definition.en: Each Stormsurge on this Weapon grants 3% of damage [Gain|Gained] as Extra [Lightning|Lightning] damage for 5 seconds. Maximum 10 Stormsurge.
Definition.zh: 这把武器的每层风雷涌动使 5 秒内额外[Gain|获得]相当于伤害 3% 的[Lightning|闪电伤害]。最多具有 10 层风雷涌动。

Definition.en: Reviving [Minion|Minions] heal after avoiding damage for a short time, and automatically revive after a short delay when killed. This delay is reset whenever another Reviving [Minion] dies.
Definition.zh: 可复活的[Minion|召唤生物]会在避免受到伤害一段时间后回复生命，被击败时会在短暂的延迟后自动复活。每当有其他可复活的[Minion|召唤生物]被击败时，复活延迟都会重置。

Definition.en:
Quality grants small bonuses to an item depending on the type of item, up to a default maximum of 20%.

[MartialWeapon|Martial Weapons] gain 1% more [Physical] damage per Quality.
Armours gain 1% more [Armour], [Evasion], [EnergyShield|Energy Shield] and [Ward|Runic Ward] per Quality.
Rings and Amulets have a number of possible quality types that provide bonuses to specific modifiers on the item.
[Flask|Flasks] gain 1% more Life and Mana recovery per Quality.
[Charm|Charms] gain 1% increased duration per Quality.
Skill Gems or equipment that grant Skills grant a specific bonus to their Skill based on their Quality.
Definition.zh:
品质能够根据物品的类型，为物品的属性提供少量加成，默认最高为 20%。

每一点品质使[MartialWeapon|战斗武器]的[Physical|物理]伤害总增 1%。 
每一点品质使护甲的[Armour|护甲]、[Evasion|闪避]、[EnergyShield|能量护盾]和[Ward|符文结界]总增 1%。
戒指和项链具有多种可能的品质类型，能够为该物品的特定词缀提供加成。
每一点品质使[Flask|药剂]的生命和魔力回复总增 1%。
每一点品质使[Charm|咒符]的持续时间延长 1%。
技能宝石或提供技能的装备会根据品质，为这一技能提供特定加成。

Definition.en:
Support Gems can be inserted into sockets on a Skill Gem in order to modify the effects of that Skill. They only apply to the Skill Gem they are socketed into.

You cannot use multiple copies of the exact same [LineageSupports|Lineage Support] across multiple Skills, or for Supports that grant global benefits to persistent reservation Skills while active.
Cannot use multiple Support Gems of the same [SupportGemCategory|Category] in one Skill.
Definition.zh:
辅助宝石可以镶嵌到技能宝石的插槽之中，从而修改该技能的效果。它们仅对镶嵌的技能宝石生效。

你无法在多个技能中使用多个相同的[LineageSupports|血脉辅助]，或是在激活时为持续生效技能提供全局加成的辅助。
无法在一个技能中使用多个相同[SupportGemCategory|类别]的辅助宝石。

Definition.en:
This Skill has an effect that applies to every target in its area, rather than picking specific targets.

Areas of Effect that originate from a target hit by a Skill will add that target's size to their radius.
Definition.zh:
这类技能的效果可以对范围内的每一个目标生效，而非仅选取特定目标。

如果效果区域技能来自一个被其他技能击中的目标，则会将目标的体型纳入到范围之中。

Definition.en: This Skill has a Duration that can be modified.
Definition.zh: 这类技能具有可以修改的持续时间。

Definition.en: Detonator Skills can cause flammable gas, [Oil], explosives, and similar effects to explode on contact.
Definition.zh: 引爆技能击中可燃气体、[Oil|黏油]、炸药和类似的效果时能够使其爆炸。

Definition.en: Nova Skills take effect in a circular area around their user.
Definition.zh: 新星技能会在使用者周围的圆形范围内生效。

Definition.en:
Many effects can cause a Skill to Trigger. A Triggered Skill occurs immediately, without an attack or cast time, and usually targets the cause of the trigger. Triggering a Skill does not count as using it.

If multiple methods of Triggering a Skill attempt to apply to the same skill, that skill will be disabled. [Channelling|Channelled] Skills cannot be Triggered.
Definition.zh:
许多效果都可以触发技能。触发技能会立即生效，不需要攻击或施法时间，通常会以触发的源头为目标。触发技能不视作使用该技能。

如果尝试对同一个技能使用多种触发技能的方式，则该技能会失效。[Channelling|持续吟唱]技能无法被触发。

Definition.en: Herald Skills are a type of [Persistent] [Buff] that grant powerful effects on killing enemies.
Definition.zh: 捷技能是一种[Persistent|永久性的][Buff|增益]，能够在击败敌人时产生强大的效果。

Definition.en: When you take damage from a [HitDamage|Hit], Recoup causes you to recover an amount of the stated resource equal to a percentage of the damage you took over 8 seconds.
Definition.zh: 当你受到[HitDamage|击中]伤害时，吸纳会使你在 8 秒内回复一定数量的指定资源，数值等于同受到伤害的一定比例。

Definition.en:
Thorns damage is a kind of [HitDamage|Hit] Damage you can deal. Thorns damage is not [Attack] damage or [Spell] damage and is not affected by modifiers specific to those.

If you have Thorns damage, you inherently [ThornsRetaliation|Retaliate] against [Melee] [Attack] [HitDamage|Hits], dealing your Thorns damage to the enemy that [HitDamage|Hit] you.

Some skills and other effects may also deal your thorns damage to enemies at other times.
Definition.zh:
荆棘伤害是你能够造成的一种[HitDamage|击中]伤害。荆棘伤害不属于[Attack|攻击]或[Spell|法术]伤害，不受相关的词缀影响。

如果你具有荆棘伤害，就会自动对[Melee|近战][Attack|攻击][HitDamage|击中]进行[ThornsRetaliation|反击]，对[HitDamage|击中]你的敌人造成荆棘伤害。

部分技能和其他效果可以在其他情况下对敌人造成荆棘伤害。

Definition.en: Ignited Ground repeatedly inflicts [Flammability] on enemies as long as they are standing on it, [Ignite|Igniting] them when it reaches 50%. By default, Ignited Ground lasts for 4 seconds and has a radius of 2 metres unless otherwise specified.
Definition.zh: 点燃地面会反复对站在其中的敌人施加[Flammability|易燃]，当其达到 50% 时[Ignite|点燃]他们。默认情况下，点燃地面持续 4 秒。除非另有说明，点燃地面的范围为 2 米。

Definition.en: Critical Weakness causes hits against affected targets to have +0.5% to [Critical|Critical Hit] Chance, and can stack up to 20 times. If not otherwise specified, each stack lasts for 4 seconds.
Definition.zh: 暴击弱点使针对受影响目标的击中的[Critical|暴击]几率 +0.5%，最多叠加 20 次。除非另有说明，否则每层效果持续 4 秒。

Definition.en: Elemental Ground Surfaces include [ShockedGround|Shocked Ground], [ChilledGround|Chilled Ground], and [IgnitedGround|Ignited Ground].
Definition.zh: 元素地面效果包括[ShockedGround|感电地面]、[ChilledGround|冰缓地面]和[IgnitedGround|点燃地面]。

Definition.en: Using a [Crossbow] Ammunition Skill replaces your [Crossbow|Crossbow's] basic [Attack] with the skill indicated. The Ammunition Skill itself does not fire the Ammunition, only load it into your [Crossbow]. Most [Crossbow] Ammunition Skills that directly [HitDamage|Hit] enemies have [Knockback].
Definition.zh: 使用[Crossbow|战弩]弹药技能会将[Crossbow|战弩的]基础[Attack|攻击]替换为指定的技能。弹药技能本身不会发射弹药，仅仅是为[Crossbow|战弩]装填该类弹药。大多数直接[HitDamage|击中]敌人的[Crossbow|战弩]弹药技能都有[Knockback|击退]效果。

Definition.en:
[MonsterRarity|Magic and Rare] Monsters have Modifiers which will augment them in many ways, making them more rewarding, but also more powerful and deadly. Magic Monsters will normally have a single Monster Modifier, whereas Rare Monsters have up to 4 by default. 

Each Monster Modifier grants at least 100% increased Rarity of Items Dropped, and can grant the Monster additional abilities or permanant buffs.

Monster Modifier Chance increases the potential number of Rare Monster Modifiers with each modifier above 4 requiring twice as much Modifier Chance. Monster Modifier Chance above the maximum number of modifiers increases the chance Rare monsters will have maximum modifiers.

Other mechanics such as [AzmeriSpirit|Azmeri Spirits], [Essence|Essences] and [ContainsDelirium|Delirium] can add additional Monster Modifiers to monsters of any rarity.
Definition.zh:
[MonsterRarity|魔法和稀有]怪物拥有词缀，这些词缀会以多种方式强化它们，令它们的奖励更丰厚，同时也更强大而致命。魔法怪物通常拥有 1 条怪物词缀，而稀有怪物默认最多拥有 4 条。

每条怪物词缀至少使掉落物品的稀有度提高 100%，并且可以赋予怪物额外的能力或永久性增益。

怪物词缀几率会增加稀有怪物可能拥有的词缀数量。超出 4 条后，每增加 1 条，都需要 2 倍的词缀几率。超过最大词缀数量的怪物词缀几率会提高稀有怪物拥有满额词缀的几率。

其他机制，例如[AzmeriSpirit|阿兹莫里之灵]、[Essence|精华]和[ContainsDelirium|惊悸迷雾]，可为任意稀有度的怪物添加额外的怪物词缀。

Definition.en:
Cannot be Light Stunned
Cannot Dodge Roll or Sprint
Definition.zh:
无法被轻度晕眩
无法使用闪避翻滚或奔跑

Definition.en:
[StatConversion|Converts] 100% of maximum [EnergyShield|Energy Shield] to maximum Mana
Doubles Mana Costs
Definition.zh:
[StatConversion|转化] 100%的最大[EnergyShield|能量护盾]为最大魔力
魔力消耗翻倍

Definition.en:
All [DamageTypes|Damage] is taken from Mana before Life
50% less Mana Recovery Rate
Definition.zh:
受到的所有[DamageTypes|伤害]在扣除生命前优先从魔力扣除
魔力回复速度总降 50%

Definition.en:
You have no Mana
Skill Mana Costs [StatConversion|Converted] to Life Costs
Definition.zh:
你不具有魔力
技能的魔力消耗[StatConversion|转化]为生命消耗

Definition.en:
You can wield [Two-Handed] [Axe|Axes], [Mace|Maces] and [Sword|Swords] in one hand
Triple [Attributes|Attribute] requirements of weapons
Inherent Life granted by [Strength] is halved
Definition.zh:
你可以单手装备一把[Two-Handed|双手][Axe|斧类]、[Mace|锤类]或[Sword|剑类]武器
武器的[Attributes|属性]需求变为三倍
由[Strength|力量]提供的固有生命减半

Definition.en:
50% more amount of Life [LifeLeech|Leeched]
[LifeLeech|Leech Life] 67% less quickly
Cannot Recover Life other than from [LifeLeech|Leech]
[LifeLeech|Life Leech] effects are not removed when [Reservation|Unreserved] Life is Filled
Definition.zh:
生命[LifeLeech|偷取]量总增 50%
[LifeLeech|生命偷取]速度降低 67%
你只能通过[LifeLeech|偷取]来回复生命
[Reservation|未保留]生命值满时，[LifeLeech|生命偷取]效果不会被移除

Definition.en:
30% less [CriticalDamageBonus|Critical Damage Bonus] when on Full Life
30% more Critical Damage Bonus when on [LowLife|Low Life]
Definition.zh:
满血时[CriticalDamageBonus|暴击伤害加成]总降 30%
[LowLife|低血]时暴击伤害加成总增 30%

Definition.en:
You can apply an additional [Curse]
Double Activation Delay of Curses
Definition.zh:
你可以额外施加一个[Curse|诅咒]
诅咒的激活延迟翻倍

Definition.en:
Chance to [Evasion|Evade] is [Unlucky]
Chance to [Deflect] is [Lucky]
Definition.zh:
[Evasion|闪避]几率特别[Unlucky|不幸]
[Deflect|偏转]几率特别[Lucky|幸运]

Definition.en:
Your [Totem] [Limit] is doubled
No cost or [Charges|Charge] requirement for placing [Totem|Totems]
[Totem|Totems] reserve 75 [Spirit] each
Definition.zh:
你的[Totem|图腾][Limit|上限]翻倍
你可以无消耗、且没有[Charges|能量球]要求地放置[Totem|图腾]
每个[Totem|图腾]消耗 75 点[Spirit|精魂]

Definition.en: If you would gain a [Charges|Charge], [Allies] in your [Presence] gain that [Charges|Charge] instead.
Definition.zh: 若你即将获得一个[Charges|能量球]，则改为使你[Presence|在场]处的[Allies|友军]获得该[Charges|能量球]

Definition.en:
[Accuracy] Rating is Doubled
Never deal [Critical|Critical Hits]
Definition.zh:
[Accuracy|命中]值翻倍
但永远无法造成[Critical|暴击]

Definition.en:
You can apply an additional [Curse]
Double Activation Delay of [Curse|Curses]
Definition.zh:
你可以施加一个额外的[Curse|诅咒]
但所有[Curse|诅咒]的激活延迟将翻倍

Definition.en:
75% of Damage [Conversion|Converted] to [Fire] Damage
Deal no Non-[Fire] Damage
Definition.zh:
75% 的伤害[Conversion|转化]为[Fire|火焰]伤害
不会造成非[Fire|火焰]伤害

Definition.en:
5% of Physical Damage prevented [Recoup|Recouped] as [EnergyShield|Energy Shield] per enemy [Power]
[EnergyShield|Energy Shield] does not [ESRecharge|Recharge]
You cannot Recover [EnergyShield|Energy Shield] from Regeneration
