You cannot Recover [EnergyShield|Energy Shield] to above [Armour]
Definition.zh:
敌人每点[Power|威力值]可使 5% 已预防的物理伤害[Recoup|吸纳]为[EnergyShield|能量护盾]
你的[EnergyShield|能量护盾]无法[ESRecharge|充能]
你无法通过再生效果恢复[EnergyShield|能量护盾]
你无法将[EnergyShield|能量护盾]恢复至[Armour|护甲]值之上

Definition.en:
You can equip a non-[ItemRarity|Unique] [Sceptre] while wielding a [Talisman]
50% less [Spirit]
Non-[Minion] Skills have 50% less [Reservation] [Efficiency]
Definition.zh:
佩戴[Talisman|魔符]时，可同时装备一把非[ItemRarity|传奇][Sceptre|权杖]
[Spirit|精魂]减少50%
非[Minion|召唤生物]技能的[Reservation|保留][Efficiency|效能]降低50%

Definition.en: All bonuses from [Equipped] Amulet apply to your [Minion|Minions] instead of you
Definition.zh: [Equipped|已装备]护身符的所有加成效果将提供给你的[Minion|召唤生物]，而不是你

Definition.en:
Can [Attack] as though using a [Quarterstaff] while both of your hand slots are empty
[UnarmedAttack|Unarmed Attacks] that would use an [Equipped] [Quarterstaff]'s damage have:
• Base [UnarmedDamage|Unarmed] [Physical] damage replaced with damage based on their Skill Level
• 1% more [Attack] Speed per 75 [ItemEvasion|Item Evasion] on [EquipArmour|Equipped Armour Items]
• +0.1% to [Critical|Critical Hit Chance] per 10 [ItemEnergyShield|Item Energy Shield] on [EquipArmour|Equipped Armour Items]
Definition.zh:
当你的双手装备栏为空时，可如同使用[Quarterstaff|节杖]般进行[Attack|攻击]
若[UnarmedAttack|徒手攻击]本应使用[Equipped|已装备][Quarterstaff|节杖]的伤害时，可改为：
• 基础[UnarmedDamage|徒手][Physical|物理]伤害替换为基于技能等级的伤害
• 每 75 点[EquipArmour|已装备护甲物品]上的[ItemEvasion|物品闪避]提供 1% [Attack|攻击]速度加成
• 每 10 点[EquipArmour|已装备护甲物品]上的[ItemEnergyShield|物品能量护盾]提供 +0.1% [Critical|暴击率]

Definition.en:
Maximum Life is 1
Immune to [Chaos] Damage and [Bleeding]
Definition.zh:
生命上限是 1
免疫[Chaos|混沌]伤害与[Bleeding|流血]效果

Definition.en: Martial Weapons can be used to [Attack]. [Axe|Axes], [Bow|Bows], [Claw|Claws], [Crossbow|Crossbows], [Dagger|Daggers], [Flail|Flails], [Mace|Maces], [Quarterstaff|Quarterstaves], [Spear|Spears], [Sword|Swords], and [Talisman|Talismans] are Martial Weapons.
Definition.zh: 战斗武器可以用于[Attack|攻击]。[Axe|斧类]、[Bow|弓类]、[Claw|爪类]、[Crossbow|战弩]、[Dagger|匕首]、[Flail|连枷]、[Mace|锤类]、[Quarterstaff|节杖]、[Spear|战矛]、[Sword|剑类]和[Talisman|魔符]武器都属于战斗武器。

Definition.en: Sacrificing is loss of a resource (commonly Life, Mana or [EnergyShield|Energy Shield]) that does not count as taking damage. You cannot Sacrifice a resource you do not have. Sacrificing Life cannot reduce you below 1 Life, but Sacrifices you cause on others (such as Sacrificing [Minion] Life) can lead to their death.
Definition.zh: 献祭是一种资源（通常为生命、魔力或[EnergyShield|能量护盾]）的损失方式，但不视作受到了伤害。你无法献祭自己并不拥有的资源。献祭生命不会使你自己的生命降低至 1 以下，但献祭其他目标时（例如献祭[Minion|召唤生物]的生命）可能会将其击败。

Definition.en: Travel Skills cover a large amount of distance without needing to target an enemy. If you have multiple Travel Skills with cooldowns, their cooldowns are shared.
Definition.zh: 旅行技能可以进行长距离穿梭，并且不需要指定一名敌人作为目标。若你拥有多个带冷却时间的旅行技能，则共享冷却时间。

Definition.en:
Life [LifeRecharge|Recharges] instead of [ESRecharge|Energy Shield]
50% less Life Recovery from [Flask|Flasks]
Definition.zh:
生命[LifeRecharge|充能]，而非[ESRecharge|能量护盾]
[Flask|药剂]的生命回复减少 50%

Definition.en:
Every Support Gem you have socketed will incur a cumulative [Attributes|Attribute] requirement, generally at a value of five of the relevant stat for each support gem used.

This [Attributes|Attribute] requirement is separate from that required by your Skill Gems and Equipment.
Definition.zh:
镶嵌的每一个辅助宝石都会提高[Attributes|属性]需求，每一个使用的辅助宝石通常会使相关属性的需求提高五点。

这一[Attributes|属性]需求独立于技能宝石和装备的需求。

Definition.en:
The Magnitudes of a [Buff] or [Debuff] are the values of the stats it applies to the target. A [Buff] or [Debuff] with higher magnitudes is more powerful.

Modifiers to the Magnitude of [Buff|Buffs] or [Debuff|Debuffs] come from whoever applies it and are multiplicative with modifiers to the [BuffEffect|Effect] the [Buff] or [Debuff] has on the target.
Definition.zh:
[Buff|增益]状态或[Debuff|减益]状态的强度是对目标产生效果的数值。[Buff|增益]状态或[Debuff|减益]状态的强度越高，效果就越是强大。

[Buff|增益]状态或[Debuff|减益]状态的强度词缀取决于施加这些效果的对象，可以与目标本身具有的[Buff|增益]状态或[Debuff|减益]状态[BuffEffect|效果]词缀按乘法叠加生效。

Definition.en: Modifiers to the Effect of [Buff|Buffs] or [Debuff|Debuffs] usually come from the target it affects and are multiplicative with modifiers to the [BuffMagnitude|Magnitudes] of the [Buff] or [Debuff], which come from its creator.
Definition.zh: 影响[Buff|增益]状态或[Debuff|减益]状态效果的词缀通常来自于受到影响的目标，可以和施加[Buff|增益]状态或[Debuff|减益]状态的对象所具有的[BuffMagnitude|强度]词缀按乘法叠加生效。

Definition.en:
Take 50% less damage over time if you've started taking damage over time in the past second
Take 50% more damage over time if you haven't started taking damage over time in the past second
Definition.zh:
若过去一秒内开始受到持续伤害，受到的持续伤害总降 50%
若过去一秒内未开始受到持续伤害，受到的持续伤害总增 50%

Definition.en:
Create [Lightning] [ElementalInfusion|Infusion] [Remnant|Remnants] instead of [Fire]
Create [Cold] [ElementalInfusion|Infusion] [Remnant|Remnants] instead of [Lightning]
Create [Fire] [ElementalInfusion|Infusion] [Remnant|Remnants] instead of [Cold]
Definition.zh:
生成[Lightning|闪电][ElementalInfusion|灌注][Remnant|残片]，取代[Fire|火焰]类型
生成[Cold|冰霜][ElementalInfusion|灌注][Remnant|残片]，取代[Lightning|闪电]类型
生成[Fire|火焰][ElementalInfusion|灌注][Remnant|残片]，取代[Cold|冰霜]类型

Definition.en:
Cannot use [Charm|Charms]
30% more Recovery from [Flask|Flasks]
Definition.zh:
无法使用[Charm|咒符]
[Flask|药剂]回复量总增 30%

Definition.en: Arcane Surge grants 15% increased Cast Speed and 20% more Mana Regeneration Rate.
Definition.zh: 秘术增强可以使施法速度提高 15%，魔力回复速度总增 20%。

Definition.en:
Arcane Surge grants 15% increased Cast Speed and 20% more Mana Regeneration Rate.
It lasts for 4 seconds by default.
Definition.zh:
秘术增强可以使施法速度提高 15%，魔力回复速度总增 20%。
默认情况下持续 4 秒。

Definition.en: Invoked Skills are those [Trigger|Triggered] by Invocation Skills.
Definition.zh: 祈唤技能是由咒祈技能[Trigger|触发]的技能。

Definition.en:
Meta Gems are Skill Gems that other Skill Gems can be socketed into. They can use, [Trigger], or otherwise apply the effects of those other Skill Gems. Skill Gems and [SupportGem|Support Gems] can be socketed into Meta Gems interchangeably, though most Meta Gems require at least one Skill Gem to be socketed to function.

Meta Gems can never be socketed into other Meta Gems.
Definition.zh:
非凡宝石是一种技能宝石，可以镶嵌其他技能宝石。非凡宝石能够使用、[Trigger|触发]或以其他方式应用所镶嵌技能宝石的效果。技能宝石和[SupportGem|辅助宝石]都可以镶嵌其中，但大部分非凡宝石都需要镶嵌至少一颗技能宝石才能发挥作用。

非凡宝石永远无法镶嵌到其他非凡宝石中。

Definition.en: Skills that meet this requirement use the term "Final Strike" to refer to the last strike of their sequence.
Definition.zh: 满足该需求的技能使用“绝杀打击”一词来表示其连续击中里的最后一次打击。

Definition.en:
Finality is a [Buff] that grants 100% increased [Critical|Critical Hit Chance] with [FinalStrike|Final Strikes], and makes your [Strike] skills skip to their [FinalStrike|Final Strike] if they have one.

Skills cannot gain [Combo] while you have Finality.
Definition.zh:
绝杀是一种[Buff|增益]状态，使你的[Final Strike|绝杀打击]获得 100% 增幅[Critical|暴击几率]，并使你的[Strike|打击]技能在有[Final Strike|绝杀打击]时直接跳至该击。

当你拥有绝杀时，技能无法获得[连击]。

Definition.en:
Corrupted Blood is a [Debuff] that deals [Physical] damage over time.
Up to 10 Corrupted Blood debuffs can be inflicted on each target.

Corrupted Blood is not [Bleeding] and is not affected by any stats related to [Bleeding].
Definition.zh:
腐化之血是一种[Debuff|减益状态]，能够持续造成[Physical|物理]伤害，每个目标可被施加最多 10 次腐化之血。

腐化之血不属于[Bleeding|流血]，不受[Bleeding|流血]相关属性的影响。

Definition.en:
[Bleeding] that has been Aggravated always treats the target as moving, which causes it to deal 100% extra damage.

Once a [Bleeding] [Debuff] has been Aggravated, it will remain Aggravated until its duration expires.

Each [Bleeding] [Debuff] can be Aggravated, or not, independently — one [Bleeding] [Debuff] being Aggravated does not mean other [Bleeding] [Debuff|Debuffs] on the target are also Aggravated, and Aggravating some or all of them will have no effect on new [Bleeding] [Debuff|Debuffs] applied afterwards. However, effects which Aggravate [Bleeding] on a target do so to all [Bleeding] [Debuff|Debuffs] currently on that target unless otherwise specified.
Definition.zh:
恶性的[Bleeding|流血]始终将目标视作正在移动，造成 100% 的额外伤害。

[Bleeding|流血][Debuff|减益状态]变为恶性之后，它将在持续期间始终维持恶性状态。

每个[Bleeding|流血][Debuff|减益状态]的恶性状态都是独立的，使一个[Bleeding|流血][Debuff|减益状态]变为恶性不代表目标身上的其他[Bleeding|流血][Debuff|减益状态]也会变为恶性，使部分或全部效果变为恶性也不会影响后续施加的[Bleeding|流血][Debuff|减益状态]。然而，除非另有说明，否则使[Bleeding|流血]变为恶性的效果会对目标当前所具有的所有[Bleeding|流血][Debuff|减益状态]生效。

Definition.en:
[Ignite] that has been Aggravated deals 100% extra damage.

Once an [Ignite] has been Aggravated, it will remain Aggravated until its duration expires.

Just like [Bleeding], each [Ignite] [Debuff] can be Aggravated, or not, independently of others on the target.
Definition.zh:
恶性的[Ignite|点燃]会造成 100% 的额外伤害。

[Ignite|点燃]变为恶性之后，它将在持续期间始终维持恶性状态。

和[Bleeding|流血]一样，目标身上的每个[Ignite|点燃][Debuff|减益状态]的恶性状态都是独立的。

Definition.en: Their modifiers to the amount they leech will not affect this amount; your modifiers have already applied to it.
Definition.zh: 友军的偷取量词缀不会影响该偷取量；你自己的相关词缀已经生效了。

Definition.en: This effect does not stack. Applying it again before the first expires will refresh the duration.
Definition.zh: 该效果无法叠加，在第一个效果结束前重复施加会刷新持续时间。

Definition.en:
Marks are a family of [Debuff|Debuffs] that apply powerful effects to a single enemy, usually for a limited duration. You can have multiple Marked enemies at once, but each individual enemy can only have a single Mark applied to them at once.

Marks can be [MarkActivate|Activated] when specific conditions occur, which will case some extra effect and then [Consume] the Mark.
Definition.zh:
印记是一类作用于单个敌人的[Debuff|减益状态]，通常施加强大的特定效果并持续有限时间。你可以同时对多个敌人添加印记，但每个敌人同一时间只能受到一种印记的影响。

当满足特定条件时，印记可被[MarkActivate|激活]，触发额外效果后，该印记将被[Consume|消耗]。

Definition.en:
Lost Life will start Recharging at a rate of 12.5% per second after a base delay of 4 seconds. Further loss of Life resets this delay, interrupting Recharge.
Modifiers to Energy Shield [ESRechargeRate|Recharge Rate] or to [FasterESRechargeStart|how fast it starts] will also apply to Life Recharge.
Definition.zh:
失去生命会在短暂的延迟后开始充能，每秒充能 12.5%，基础延迟为 4 秒。进一步失去生命会重置延迟时间，也会打断充能。
能量护盾[ESRechargeRate|充能速度]和[FasterESRechargeStart|充能开始速度加快]词缀也会对生命充能生效。

Definition.en: Lost [EnergyShield|Energy Shield] will start Recharging at a rate of 12.5% per second after a base delay of 4 seconds. Further loss of [EnergyShield|Energy Shield] resets this delay, interrupting Recharge.
Definition.zh: 失去[EnergyShield|能量护盾]会在短暂的延迟后开始充能，每秒充能 12.5%，基础延迟为 4 秒。进一步失去[EnergyShield|能量护盾]会重置延迟时间，也会打断充能。

Definition.en: Energy Shield will no longer protect you from Damage, unless that damage would be dealt to Mana.
Definition.zh: 能量护盾不再保护你免受伤害，除非该伤害会对魔力造成。

Definition.en:
Onslaught grants 20% increased [SkillSpeed|Skill Speed] and 10% increased movement speed.
Unless specified, Onslaught lasts 4 seconds.
Definition.zh:
猛攻使你的[SkillSpeed|技能速度]加快 20%，移动速度加快 10%。
除非另有说明，猛攻持续 4 秒。

Definition.en: Druidic Prowess is a stacking [Buff] which grants 10% increased [SkillSpeed|Skill Speed] and causes [HitDamage|Hits] with [Spell] Damage to grant 3 [Rage] per stack for 10 seconds. Each stack has an independent duration. Maximum 3 stacks.
Definition.zh: 德鲁伊之威是一种可叠加的[Buff|增益状态]，每层叠加会使[SkillSpeed|技能速度]提升 10%，使用[Spell|法术]伤害[HitDamage|击中]时获得 3 点[Rage|怒气]，持续 10 秒。每层叠加具有独立的持续时间。最大可叠加 3 层。

Definition.en:
Each Fear Incarnate grants 10% increased [CullingStrike|Culling Strike] Threshold and lasts 10 seconds. This duration is refreshed when you gain another Fear Incarnate.

You can have up to a maximum of 20 Fear Incarnate.
Definition.zh:
每层恐惧化身使你的[CullingStrike|终结]阈值提高 10%，持续 10 秒。当你获得另一层恐惧化身时，此持续时间会刷新。

你最多可拥有 20 层恐惧化身。

Definition.en:
Each Fear Overwhelming grants 5% increased Area of Effect for [Attack] Skills and lasts 10 seconds. This duration is refreshed when you gain another Fear Overwhelming.

You can have up to a maximum of 20 Fear Overwhelming.
Definition.zh:
每层恐惧侵袭使[Attack|攻击]技能的效果区域提高 5%，持续 10 秒。当你获得另一层恐惧侵袭时，此持续时间会刷新。

你最多可拥有 20 层恐惧侵袭。

Definition.en:
Checkpoints are a form of saving your progress through Wraeclast and will often appear before Boss fights and at points of interest. Reaching a Checkpoint will refill your Life, Mana, [Flask|Flasks] and [Charm|Charms].

On death, you can choose to revive either in Town or at the last Checkpoint you reached. For this purpose, [Waypoint|Waypoints] also function as Checkpoints.

You can also teleport between Checkpoints within an area, or from a Checkpoint to the Waypoint.
Definition.zh:
记录点能够保存你在瓦尔克拉斯的冒险进度，通常会出现在首领战前和关键地点。抵达记录点会补满你的生命、魔力、[Flask|药剂]和[Charm|咒符]。

被击败后，你可以选择在城镇复活，或者在最后抵达的记录点处复活。因此，[Waypoint|传送点]也可以作为记录点使用。

你还可以在同一区域内的记录点之间或记录点与传送点之间传送。

Definition.en: Once all Checkpoints have been activated and the Map is completed, all remaining unfinished map content will be revealed on the minimap.
Definition.zh: 当所有记录点被激活，地图完成时，地图内所有剩余的未完成内容会在小地图上显示。

Definition.en: Waypoints are a form of saving your progress through Wraeclast. Most areas (though not all) will have one, and they can be used to quickly travel from area to area. Reaching a Waypoint will refill your Life, Mana, [Flask|Flasks] and [Charm|Charms].
Definition.zh: 传送点能够保存你在瓦尔克拉斯的冒险进度，大部分区域（但并非所有区域）都有一个传送点，可以用于在不同的区域之间快速往返。抵达传送点会补满你的生命、魔力、[Flask|药剂]和[Charm|咒符]。

Definition.en: A higher Elemental Ailment Threshold makes it less likely that being [HitDamage|Hit] by [ElementalDamage|Elemental Damage] will apply the relevant [ElementalAilments|Ailment], as well as lowering the amount of [Freeze] and [Electrocute] buildup recieved. A lower Elemental Ailment Threshold makes it more likely, and increases buildup of [Freeze] and [Electrocute] recieved. By default a player's Ailment Threshold is equal to half their Life.
Definition.zh: 较高的元素异常状态阈值能够使你被[ElementalDamage|元素伤害][HitDamage|击中]时不太容易受到相应的[ElementalAilments|异常状态]影响，也会降低受到的[Freeze|冻结]和[Electrocute|触电]积蓄值。较低的元素异常状态阈值会使你更容易受到它们的影响，并提高受到的[Freeze|冻结]和[Electrocute|触电]积蓄值。在默认情况下，玩家的异常状态阈值等于其生命的一半。

Definition.en: The default maximum for [ElementalDamage|Elemental] or [Chaos|Chaos] resistances is 75%. Maximum resistances cannot be raised above 90%.
Definition.zh: [ElementalDamage|元素]和[Chaos|混沌]抗性的默认上限为 75%。抗性上限不能超过 90%。

Definition.en:
Gain [Charges|Power Charges] instead of [Charges|Frenzy Charges]
Gain [Charges|Frenzy Charges] instead of [Charges|Endurance Charges]
Gain [Charges|Endurance Charges] instead of [Charges|Power Charges]
Definition.zh:
获得狂怒[Charges|球]时改为获得[Charges|暴击球]
获得[Charges|耐力球]时改为获得[Charges|狂怒球]
获得[Charges|暴击球]时改为获得[Charges|耐力球]

Definition.en: Sustained skills cause a large number of [HitDamage|Hits] over a period of time. They roll for [Critical|Critical Hits] independently each time they damage enemies, rather than rolling once for the entire skill as other skills do.
Definition.zh: 持续性技能会在一定时间里造成多次[HitDamage|击中]，每次对敌人造成伤害时都会独立结算[Critical|暴击]，而非和其他技能一样仅结算一次。

Definition.en:
Some skills and effects have a chance to apply Daze to enemies on [HitDamage|Hit].

Daze lasts for 8 seconds, and a Dazed enemy will take 50% more [Stun|Stun Buildup]. There are also a number of Skills, Effects, and other mechanics which interact with Daze for various benefits.
Definition.zh:
部分技能和效果有几率在[HitDamage|击中]敌人时施加恍惚。

恍惚持续 8 秒，恍惚的敌人受到的[Stun|晕眩积蓄]总增 50%。一些技能、效果和其他机制也能与恍惚互动，产生多样的效果。

Definition.en:
Combo is a counter on some Skills that can be required to use the Skill or grant extra effects. Skills gain Combo when you [Strike] Enemies. Combo will fall off after a short time without this happening.

Combo can only be built while using the same weapon as the Combo Skill is bound to, and will be lost if you [WeaponSets|Swap Weapons].
Definition.zh:
连击是某些技能上的计数器，可用于要求达到一定连击数才能使用技能，或赋予额外效果。当你[Strike|打击]敌人时，技能会获得连击。若在一小段时间内未发生打击，连击数将逐渐衰减。

连击只能在使用与连击技能所绑定的相同武器时积累，若你[WeaponSets|切换武器]，连击将会丢失。

Term.zh: 召唤生物的死亡和击败

Definition.en: [Minion|Minions] whose durations expire or that are despawned by the player are considered to have died. However, effects that state they trigger when a [Minion] is Killed do not trigger in these cases. [Minion|Minions] are only Killed if they reach 0 life, though this can be caused by their summoner as well as enemies.
Definition.zh: 持续时间结束或被玩家取消的[Minion|召唤生物]会视作死亡，但[Minion|召唤生物]被击败时触发的效果无法在此时生效。[Minion|召唤生物]只有生命降低至 0 才会视作被击败，但可以由敌人或召唤师造成。

Definition.en: You are Surrounded if there are at least 5 enemies within 3 metres of you. The number of enemies required to be Surrounded cannot be reduced below 1.
Definition.zh: 当你的 3 米范围内存在至少 5 个敌人时，你视作被包围。触发该效果所需的敌人数量无法被降低至1以下。

Definition.en: Reservation effects prevent a portion of a given resource — usually [Spirit], though it can also be Life or Mana — from being used for other purposes while active. Reserving a resource does not change the maximum value of that resource.
Definition.zh: 保留效果激活时会使特定资源的一部分无法使用。该资源通常为[Spirit|精魂]，但也可以是生命或魔力。保留一种资源并不会改变资源的上限数值。

Definition.en: You are on Low Infernal Flame if you have 35% of your maximum Infernal Flame or less.
Definition.zh: 如果你的地狱烈焰达到或低于地狱烈焰上限的 35%，便处于低地狱烈焰状态。

Definition.en:
Dodge Roll cannot Avoid Damage
Take 30% less [HitDamage|Damage from Hits] while Dodge Rolling
Definition.zh:
闪避翻滚无法避免伤害
闪避翻滚时受到的[HitDamage|击中伤害]总降 30%

Definition.en:
Damage can be converted from one type to another. This causes it to deal the new damage type, scale with modifiers to the new damage type, and no longer scale with modifiers to the old damage type.

For example, [Fire] damage converted to [Lightning] now scales with [Lightning] damage modifiers and causes [Shock], but no longer scales with [Fire] damage modifiers or causes [Ignite].

Conversion is a two step process. Conversion inherent to Skills occurs first, then Conversion from all other sources. Damage over time cannot be converted.
Definition.zh:
伤害可以转化为不同的类型，使其造成新类型的伤害，受到新伤害类型词缀的调整，不再受到旧伤害类型词缀的影响。

例如，[Fire|火焰伤害]转化为[Lightning|闪电]后，就可以受到[Lightning|闪电]伤害词缀的影响，也可以造成[Shock|感电]，但不再受到[Fire|火焰]伤害词缀的影响，也无法造成[Ignite|点燃]。

转化过程分为两步。技能本身的转化效果最先结算，随后再结算其他来源的转化效果。持续伤害无法被转化。

Term.zh: 获得 X 的额外伤害

Definition.en:
Damage gained as a specific damage type only scales with modifiers to the new type, not with modifiers to the source damage's type (unless they're the same type). 

For example, [Lightning] damage gained from [Physical] damage scales with [Lightning] damage modifiers, but not [Physical] damage modifiers.

Damage Gain occurs in the same two step process as [Conversion|Damage Conversion]. Damage over time cannot benefit from damage Gain.
Definition.zh:
获得特定伤害类型的伤害，该伤害仅能受到新伤害类型词缀的调整，不受源伤害类型词缀的调整（除非两者为相同类型）。

例如，[Physical|物理]伤害获得的[Lightning|闪电]伤害会受到[Lightning|闪电]伤害词缀的影响，不受[Physical|物理]伤害词缀的影响。

获得伤害的过程分为两步，与[Conversion|转化]相同。持续伤害不受获得伤害的影响。

Definition.en: Tailwind is a stacking [Buff] which grants 1% increased movement speed, 2% increased [SkillSpeed|Skill Speed], 10% increased [Evasion] Rating and prevent 1% of Damage from [Deflect|Deflected] [HitDamage|Hits] per stack. Maximum 10 stacks.
Definition.zh: 提速尾流是可叠加的[Buff|增益]状态，每层提高 1% 移动速度，2% [SkillSpeed|技能速度]，10% [Evasion|闪避]值，防止 1% 来自[Deflect|偏转]的[HitDamage|击中]的伤害。最多可叠加 10 层。

Definition.en: Jade is a stacking [Buff] which grants 1% additional Physical Damage Reduction per stack. Maximum of 10 Jade stacks.
Definition.zh: 青玉护身是可叠加的[Buff|增益状态]，每层提供 1% 的额外物理伤害减免。最多可叠加 10 层青玉护身。

Definition.en: Enemies have less [CooldownRecovery|Cooldown Recovery Rate] the lower their Concentration, scaling down to 50% less [CooldownRecovery|Cooldown Recovery Rate] when Concentration is 0%.
Definition.zh: 敌人的专注越低，他们的[CooldownRecovery|冷却回复速度]就越低。专注为 0% 时，[CooldownRecovery|冷却回复速度]最多总降 50%。

Definition.en:
Flames of Chayula are [Remnant|Remnants] that grant the following bonuses when collected:
Red Flames of Chayula [LifeLeech|Leech] 20% of your maximum Life to you
Blue Flames of Chayula [ManaLeech|Leech] 20% of your maximum Mana to you
Purple Flames of Chayula provide a stacking [Buff] granting 7% of damage as extra [Chaos] damage for 8 seconds, and stacks up to 10 times.
Definition.zh:
夏乌拉之焰属于[Remnant|残片]，收集可获得以下加成：
红色夏乌拉之焰使你获得相当于生命上限 20% 的[LifeLeech|偷取]生命
蓝色夏乌拉之焰使你获得相当于魔力上限 20% 的[ManaLeech|偷取]魔力
紫色夏乌拉之焰使你获得可叠加的[Buff|增益]效果，获得 7% 伤害的额外[Chaos|混沌]伤害，持续 8 秒，可以叠加最多 10 次。

Definition.en:
Ancient Blooms are [Remnant|Remnants] that grant the following bonuses when collected:
Vivid Blooms grant 5 Charges to all of your [Charm|Charms]
Primal Blooms grant 5 Charges to all of your Mana [Flask|Flasks]
Wild Blooms grant 5 Charges to all of your Life [Flask|Flasks]
Definition.zh:
远古之花属于[Remnant|残片]，收集可获得以下加成：
鲜活之花使你的所有[Charm|咒符]获得 5 点充能
原初之花使你的所有魔力[Flask|药剂]获得 5 点充能
狂野之花使你的所有生命[Flask|药剂]获得 5 点充能

Definition.en: Red Flames of Chayula [LifeLeech|Leech] 20% of your maximum Life to you to when collected.
Definition.zh: 收集红色夏乌拉之焰时为你[LifeLeech|偷取]生命上限的 20%。

Definition.en: Blue Flames of Chayula [ManaLeech|Leech] 20% of your maximum Mana to you when collected.
Definition.zh: 收集蓝色夏乌拉之焰时为你[ManaLeech|偷取]魔力上限的 20%。

Definition.en: Small Passive Skills are Passives that are not Notables, Keystones, Ascendancy Passive Skills or Passive Skills where you can select an [Attributes|Attribute].
Definition.zh: 除了核心天赋、基石天赋、升华天赋，以及能够选择[Attributes|属性]的天赋，其他天赋都属于小型天赋。

Definition.en:
Valour is used to fuel Banner Skills. Killing an enemy with an [Attack] generates 1 Valour, and Banners passively gain 1 Valour per second while a [Rarity|Unique] enemy is in your [Presence]. You can only gain Valour once every 0.5 seconds, and a Banner skill cannot gain Valour while its Banner is placed.

Each Banner has 50 maximum Valour by default. If you have multiple Banner skills active, each gains Valour separately.
Definition.zh:
胆魄是用于维持旗帜技能的资源。使用[Attack|攻击]击败敌人能够获得 1 点胆魄。有[Rarity|传奇]敌人[Presence|在场]时，旗帜技能每秒被动获得 1 点胆魄。你每 0.5 秒只能获得一次胆魄，并且旗帜技能在放置旗帜时无法获得胆魄。

每个旗帜默认的胆魄上限为 50 点。如果你同时激活了多个旗帜技能，每个旗帜技能会单独计算胆魄。

Definition.en: Intimidate is a [Debuff] that inflicts 10% increased damage taken and 10% reduced damage dealt.
Definition.zh: 威吓是一种[Debuff|减益]状态，使受到的伤害提高 10%，造成的伤害降低 10%。

Definition.en: Ballistas are a type of [Totem] that use [Projectile] [Attack|Attacks].
Definition.zh: 弩炮是一种使用[Projectile|投射物][Attack|攻击]的[Totem|图腾]。

Definition.en: Soul Cores are artifacts of the ancient Vaal empire and function as a type of [Augment].
Definition.zh: 灵核是古代瓦尔帝国的遗物，其功能相当于一种[Augment|增幅器]。

Definition.en: Abyssal Eyes are artifacts recovered from Abyssals which function as a type of [Augment].
Definition.zh: 深渊之眼是从深渊生物身上回收的遗物，其功能相当于一种[Augment|增幅器]。

Definition.en: Runes are [Augment|Augments] of Kalguuran origin and make.
Definition.zh: 符文是卡古兰文明所制的[Augment|增幅器]。

Definition.en: Idols are a type of [Augment|Augment] fashioned by the Azmeri.
Definition.zh: 雕像是由阿兹莫里人所制作的一种[Augment|增幅器]。

Definition.en:
Honour is an additional resource you have to manage within the Trial of the Sekhemas. A percentage of the damage you take from enemies in the Trial will be taken from your Honour. If your Honour reaches zero then the Trial is failed.

Your starting and maximum Honour are the sum of your maximum Life, [EnergyShield|Energy Shield] and [Ward|Runic Ward]. Your maximum Mana is also added if you have [passive_keystone_mind_over_matter|Mind Over Matter].
Definition.zh:
荣誉是丝克玛试炼中需要精心管控的额外资源。在试炼中受到敌人造成的伤害时，一部分伤害会从荣誉中扣除。如果荣誉降低至零，则试炼失败。

你的起始荣耀值与最大荣耀值等于你的最大生命值、[EnergyShield|能量护盾]和[Ward|符文结界]的总和。若你还拥有[passive_keystone_mind_over_matter|心灵升华]天赋，则还需加上你的最大魔力值。

Definition.en: [Shock] and [Electrocute] are Lightning [Ailments].
Definition.zh: 闪电[Ailments|异常状态]包括了[Shock|感电]和[Electrocute|触电]。

Definition.en: This additional use time is fixed and will not be modified by skill use speed stats.
Definition.zh: 附加的额外使用时间为固定时间，不受技能使用速度属性的影响。

Definition.en:
Enemies covered in Oil have their movement speed [Slow|Slowed], are inflicted with [Exposure] and have 200% more [BuffMagnitude|Magnitude] of [Flammability] inflicted on them.

[IgnitedGround|Ignited Ground] or [Detonator] Skills will [Ignite] Oil-covered enemies. This removes the Oil, but the [Exposure] will remain for the duration of that [Ignite].
Definition.zh:
黏油缠身的敌人的移动速度[Slow|减慢]，受到[Exposure|曝露]，并且被施加的[Flammability|易燃][BuffMagnitude|强度]提升 200%。

[IgnitedGround|点燃地面]或[Detonator|引爆]技能会[Ignite|点燃]黏油缠身的敌人。这会移除黏油，但[Exposure|曝露]效果将在[Ignite|点燃]期间持续存在。

Definition.en:
Enemies standing in Oil Ground have their movement speed [Slow|Slowed] and are inflicted with [Exposure].

[Ignite|Ignited] enemies, [IgnitedGround|Ignited Ground], or [Detonator] Skills that touch the Oil cause it to catch fire, [Ignite|Igniting] enemies instead of [Slow|Slowing] them, but still inflicting the [Exposure].
Definition.zh:
位于黏油地面中的敌人的移动速度[Slow|减慢]，并受到[Exposure|曝露]。

[Ignite|被点燃]的敌人、[IgnitedGround|点燃地面]或[Detonator|引爆]技能触及黏油时将引燃地面，进而[Ignite|点燃]其中的敌人，这不会使敌人[Slow|减速]，但依然会造成[Exposure|曝露]。

Definition.en: The Total value of a stat is the value after all calculations have been performed. Modifiers to the Total value apply after all other modifiers.
Definition.zh: 总属性值是完成全部结算后的属性数值。作用于总属性值的词缀会在其他所有词缀计算完毕后计算。

Definition.en: Adding to the Total value of a stat occurs after all other calculations have been performed. This means that the added value does not benefit from percentage modifiers to the stat.
Definition.zh: 附加至总属性会在完成其他所有结算后，附加至最终的属性总值中。这意味着附加值不会受到该属性百分比词缀影响。

Definition.en:
Charms are protective trinkets you can equip that automatically trigger a defensive effect when a specific condition is met. Similar to [Flask|Flasks], Charms require charges to trigger. Charm charges can be regained by killing monsters, granting charges equal to half of the monster's [Power]. [Checkpoint|Checkpoints] and [Wells] completely recharge Charms when activated.

The maximum number of Charm slots is capped at 3.
Definition.zh:
咒符是一种防御性饰品，装备后能够在满足特定条件时自动触发防御效果。咒符类似于[Flask|药剂]，需要充能才能触发。咒符充能可以通过击败怪物获得，充能量相当于怪物[Power|威力值]的一半。[Checkpoint|记录点]和[Wells|水井]在激活时能够完全补满咒符。

咒符栏位最多 3 个。

Definition.en:
Excess Life Recovery from Regeneration is applied to [EnergyShield|Energy Shield].
[EnergyShield|Energy Shield] does not Recharge.
Definition.zh:
再生的溢出生命回复会作用于[EnergyShield|能量护盾]。
[EnergyShield|能量护盾]无法充能。

Definition.en: [Chill|Chilling], [Shock|Shocking], or [Ignite|Igniting] Enemies grants 1 Unbound Fury. [Freeze|Freezing] or [Electrocute|Electrocuting] Enemies grants 6 Unbound Fury.
Definition.zh: 使敌人[Chill|冰缓]、[Shock|感电]或[Ignite|点燃]可获得 1 点不羁狂怒。使敌人[Freeze|冻结]或[Electrocute|触电]可获得 6 点不羁狂怒。

Definition.en:
Converting stat A to stat B applies the base value of stat A to stat B instead. The converted stat scales with percentage modifiers to stat B, but not with percentage modifiers to stat A.

For example, if you converted your [Evasion] to [Armour], the converted portion would be scaled by percentage modifiers to [Armour], but percentage modifiers to [Evasion] would have no effect.
Definition.zh:
将 A 属性转化为 B 属性时，属性 A 的数值将改为对属性 B 生效。转化后的属性会根据属性 B 的百分比词缀而调整，但不再受到属性 A 的百分比词缀影响。

例如，如果你将[Evasion|闪避]转化成了[Armour|护甲]，则转化的那一部分属性会受到[Armour|护甲]百分比词缀的影响，而[Evasion|闪避]的百分比词缀不会对其生效。

Definition.en: Life Loss is not damage, and can't be mitigated or absorbed by [EnergyShield|Energy Shield]. Life Loss can still kill you.
Definition.zh: 生命损失不属于伤害，无法减免或被[EnergyShield|能量护盾]吸收。不过生命损失依然能够令你败北。

Term.zh: 获得相当于其他属性的属性

Definition.en:
Gaining a percentage of stat A as stat B is calculated from the base value of stat A. The portion gained scales with percentage modifiers to stat B, but not with percentage modifiers to stat A.

For example, if you gained 50% of [Evasion] as [Armour], the portion gained would be scaled by percentage modifiers to [Armour], but not by percentage modifiers to [Evasion].
Definition.zh:
获得相当于属性 A 一定比例的属性 B 时，会根据属性 A 的基础数值进行计算。获得的这部分属性会根据属性 B 的百分比词缀而调整，但不再受到属性 A 的百分比词缀影响。

例如，如果你获得了相当于[Evasion|闪避] 50% 的[Armour|护甲]，获得的这部分属性会受到[Armour|护甲]百分比词缀的影响，而[Evasion|闪避]的百分比词缀不会对其生效。

Definition.en: Recovery which Overflows its maximum can be recovered up to 1.5 times that maximum.
Definition.zh: 溢出上限的回复最多可以回复到上限的 1.5 倍。

Definition.en: Some [Minion|Minions] can be Commanded to perform certain actions. This requires you to use the corresponding Command skill, which will cause one of your [Minion|Minions] to carry out the Command.
Definition.zh: 一些[Minion|召唤生物]可以接受命令，从而执行特定的行动。你需要使用对应的命令技能，使一个[Minion|召唤生物]来执行命令。

Definition.en:
Difficulty causes monsters to have increased damage and life, as well as improving the items they drop.

Certain Bosses with increased difficulty will gain new abilities and begin to drop exclusive items, and have a reduced number of [LimitedRespawn|Respawn Attempts].

Difficulty above 4 has no additional effect.
Definition.zh:
难度会提高怪物的伤害和生命，并使他们掉落更好的物品。

部分首领会在高难度下获得全新的技能，也会开始掉落专属物品，同时降低玩家的[LimitedRespawn|复活]次数。

高于 4 级的难度不产生额外效果。

Definition.en:
Most endgame content allows for a limited number of deaths before you can no longer access the area. Most areas allow unlimited leaving and re-entry for other reasons except while fighting a boss.

On death during a boss fight, the [MapOwner|Map Owner] may respawn all players into a new instance of the area to attempt the boss fight again.

The number of modifiers on a [Waystone] will reduce the number of Revivals available allowed when opening a Map.
Definition.zh:
多数终局内容会限制玩家可被击败的次数。次数耗尽后，你将无法继续进入区域。多数区域在非首领战期间允许自由进出。

在首领战中被击败时，[MapOwner|地图拥有者]可以将所有玩家重生到该区域的新副本中，重新尝试首领战。

[Waystone|引路石]上的词缀数量将减少开启地图时可用的复活次数。

Definition.en:
Endgame Maps each contain a Map Boss. These Map Bosses are Unique Monsters that have special mechanics and drop increased rewards.

Defeating the Map Boss will complete the Map.
Definition.zh:
终局地图都包含一个地图首领。这些地图首领是传奇怪物，具有特殊机制并掉落增加的奖励。

击败地图首领将直接完成该地图。

Definition.en:
Powerful Map Bosses are [MapBoss|Map Bosses] that are even more difficult and drop even better rewards.

Powerful Map Bosses frequently drop [Waystone|Waystones] one Tier higher.
Definition.zh:
强力地图首领是难度更高的[MapBoss|地图首领]，会掉落更好的奖励。

强力地图首领经常掉落比当前层级更高一层的[Waystone|引路石]。

Definition.en: Empowering a [MapBoss|Map Boss] upgrades it to a [PowerfulMapBoss|Powerful Map Boss]
Definition.zh: 强化一个[MapBoss|地图首领]会将其升级为[PowerfulMapBoss|危险的地图首领]。

Definition.en: This [Debuff|Debuff] causes you take 10% increased damage and have 10% reduced Light Radius for 10 seconds per stack.
Definition.zh: 该[Debuff|减益]状态每层使你受到的伤害提高 10%，照亮范围缩小 10%，持续 10 秒。

Definition.en:
The higher toughness a monster has, the less damage it takes. A monster with 100% increased toughness takes 50% less damage, a monster with 200% increased toughness takes 67% less damage, and so on. 

Negative toughness instead causes the monster to take more damage. A monster with 100% reduced toughness takes 100% more damage, a monster with 200% reduced toughness takes 200% more damage, and so on. 

Effectively, each 100% of toughness halves the damage a monster takes, and each -100% toughness doubles the damage a monster takes.
Definition.zh:
怪物的韧性越高，受到的伤害越低。韧性提高 100% 的怪物受到的伤害总降 50%，提高 200% 的怪物受到的伤害总降 67%，以此类推。

负韧性则会导致怪物受到更多伤害。韧性降低 100% 的怪物受到伤害提高 100%，韧性降低 200% 的怪物受到伤害提高 200%，以此类推。

简言之，每 100% 的韧性会使怪物受到的伤害减半，而每 -100% 的韧性则会使怪物受到的伤害加倍。

Definition.en:
Spreading an ailment inflicts a new, matching ailment on another target, from the same source. The new ailment can potentially spread further, but never back to the same target twice.

Ailments can never spread to, or from, the entity that originally inflicted them.
Definition.zh:
扩散异常状态会在其他目标身上施加一个对应的、全新的异常状态，并视作同一个来源。新的异常状态可以继续扩散，但永远无法扩散到同一个目标身上多次。

异常状态永远无法扩散至最初施加它们的实体，也无法从该实体扩散出去。

Definition.en: 25% more [SkillSpeed|Skill Speed] while Off Hand is empty and you have a [One-Handed] [MartialWeapon|Martial Weapon] equipped in your Main Hand.
Definition.zh: 副手为空，且主手装备一把[One-Handed|单手][MartialWeapon|战斗武器]时，[SkillSpeed|技能速度]总增 25%。

Definition.en:
By default, specific [Ailments] are calculated based on only specific [DamageTypes|damage types], such as only the [Fire] damage of a [HitDamage|Hit] mattering when inflicting [Ignite].

Allowing another damage type to contribute to an [Ailments|Ailment] means that all damage of the relevant types is summed when performing calculations for that [Ailments|Ailment].

For [Ailments] that use [HitDamage|Hit] damage to determine [Ailments|Ailment] chance or buildup, this means that the damage type becomes capable of inflicting that [Ailments|Ailment]. For [Ailments] that only use [HitDamage|Hit] damage to determine [Ailments|Ailment] [BuffMagnitude|Magnitude] (i.e. [Bleeding] and [Poison]), you still need a way to apply those [Ailments] (e.g. a source of [Bleeding] or [Poison] chance).
Definition.zh:
在默认情况下，只有特定的[DamageTypes|伤害类型]才能计入特定的[Ailments|异常状态]。例如在一次[HitDamage|击中]里，只有[Fire|火焰]伤害的部分与[Ignite|点燃]相关。

如果允许其他伤害类型作用于[Ailments|异常状态]，则在计算该类[Ailments|异常状态]时，会将所有相关的伤害类型加总结算。

如果某种[Ailments|异常状态]会使用[HitDamage|击中]伤害来确定[Ailments|异常状态]几率或积蓄值，则这些伤害类型都可以施加对应的[Ailments|异常状态]。如果某种[Ailments|异常状态]仅使用[HitDamage|击中]伤害来确定[Ailments|异常状态]的[BuffMagnitude|强度]（例如[Bleeding|流血]和[Poison|中毒]），则你依然需要想办法来施加这些[Ailments|异常状态]（即需要获得[Bleeding|流血]和[Poison|中毒]几率）。

Definition.en: Weapon Set Passive Skill Points can be allocated differently in each of your Weapon Set Passive Trees, including your default Passive Tree.
Definition.zh: 武器组天赋点可以在每一个武器组天赋树中以不同方式配置，也可以配置在默认天赋树里。

Definition.en: Certain Skills which create Areas of Effect on the ground create Runic Inscriptions when doing so. Various effects such as Support Gems and Unique Items can interact with these Inscriptions to cause many different effects.
Definition.zh: 部分在地上产生范围效果的技能可以在生效时产生符刻铭文。许多效果，例如辅助宝石和传奇物品，都可以与铭文互动，并产生五花八门的效果。

Definition.en:
Each Runic Binding grants 10% reduced [Spell] Damage and 2% reduced Skill cost [Efficiency]. You can have up to 10 Runic Bindings. Runic Bindings last for 10 seconds.

Runic Bindings cannot be gained while [Shapeshift|Shapeshifted].
Definition.zh:
每层符文咒缚使你承受的[Spell|法术]伤害降低 10%，并使技能消耗[Efficiency|效能]降低 2%。你最多可拥有 10 层符文咒缚。符文束缚持续 10 秒。

[Shapeshift|变形]状态下无法获得符文咒缚。

Definition.en:
Each Unbound Potential grants 20% increased Damage, 10% increased [Armour], and 10% increased [EnergyShield|Energy Shield]. You can have up to 10 Unbound Potential, and will lose one every 5 seconds.

Lose all Unbound Potential when you [Shapeshift] into a Human.
Definition.zh:
每层潜能释放使你的伤害提高 20%，[Armour|护甲]和[EnergyShield|能量护盾]提高 10%。你最多可拥有 10 层潜能释放，且每 5 秒会失去一层。

当你[Shapeshift|变形]为人形时，将失去所有潜能释放。

Definition.en: Offering Skills target an active Skeleton [Minion] to create an Offering Spike. Offering Spikes grant various [Buff|Buffs] to you or your [Minion|Minions], and can even directly damage Enemies. Offering Skills are themselves damageable [Minion|Minions] and their [Buff|Buffs] are lost if they die.
Definition.zh: 奉献技能需要以一个激活的魔侍[Minion|召唤生物]为目标，产生一根奉献尖刺。奉献尖刺会为你和[Minion|召唤生物]提供多种[Buff|增益]状态，甚至可以直接对敌人造成伤害。奉献技能本身也属于[Minion|召唤生物]，可以受到伤害，并且被击败时会失去[Buff|增益]状态。

Definition.en: Payoff Skills have powerful extra affects when [HitDamage|Hitting] enemies inflicted with specific [Debuff|Debuffs], often [Consume|Consuming] the [Debuff] in the process. Payoff Skills cannot inflict the [Debuff] they interact with.
Definition.zh: 清算技能[HitDamage|击中]敌人时，如果敌人受到特定[Debuff|减益状态]影响，就可以产生强大的额外效果，通常也会[Consume|消耗][Debuff|减益]状态。清算技能本身无法造成与其互动的[Debuff|减益状态]。

Definition.en:
Grenade Skills are only usable when wielding a [Crossbow]. They have cooldowns, but generally deliver high damage or powerful utility.

Grenade Skills have a fuse duration and will generally not explode until the fuse has expired, so they are strongest when you aim carefully and predict enemy movements.

Grenades cannot [Fork] or [Chain].
Definition.zh:
榴弹技能只能在装备[Crossbow|战弩]时使用。这类技能具有冷却时间，通常可以造成高额的伤害，或产生强力的功能效果。

榴弹技能具有引线持续时间，通常只会在引线燃尽后爆炸，需要仔细瞄准并预判敌人的行动，才能发挥出最强的效果。

榴弹无法[Fork|分叉]或[Chain|连锁]。

Definition.en: Increasing your Stun Recovery causes you to recover more quickly from being [Stun|Stunned].
Definition.zh: 提高晕眩回复可以让你在[Stun|晕眩]之后更快回复。

Definition.en:
Grasping Vines is a stacking [Debuff] that [Slow|Slows] character movement speed by 8% for each stack applied.
Moving will gradually remove stacks of Grasping Vines.
Definition.zh:
缓速藤蔓是可叠加的[Debuff|减益状态]，每层使角色的移动速度[Slow|减慢] 8%。
移动会逐渐移除缓速藤蔓的层数。

Definition.en: Enraged is a [Buff] that grants 25% [Toughness] and 25% increased damage.
Definition.zh: 狂暴[Buff|增益状态]可以使[Toughness|韧性]提高 25%，伤害提高 25%。

Definition.en: Volatiles are homing orbs which move towards a target before exploding after a duration or when they get close enough, dealing damage in a larger area.
Definition.zh: 无常是一种追踪法球，能够向一个目标移动，并在一段时间后或接近目标时爆炸，在较大的范围内造成伤害。

Definition.en: Petrify is a [Debuff] which causes targets to become covered in stone and unable to move or act.
Definition.zh: 石化[Debuff|减益状态]能够使目标化作岩石，无法移动或行动。

Definition.en: Each Explosive Rhythm [Buff] grants 10% increased [CooldownRecovery|Cooldown Recovery Rate] to your [Grenade] Skills.
Definition.zh: 每层[Explosive Rhythm|爆破韵律][Buff|增益状态]能使你的[Grenade|榴弹]技能的[CooldownRecovery|冷却回复速度]提高 10%。

Definition.en:
Explosive Fervour is a [Buff] that grants 15% increased Attack Speed per different [Grenade] Skill you've used [Recently], causes [Grenade] Skills to ignore their cooldown and fire an additional projectile, and makes [Grenade|Grenades] explode on any impact.

You cannot gain [ExplosiveRhythm|Explosive Rhythm] while you have Explosive Fervour.
Definition.zh:
爆破热忱是一种[Buff|增益状态]，根据你[Recently|近期]使用过的每种不同[Grenade|榴弹]技能，每种使攻击速度提高 15%，使[Grenade|榴弹]技能无视冷却时间并额外发射一枚投射物，并且使[Grenade|榴弹]在受到任意撞击时都会爆炸。

当你拥有爆破热忱时，你无法获得[ExplosiveRhythm|爆破韵律]。

Definition.en:
Augments are items which can be placed into Augment sockets, usually on [Equipment] items. Once socketed, they can be replaced by other Augments, but cannot be removed by normal means. 

The types of [Equipment] which an Augment can be placed into and the corresponding benefit provided are listed on the item.
Definition.zh:
增幅器是可嵌入增幅器插槽的物品，通常在[Equipment|装备]物品上。一旦镶嵌，虽可被其他增幅器替换，但无法通过常规方式移除。

增幅器可嵌入的[Equipment|装备]类型及其对应增益已在物品描述中列明。

Definition.en:
Gain no inherent bonus from [Strength]
1% increased [EnergyShield|Energy Shield] per 2 Strength
Definition.zh:
无法获得[Strength|力量]的固有加成
每 2 点力量提高 1% 的[EnergyShield|能量护盾]

Definition.en:
Gain no inherent bonus from [Dexterity]
1% increased [Armour|Armour] per 2 Dexterity
Definition.zh:
无法获得[Dexterity|敏捷]的固有加成
每 2 点敏捷提高 1% 的[Armour|护甲]

Definition.en:
Gain no inherent bonus from [Intelligence]
1% increased [Evasion|Evasion Rating] per 2 Intelligence
Definition.zh:
无法获得[Intelligence|智慧]的固有加成
每 2 点智慧提高 1% 的[Evasion|闪避值]

Definition.en: Sacred Water is a resource you find within the Trial of the Sekhemas. It is used to purchase [Boons] from merchants and venerate Maraketh Shrines, granting you various effects within the Trial.
Definition.zh: 圣水是能够在丝克玛试炼中找到的资源，用于从商人处购买[Boons|恩赐]，或用于敬拜马拉克斯神龛，使你在试炼中获得多项效果。

Definition.en:
Boons are positive effects that are applied to the Trial of the Sekhemas; making them easier to run.
Boons can be gained from certain Maraketh Shrines or from buying them from the Trial Merchant using [SacredWater|Sacred Water].
Boons can be either Minor or Major, providing varying benefits to your Trial.
Definition.zh:
恩赐是丝克玛试炼中生效的正面效果，能够降低试炼的难度。
恩赐可以使用[SacredWater|圣水]从特定的马拉克斯神龛处获得，也可以从试炼商人处购买。
恩赐分为次要恩赐和主要恩赐，能够在试炼中产生不同的增益状态。

Definition.en:
Afflictions are negative effects that are applied to the Trial of the Sekhemas; making them harder to run.
Afflictions will be applied for entering certain rooms in the Trial or from encountering certain Maraketh Shrines.
Afflictions can be either Minor or Major, providing varying negative effects to your Trial.
Definition.zh:
痛苦是丝克玛试炼中生效的负面效果，能够提高试炼的难度。
痛苦会在进入试炼中的某些房间时获得，遭遇特定的马拉克斯神龛时也会获得。
痛苦分为主要痛苦和次要痛苦，能够在试炼中产生不同的负面效果。

Definition.en: Enfeeble is a [Curse] that lessens the damage dealt by those affected. If not otherwise specified, Enfeeble lessens damage dealt by unique targets by 10%, and other targets by 20%.
Definition.zh: 衰弱是一种[Curse|诅咒]，能够降低受影响目标造成的伤害。除非另有说明，否则衰弱使传奇目标伤害总降10%，其他目标总降 20%。

Definition.en: Binding Chains is a stacking [Debuff] that [Slow|Slows] character movement speed by 8% for each stack applied.
Definition.zh: 束缚之链是可叠加的[Debuff|减益状态]，每层使角色的移动速度[Slow|减慢] 8%。

Definition.en: Bronze, Silver or Gold Keys are sometimes awarded for completing rooms or for killing monsters within the Trial of the Sekhemas. After completing each floor of the Trial there will be an assortment of Bronze, Silver and Gold caches which can be opened by their respective key, revealing treasures within.
Definition.zh: 在丝克玛试炼中，完成房间或击败怪物有时可以获得青铜、白银或黄金钥匙。完成试炼的每个楼层之后，就能找到青铜、白银和黄金宝匣，用对应的钥匙开启即可获得其中的珍宝。

Definition.en:
Relics are items that are placed in the Relic Altar before the start of the Trial of the Sekhemas.
Relics influence various aspects of the Trial to make it easier. Your Relics persist between Trials.
Selected Relics cannot be changed while you have an active Trial.
Relics have varying dimensions, so arrange them carefully to maximise your benefits.
You can unlock more Relic slots by killing bosses deeper into the Trials.
Spare Relics can be stored in the Relic Locker or any of your personal stash tabs.
Definition.zh:
遗物是开启丝克玛试炼之前放置在遗物之殿中的物品。
遗物影响了试炼的方方面面，来使你的旅途更加轻松。你的遗物可以在多场试炼中保留。
激活一场试炼之后，就无法改变选择的遗物。
遗物具有不同的维度，你必须谨慎选择才能充分发挥它的作用。
你可以通过击败试炼深处的首领来解锁更多的遗物插槽。
多余的遗物可以存放在遗物陈列柜或你的任意个人仓库页中。

Definition.en: This is modifier applies to [Debuff|Debuffs] you inflict that [Slow|Slow] enemies, and scales only the specific [BuffMagnitude|Magnitude] that slows the target. It will not affect any other [BuffMagnitude|Magnitudes] that [Debuff] has if it does other things in addition to the [Slow].
Definition.zh: 这类词缀会对使敌人[Slow|减速]的[Debuff|减益]状态生效，并且仅影响减速的[BuffMagnitude|强度]。如果[Debuff|减益]除了[Slow|减速]之外还具有其他效果，这部分效果的[BuffMagnitude|强度]将不受影响。

Definition.en: You are on High Infernal Flame if you have 65% of your maximum Infernal Flame or more.
Definition.zh: 如果你的地狱烈焰达到或高于地狱烈焰上限的 65%，便处于高地狱烈焰状态。

Definition.en: Purple Flames of Chayula provide a stacking [Buff] granting 7% of damage as extra [Chaos] damage. Stacks up to 10 times.
Definition.zh: 紫色夏乌拉之焰能够提供可叠加的[Buff|增益]状态，获得相当于伤害 7% 的额外[Chaos|混沌]伤害。最多叠加 10 次。

Definition.en: Affects the speed at which all Skills are used. Increases and reductions to Skill Speed stack additively with increases and reductions to [Attack] Speed, [Spell|Cast] Speed, [Warcry] Speed, and similar stats.
Definition.zh: 影响所有技能的使用速度。技能速度的增减效果与[Attack|攻击]速度、[Spell|施法]速度、[Warcry|战吼]速度和类似属性的效果为加法叠加生效。

Definition.en: Wildwood Wisps grant 30% increased Tribute Gained to Players within 3 metres of it.
Definition.zh: 荒林鬼灵会使 3 米内的玩家获得的贡品提高 30%。

Definition.en: Close Range is anywhere within 2 metres of your character. Normally, [Melee] [Attack|Attacks] you make are in Close Range.
Definition.zh: 近距离指的是角色 2 米以内的范围。通常来说，你的[Melee|近战][Attack|攻击]都位于近距离内。

Definition.en: Unleash is an effect that allows [Spell|Spells] to accumulate Seals that allows the [Spell] to reoccur when being cast. There is a limit of 2 Seals per [Spell].
Definition.zh: 释出效果使[Spell|法术]能够积累封印，使[Spell|法术]在施放时可以重复。每个[Spell|法术]的封印上限为 2 个。

Definition.en: Link Skills are Skills that allow you to link to your [Allies] to provide them with [Buff|Buffs] while you are within a certain distance of them.
Definition.zh: 羁绊技能使你能够与[Allies|友军]产生羁绊，但你们位于一定距离内时为对方提供[Buff|增益]状态。

Definition.en:
Guard is a [Buff] that provides a buffer against damage from [HitDamage|Hits], taking the damage before your Life or [EnergyShield|Energy Shield] until the buff expires or is depleted.

You can only have a single Guard buff at a time. If you gain Guard when you already have it, whichever buff has the higher magnitude will be kept, and that buff's duration will be refreshed by an amount proportional to the magnitude of the discarded buff, but not to longer than its original duration. Your maximum amount of Guard is equal to 200% of your maximum Life.
Definition.zh:
防卫是一种[Buff|增益状态]，为来自[HitDamage|击中]的伤害提供缓冲，在增益状态消失或耗尽前优先承受伤害，然后才会扣减你的生命或[EnergyShield|能量护盾]。

你同时只能拥有一个防卫增益状态。如果你在已有防卫时再次获得防卫，会保留强度较高的增益状态，并根据被丢弃增益状态的强度按比例刷新持续时间，但不会超过原始持续时间。你的最大防卫值等同于 200%你的最大生命值。

Definition.en:
Maps containing a Delirium Mirror can have the mirror walked through to unleash the rolling Delirium fog ring across the current area. 
You must stay within this fog as it expands to maintain the [Delirious|Delirium] or it will disappear.

[Rarity|Magic] monsters are able to gain Delirium specific [MonsterModifiers|Modifiers] while inside the fog.

[Rarity|Rare] or [Rarity|Unique] monsters in the fog may manifest Delirium Demons. Manifested Delirium Demons inhabit the monster's body to occasionally use Skills of their own.

[FracturingMirror|Fractured Mirrors] may be found within Delirium Fog, summoning extra monsters while [FracturingMirrorShard|Fracturing Mirror Shards] are found at set depths, with more varied rewards.

Defeating [MapBoss|Map Bosses] has a chance to summon a [DeliriumGigaMirror|Grand Mirror] on a nearby map.
Definition.zh:
地图包含惊悸迷雾之镜时，穿过镜子即可释放出遍及整个区域的滚动的惊悸迷雾之环。
你必须在这片迷雾扩张时始终留在迷雾中，才能维持[Delirious|惊悸迷雾]，否则它就会消散。

迷雾中的[Rarity|魔法]怪物能够获得惊悸迷雾专属的[MonsterModifiers|词缀]。

迷雾中的[Rarity|稀有]或[Rarity|传奇]怪物可能显化出惊悸迷雾恶魔。显化出的惊悸迷雾恶魔会寄宿于怪物体内，并偶尔使用其自身的技能。

惊悸迷雾中可发现[FracturingMirror|破溃之镜]，它们会召唤额外的怪物；而在特定深度可发现[FracturingMirrorShard|破溃之镜碎片]，提供更多样的奖励。

击败[MapBoss|地图首领]后，有机会在附近地图上召唤出[DeliriumGigaMirror|恢宏之镜]。

Definition.en:
Expeditions are Ancient Kalguuran burial sites, with [ContainsExpedition2|Verisium Remnants] and dangers buried beneath the ground.

Set up a chain of explosives and unearth the treasures, but beware of the dangers that hide in wait.

Using [ExpeditionLogbookCurrency|Logbooks] on the Atlas can reveal [GrandExpedition|Grand Expeditions] which are larger versions of regular Expeditions and can contain special types of [GrandExpeditionRemnant|Remnants].
Definition.zh:
先祖秘藏是远古卡古兰人的墓葬遗址，地下埋藏着[ContainsExpedition2|维金残片]和各种危机。

设置一连串炸药，挖掘出宝藏，但要当心其中潜伏的危险。

在异界图鉴上使用[ExpeditionLogbookCurrency|日志]可以揭示[GrandExpedition|宏大先祖秘藏]，这是普通先祖秘藏的放大版本，可能包含特殊类型的[GrandExpeditionRemnant|残片]。

Definition.en:
Verisium Remnants are fragments of the stars themselves, called down by Kalguurans to harness their power.

Verisium Remnants allow you to craft a variety of rewards. Each Remnant has a number of slots available for runes to be inscribed, and when you first find it, it will have one rune already inscribed.

Based on the inscribed rune, you'll be able to select a reward and, based on the runes required for the recipe, you will have to fight waves of Verisium infused monsters to complete the encounter and receive your reward.

The number of monster waves are one less than the total number of inscribable slots for the chosen recipe. Each wave of the encounter will activate an additional runic effect, starting from the first two runes on the left.
Definition.zh:
维金残片是星辰本身的碎片，由卡古兰人召唤下来以驾驭其力量。

维金残片允许你制作各种奖励。每个残片都有若干可铭刻符文的槽位，当你首次发现它时，已有一个符文预先铭刻其上。

根据已铭刻的符文，你可以选择一项奖励，并基于配方所需的符文，你需要对抗数波被维金强化的怪物以完成此次遭遇并领取奖励。

怪物波次的数量比所选配方可铭刻槽位总数少一波。遭遇的每一波都会激活一个额外的符文效果，从左侧的头两个符文开始依次激活。

Definition.en:
Grand Expeditions are a larger version of [ContainsExpedition|Expeditions] with many more explosives. These contain special [GrandExpeditionRemnant|Remnants] and treasures to unearth.

These are only found in Ocean Biomes revealed with [ExpeditionLogbookCurrency|Logbooks].

These areas have additional modifiers to improve their rewards.
Definition.zh:
宏大先祖秘藏是[ContainsExpedition|先祖秘藏]的放大版本，拥有更多炸药。其中包含特殊的[GrandExpeditionRemnant|残片]和有待挖掘的宝藏。

这些先祖秘藏仅出现在由[ExpeditionLogbookCurrency|日志]揭示的海洋地貌中。

这些区域会带有额外词缀，以提升其奖励。

Definition.en:
A type of Remnant found in [GrandExpedition|Grand Expeditions] that adds modifiers to unearthed monsters and chests.

Modifiers from these Remnants are applied to Monsters and Chests that are excavated from the explosive that destroys the Remnant and all subsequent Explosives
Definition.zh:
一种在[GrandExpedition|宏大先祖秘藏]中发现的残片类型，可为挖掘出的怪物和宝箱添加词缀。

这些残片的词缀会作用于从摧毁该残片的炸药开始，以及之后所有炸药所挖掘出的怪物和宝箱。

Definition.en:
Breaches allow invaders from another world to access ours.

Unstable Breaches are a small tear in the fabric that will open for a short time. Kill Breach monsters to keep them open longer.
Once enough monsters have been killed, the Breach will stabalise, calling stronger monsters through the portal at the centre.
Kill these monsters in the centre will complete the Unstable Breach, closing the tear.

A Breach Hive is a tear that has already grown out of control. You will need the help of Ailith to close these.
With a blessing from Chayula, burn your way to the centre of the Hive and help Ailith start the process of destorying the centre.
As Ailith destroys the Hive, Breach monsters will pour in to try and kill her. Defend Ailith until she has completely destroyed the centre of the hive to remove it from existence.
If Ailith dies during this, the Hive will remain.
Definition.zh:
裂隙的存在，让另一个世界的入侵者得以进入我们的世界。

不稳定裂隙是维度结构上的微小裂口，只会短暂开启。击杀裂隙怪物可延长其开启时间。
击杀足够多的怪物后，裂隙将趋于稳定，通过中央传送门召唤更强大的怪物。
击杀中央的怪物即可完成不稳定裂隙，关闭裂口。

裂隙巢穴是已失控的裂口。你需要艾利丝的帮助才能关闭它们。
借助夏乌拉的祝福，一路烧穿，直至虫巢核心，协助艾利丝摧毁核心。
当艾莉丝摧毁巢穴时，裂隙怪物会蜂拥而入，试图杀死她。保护艾利丝，直至她完全摧毁虫巢核心，将其从存在中抹除。
若此期间艾利丝死亡，巢穴将继续存在。

Definition.en:
Ritual Altars are sacrificial sites that absorb the monsters slain within their ritual circles. After an amount of monsters have been slain, the Ritual can be activated.
Activating the Ritual will resurrect the slain monsters, requiring you slay them once more. 

Defeating these revived monsters earns you Tribute, a resource that you can trade for various Favours from the Ritual Altar. 
The list of Favours tradable for Tribute can be rerolled, costing Tribute.
Favours can be deferred, paying a part of their cost but having them appear again later.
Definition.zh:
驱灵祭坛是奉献之地，能够吸收法阵范围内被击败的怪物。击败一定数量的怪物后，就可以开启灵坛。
激活灵坛会复苏被击败的怪物，需要你再一次击败他们。

击败复苏的怪物能够获得贡品，并用这种资源在驱灵祭坛处换取各种恩典。
贡品能够交换的恩惠可以刷新，但刷新也需要消耗贡品。
恩惠可以延期保留，支付相当于价格一定比例的贡品，使它们之后再次出现。

Definition.en: Area has +1 to Monster Level.
Definition.zh: 区域的怪物等级 +1。

Definition.en:
An Abyss is a pit which leads deep underground with multiple fissures branching from it. Any monsters spawned near an Abyss will be weakened by it.
Defeating these weakened monsters will cause the fissures to close.
Once the fissures have closed all the way to the pit, the pit will activate and spawn a large number of Abyssal monsters. Defeating these monsters will close the pit. 

Each closed pit has a chance to spawn an Abyssal Trove which can grant pieces of [Abyssalify|Preserved Bone] to craft onto your Items. The final Abyss in the area has a chance to instead open an underground dungeon called an [AbyssalDepths|Abyssal Depths].

There are three separate groups of Abyssal Monsters: the Lightless, the Blackblooded and the Legion of the Pit, each area generally contains one of these groups.
The rarity of the monsters spawned depends on the rarity of the slain weakened monsters and the emerging Abyssal will steal some or all of the modifiers from them.
Any of the modifiers stolen by Rare Abyssal can be upgraded to [AbyssalModifiers|Abyssal Modifiers].
Definition.zh:
深渊是一座通往地底深处的巨坑，其中有多道分支的裂缝。深渊附近生成的任何怪物会受其弱化。
击败这些受弱化的怪物会关闭裂缝。
通往巨坑的所有裂缝都被关闭后，巨坑便会开启，并生成大量的深渊怪物。击败这些怪物将关闭巨坑。

每个关闭的巨坑有一定几率生成深渊保险箱，可获得[Abyssalify|遗存颚骨]，可用于物品工艺。区域内最后的深渊有几率开启名为[AbyssalDepths|绝望深渊]的地下城。

深渊势力怪物有三种不同群体：暗光、黑血之众以及深渊军团。每个区域一般仅含有其中一个群体。
生成怪物的稀有度取决于击杀弱化怪物的稀有度，而出现的深渊势力会偷取其部分或全部词缀。
稀有深渊势力偷取的任何词缀可升级为[AbyssalModifiers|深渊词缀]。

Definition.en: Tablets are special items that can be used in the Map Device to add more Endgame Mechanics to Maps on your Atlas.
Definition.zh: 石板是一种特殊物品，能够在地图设置中使用，为异界上的地图添加更多终局游戏机制。

Definition.en:
Waystones are items that can be used to travel to Maps on the Atlas.
 
Higher Waystone tiers open higher level areas containing more difficult monsters which drop higher level items and allows the use of higher tier Atlas Passives.

Waystones can be modified to increase the difficulty and reward of monsters encountered in Maps.
Definition.zh:
引路石是一种物品，能够让你前往异界图鉴上的地图。

引路石等阶越高，开启的区域等阶就越高，其中的怪物就更强大，掉落物品等级更高，并允许使用更高等级的异界天赋。

引路石可以被修改，以增加地图中遭遇的怪物难度和奖励。

Definition.en:
Essence monsters are powerful monsters trapped in crystallised corruption.

Breaking these monsters free allows them to be defeated, dropping the Essence that can then be used to modify equipment.

Any monsters with Essences [MonsterModifiers|Modifiers] drop an additional Essence of that type.
Definition.zh:
精华怪物是被结晶的腐化所困的强力怪物。

让这些怪物挣脱束缚并击败它们，就能掉落精华物品，可以为装备添加词缀。

任何带有精华[MonsterModifiers|词缀]的怪物会额外掉落一个同类型的精华。

Definition.en:
Shrines are Precursor Artifacts that empower monsters with its [Presence] with various effects.
Defeat all the monsters [ShrineMonster|Worshipping] the Shrine and interact with it to temporarily gain the power for yourself.
Definition.zh:
神龛是先驱者遗物，能够为[Presence|在场]的怪物提供多种效果的强化。
击败[ShrineMonster|敬拜]神龛的怪物并与其互动，就能暂时让这份力量为你所用。

Definition.en:
Strongboxes are locked chests that contain various items.
Attempting to unlock a Strongbox will unleash [Pack|Packs] of monsters that must be defeated in order to get the items within.
Strongboxes can be modified to increase the difficulty and reward of the monsters and rewards within respectively.
Definition.zh:
保险箱是上锁的箱子，其中含有多件物品。
尝试打开保险箱会释放出[Pack|成群]的怪物，只有击败它们才能获得其中的物品。
保险箱可以添加词缀，提升遭遇怪物的难度和提供的奖励，以及保险箱本身的奖励。

Definition.en:
Precursor Towers are ancient structures that are scattered all throughout the Atlas. Precursor Tower Maps can be completed to reveal a large area around them and to obtain a [Tablet|Tablet].

Completing a Precursor Tower requires you to activate the Precursor Beacon at the end of the Map, after defeating the [MapBoss|Map Boss].
Definition.zh:
先驱高塔是远古时期的建筑，散落在异界的各地。完成先驱高塔地图可以揭示其周围的大片区域，并获得一个[Tablet|石板]。

完成先驱高塔需要你击败[MapBoss|地图首领]后，在地图终点时激活先驱灯塔。

Definition.en:
Fracturing Mirrors are structures found in [ContainsDelirium|Delirium] Fog that shatter when you get near them, spawning [ContainsDelirium|Delirium] monsters.

Occasionally Fracturing Mirrors [FracturingMirrorShard|Shards] may appear with other bonuses, such as adding [DistilledEmotion|Liquid Emotions] to monsters or summoning a Mirrored Boss.
Definition.zh:
破溃之镜是能够在[ContainsDelirium|惊悸迷雾]中找到的建筑，当你靠近时就会碎裂，并生成[ContainsDelirium|惊悸迷雾]怪物。

偶尔，破溃之镜[FracturingMirrorShard|碎片]会附带其他增益效果出现，例如为怪物附加[DistilledEmotion|液化情感]，或召唤一个镜像首领。

Definition.en:
Fracturing Mirror Shards are a type of [FracturingMirror|Fracturing Mirror] found within [ContainsDelirium|Delirium] Fog at set depths.

Escalation Shards may add modifiers to rare Delirium monsters, summoning more difficult and rewarding monsters, or pausing the Fog.

Deceptive Shards summon Delirium bosses or lead to an extra Delirious area.

Capricious Shards do not manifest by default, once unlocked they may summon a mirrored Map Boss, or cause Map Bosses to manifest [DeliriumGigaMirror|Grand Mirrors].
Definition.zh:
破溃之镜碎片是[FracturingMirror|破溃之镜]的一种，可在特定深度的[ContainsDelirium|惊悸迷雾]中找到。

恶变碎片可为惊悸迷雾怪物添加词缀，召唤更强大、奖励更丰厚的怪物，或暂停迷雾。

欺瞒碎片可召唤惊悸迷雾首领，或引向额外的惊悸迷雾区域。

无常碎片默认不会显现，一旦解锁，可召唤地图首领的镜像，或使地图首领显化为[DeliriumGigaMirror|恢宏之镜]。

Definition.en:
Can [Evasion|Evade] all Hits
75% less [Evasion] Rating
Definition.zh:
可以[Evasion|闪避]所有击中
[Evasion|闪避]值总降 75%

Definition.en:
Basic Jewels do not affect nodes in a radius.
Basic Jewels are Rubies, Emeralds, Sapphires and Diamonds.
Definition.zh:
基本珠宝不会影响一定范围内的天赋节点。
基本珠宝包含红玉、翡翠、蓝玉和宝钻。

Definition.en: The Realmgate is a piece of Vaal Technology which allows the use of Atlas mechanic keys; accessing deadly areas and facing off against powerful enemies.
Definition.zh: 界域之门是瓦尔科技的杰作，能够让你使用异界机制钥匙，开启危险的区域，面对强力的敌人。

Definition.en: The Reliquary Vault is a Vaal Vault which can be accessed by using Reliquary Keys found throughout the Atlas.
Definition.zh: 圣物宝库是一处瓦尔宝库，可以使用在异界各地找到的圣物厅钥匙开启。

Definition.en:
Contains Corruption, which may add an additional modifier to the area.

Corrupted Areas cause slain monsters to [CoalescedCorruption|Coalesce Corruption] to manifest powerful monsters.
Definition.zh:
包含腐化，可能为该区域增加一个额外词缀。

被腐化的区域会使被击败的怪物[CoalescedCorruption|凝聚腐化]，形成强大的怪物。

Definition.en:
Contains a [Rarity|Unique] Map layout which may contain specialised rewards.

Unique Maps cannot gain additional content, [Essence|Essences], [Shrine|Shrines], or [Strongbox|Strongboxes].
Definition.zh:
包含[Rarity|传奇]地图布局，可能含有专门的奖励。

传奇地图不会具有额外内容、[Essence|精华]、[Shrine|神龛]或[Strongbox|保险箱]。

Definition.en:
Contains a Hideout that can be fully cleared to unlock the Hideout for personal use.

All monsters in the area are at least [Rarity|Magic].
Definition.zh:
包含一个藏身处，完全清空即可解锁该私人藏身处。

区域内的所有怪物至少为[Rarity|魔法]怪物。

Definition.en: Contains a Wandering Trader who may offer you powerful rewards.
Definition.zh: 包含一个流浪的商人，会为你提供强大的奖励。

Definition.en:
There are three types of Citadels, each located in different cities throughout Wraeclast. 

[CopperCitadel|Copper Citadels] in Faridun Cities, [IronCitadel|Iron Citadels] in Ezomyte Cities and [StoneCitadel|Stone Citadels] in Vaal Cities.

Complete one of each type of Citadel and collect their Crisis Fragments to gain access to [TheBurningMonoilth|The Burning Monolith].
Definition.zh:
瓦尔克拉斯各地散布着三座城塞，分别位于不同族群的城市中。

法里顿城市中有[CopperCitadel|古铜城塞]，艾兹麦城市中有[IronCitadel|钢铁城塞]，瓦尔城市中有[StoneCitadel|磐石城塞]。

完成全部 3 座城塞并收集对应的危机碎片，即可进入[TheBurningMonoilth|燃石巨塔]。

Definition.en:
The Copper [Citadel] is an endgame area which can be accessed with a Tier 15 or above [Waystone]. The boss of this area will drop a [PinnacleKey2|Faded Crisis Fragment].

Increases to [Waystone] Drop Chance gives a chance for additional Crisis Fragments to drop.
Definition.zh:
古铜[Citadel|城塞]是一处终局游戏区域，可以使用 15 阶或以上的[Waystone|引路石]开启。该区域的首领会掉落一个[PinnacleKey2|褪色的危机碎片]。

提高[Waystone|引路石]的掉落几率就有几率掉落额外的危机碎片。

Definition.en:
The Iron [Citadel] is an endgame area which can be accessed with a Tier 15 or above [Waystone]. The boss of this area will drop a [PinnacleKey1|Ancient Crisis Fragment].

Increases to [Waystone] Drop Chance gives a chance for additional Crisis Fragments to drop.
Definition.zh:
钢铁[Citadel|城塞]是一处终局游戏区域，可以使用 15 阶或以上的[Waystone|引路石]开启。该区域的首领会掉落一个[PinnacleKey1|古老的危机碎片]。

提高[Waystone|引路石]的掉落几率就有几率掉落额外的危机碎片。

Definition.en:
The Stone [Citadel] is an endgame area which can be accessed with a Tier 15 or above [Waystone]. The boss of this area will drop a [PinnacleKey3|Weathered Crisis Fragment].

Increases to [Waystone] Drop Chance gives a chance for additional Crisis Fragments to drop.
Definition.zh:
磐石[Citadel|城塞]是一处终局游戏区域，可以使用 15 阶或以上的[Waystone|引路石]开启。该区域的首领会掉落一个[PinnacleKey3|风蚀的危机碎片]。

提高[Waystone|引路石]的掉落几率就有几率掉落额外的危机碎片。

Definition.en:
The Burning Monolith houses the most dangerous foe in all of Wraeclast. 
Access to this foe requires three different Crisis Fragments from the [CopperCitadel|Copper], [IronCitadel|Iron] and [StoneCitadel|Stone] [Citadel|Citadels].
Definition.zh:
燃石巨塔中潜藏着瓦尔克拉斯最危险的敌人。
要挑战此敌人，需集齐分别来自[CopperCitadel|古铜]、[IronCitadel|钢铁]和[StoneCitadel|磐石][Citadel|城塞]的三块不同危机碎片。

Definition.en:
This represents a Map. A [Waystone] can be used to access it. 

If you fail to complete the Map, it may be attempted again but will not contain additional content, [Essence|Essences], [Shrine|Shrines], or [Strongbox|Strongboxes]. It will not be [ContainsCorruption|Corrupted]. [Tablet|Tablets] cannot be used on failed Maps.

To complete a Map, defeat the [MapBoss|Boss].
Definition.zh:
代表一张地图，需要使用一个[Waystone|引路石]才能开启。

如果你未能完成地图，则可以再次尝试挑战，但地图不会具有额外内容、[Essence|精华]、[Shrine|神龛]或[Strongbox|保险箱]。地图不会被[ContainsCorruption|腐化]。[Tablet|石板]效果不再适用于未完成的地图。

要完成地图，你需要击败[MapBoss|首领]。

Definition.en:
Cooldown Recovery Rate modifies the speed at which your Skill cooldowns are restored. For example, with 100% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate your Skill cooldowns will effectively be halved.

Cooldown Recovery Rate does not affect anything other than Skill cooldowns.
Definition.zh:
冷却回复速度会影响你的技能冷却时间的回复速度。例如，冷却回复速度提高 100% 时，你的技能冷却时间就等同于减半。

冷却回复速度只会影响技能的冷却时间。

Definition.en: Jewels are items that can be socketed into Jewel Sockets on the Passive Skill Tree to grant bonuses. Basic Jewels simply grant you the listed stats, while some other kinds of Jewel can have more complicated effects, such as modifying other Passive Skills within a certain radius.
Definition.zh: 珠宝物品可以镶嵌到天赋树中的珠宝插槽中，从而提供额外加成。基本珠宝只会提供列出的属性，其他类型的珠宝可能拥有更复杂的效果，例如影响一定范围内的其他天赋。

Definition.en:
Gain no inherent bonus from [Strength]
1% increased [Projectile] [Attack] damage per 2 [Strength]
Definition.zh:
无法获得[Strength|力量]的固有加成
每 2 点[Strength|力量]提高 1% 的[Projectile|投射物][Attack|攻击]伤害

Definition.en:
Gain no inherent bonus from [Strength]
1% increased [Spell] damage per 2 [Strength]
Definition.zh:
无法获得[Strength|力量]的固有加成
每 2 点[Strength|力量]提高 1% 的[Spell|法术]伤害

Definition.en: Gain 1% increased [SkillSpeed|Skill Speed] for 4 seconds when an enemy dies in your [Presence], stacking up to 50 times. A stack is lost every 0.5 seconds if one has not been gained within the past 4 seconds.
Definition.zh: [Presence|在场]的敌人被击败时，[SkillSpeed|技能速度]加快 1%，持续 4 秒，最多叠加 50 次。若过去 4 秒内没有获得层数，则每 0.5 秒失去一层。

Definition.en:
Leech recovers an amount of [LifeLeech|Life], [ManaLeech|Mana], [EnergyShieldLeech|Energy Shield], or [RageLeech|Rage] over one second, usually as a result of [HitDamage|Hitting] an enemy and based on the damage of the [HitDamage|Hit].

Only one instance of Leech for each resource can provide recovery at a time.
Definition.zh:
偷取会根据[HitDamage|击中]敌人的[HitDamage|击中]伤害，在 1 秒内回复一定量的[LifeLeech|生命]、[ManaLeech|魔力]、[EnergyShieldLeech|能量护盾]或[RageLeech|怒火]。

每种资源同时只能有一个偷取实例提供回复。

Definition.en: You can only have one Historic Jewel socketed.
Definition.zh: 你只能镶嵌一个久远珠宝。

Definition.en: Catalysts are Currency items that are exclusive drops from the [ContainsBreach|Breach] mechanic. Catalysts add [Quality] that affect certain modifiers on items. There are two categories of Catalyst, one that affects [Jewellery] and one that affects [Jewel|Jewels].
Definition.zh: 催化剂是通货物品，只能通过[ContainsBreach|裂隙]机制掉落。催化剂可以为物品添加影像特定词缀的[Quality|品质]。催化剂分为两类：一类影响[Jewellery|饰品]，另一类影响[Jewel|珠宝]。

Definition.en: Omens are Currency items that enable exclusive meta-crafting effects, allowing for more specialised crafting.
Definition.zh: 预兆是通货物品，可以开启专属的超凡工艺效果，实现定向工艺制作。

Definition.en: An Audience with the King is an item that is an exclusive drop from the [ContainsRitual|Ritual] mechanic. This item allows you to access the Crux of Nothingness via the [Realmgate].
Definition.zh: 谒王之约是一种物品，只能通过[ContainsRitual|驱灵祭坛]机制掉落。你可以在[Realmgate|界域之门]处使用该物品以进入虚无之症。

Definition.en: Liquid Emotions are Currency items that are exclusive drops from the [ContainsDelirium|Delirium] mechanic. Liquid Emotions allow you to instil an amulet with a Notable Passive Skill from the Passive Tree. Instilling a Notable Passive Skill which you have already allocated normally will not grant its effects a second time.
Definition.zh: 液化情感是通货物品，只能通过[ContainsDelirium|惊悸迷雾]机制掉落。液化情感使你能够为项链灌注一个天赋树上的核心天赋。灌注已通过正常途径配置的核心天赋不会重复获得它的效果。

Definition.en: Ancient Liquid Emotions are a type of [DistilledEmotion|Liquid Emotion] that applies specific modifiers to Time-Lost Jewels.
Definition.zh: 远古液态情感是[DistilledEmotion|液化情感]的一种，可将特定词缀附加至失落时空珠宝上。

Definition.en:
Certain items can be found Corrupted or made Corrupted using a Vaal Orb, changing their properties unpredictably.
Most methods of item crafting and modification cannot be used on Corrupted items. There is no penalty for using Corrupted items.
Definition.zh:
部分物品在获得时就是腐化物品，或者使用过瓦尔宝珠，在不可预测地改变属性的同时而被腐化。
大部分物品工艺和修改的方式都无法对腐化物品使用。使用腐化物品并没有惩罚。

Definition.en:
Certain items can be found Mirrored or made Mirrored using a Mirror of Kalandra.
Mirrored items are copies of an original item. Most methods of item crafting and modification cannot be used on Mirrored items.
Definition.zh:
部分物品在获得时就是复制物品，或者使用卡兰德的魔镜而被复制。
复制物品是原始物品的复制版。大部分物品工艺和修改的方式都无法对复制物品使用。

Definition.en: Hexproof means that you are [Unaffected] by [Curse|Curses].
Definition.zh: 诅咒免疫表示[Curse|诅咒]对你[Unaffected|不产生影响]。

Definition.en:
Runic Monsters are powerful monsters encountered in [ContainsExpedition|Expeditions].

Runic Monsters are more commonly found by using explosives on larger [ContainsExpedition|Expedition] markers.
Definition.zh:
符文怪物是[ContainsExpedition|先祖秘藏]中遭遇的强力怪物。

对较大的[ContainsExpedition|先祖秘藏]标记使用炸药通常就会发现符文怪物。

Definition.en: Monsters slain close together have a chance to merge together and manifest powerful Monsters.
Definition.zh: 聚集在一起的怪物被击败时，有几率融合成形，凝聚出强力的怪物。

Definition.en:
Certain [Channelling] skills have extra effects and benefits if released within a certain timing window while using the skill.
Certain support gems and items can modify the duration of that timing window.
Definition.zh:
使用部分[Channelling|持续吟唱]技能时，在特定的时间窗口内释放该技能，就能产生额外的效果和加成。
特定的辅助宝石和物品可以影响这一时间窗口的持续时间。

Definition.en:
Certain skills can only have a limited number of effects active at once.
If a new effect is created while at the maximum number of effects, the oldest effect will dissapear.
Certain support gems and items can modify skill effect limits.
Definition.zh:
部分技能在同一时间只能激活一定数量的效果。
如果在达到效果上限时产生新的效果，则最久远的效果将会消失。
特定的辅助宝石和物品可以影响技能效果的上限。

Definition.en: Monsters with Soul Eater gain 1% increased [SkillSpeed|Skill Speed] and 1% less damage taken for 4 seconds when a monster dies in their [Presence], stacking up to 50 times. A stack is lost every 0.5 seconds if one has not been gained within the past 4 seconds.
Definition.zh: [Presence|在场]的怪物被击败时，具有噬魂者的怪物的[SkillSpeed|技能速度]加快 1%，受到的伤害总降 1%，持续 4 秒，最多叠加 50 次。若过去 4 秒内没有获得层数，则每 0.5 秒失去一层。

Definition.en: Remnants are lingering objects in the world which are generally created by player Skills. Walking over a Remnant collects it to grant a bonus based on the type of Remnant. Remnants will generally disappear if not collected for some time.
Definition.zh: 残片是世界中的残留物体，通常由玩家技能创造。走过残片会收集它，根据残片类型获得加成。残片在经过一段时间不收集后会消失。

Definition.en:
Ascendancy Passive Skill Points can be allocated in your Ascendancy Skill Tree once you have chosen your Ascendancy. Your Ascendancy class is unlocked by completing any Ascension Trial. In order to change your Ascendancy, you must complete an Ascension Trial to the furthest extent you have successfully already done so, and then interact with the Ascendancy Altar while you have no Ascendancy Passive Skill Points currently assigned. Trialmaster and Balbala will offer the ability to refund passive points while in rooms with Ascendancy Altars to facilitate this.

You can obtain 4 sets of 2 Ascendancy Points for a total of 8 in the following ways:
Set 1 - Completing floor 1 of the Trial of the Sekhemas or completing the Trials of Chaos with at least 7 Trials
Set 2 - Completing floor 2 of the Trial of the Sekhemas or completing the Trials of Chaos
Set 3 - Completing floor 3 of the Trial of the Sekhemas or completing the Trials of Chaos with at least 10 Trials
Set 4 - Completing floor 4 of the Trial of the Sekhemas or completing the secret challenge behind the locked door in the Trials of Chaos
Definition.zh:
选择了升华职业之后，你就可以在升华天赋树中配置升华点数。完成任意升华试炼即可解锁升华职业。要更改升华职业，你必须完成一次升华试炼，并达到你此前达到过的最高层级，然后在没有配置升华天赋点数的前提下与升华祭坛互动。你可以在升华祭坛所在房间内找到试炼使者或贝尔巴拉，重置所有升华天赋点数。

你可以通过 4 次试炼，每次解锁 2 个升华点数，总计 8 点。方法如下：
第 1 次 - 完成丝克玛试炼的第 1 层，或者完成至少有 7 场试炼的混沌试炼
第 2 次 - 完成丝克玛试炼的第 2 层，或者完成混沌试炼
第 3 次 - 完成丝克玛试炼的第 3 层，或者完成至少有 10 场试炼的混沌试炼
第 4 次 - 完成丝克玛试炼的第 4 层，或者完成混沌试炼封印之门后的秘密挑战

Definition.en:
You lose this much less [Honour].
Maximum Honour Resistance is capped at 75% by default and cannot be higher than 90%.
Definition.zh:
降低你所失去的[Honour|荣誉]。
荣誉抗性上限默认为 75%，并且无法高于 90%。

Definition.en:
Skills can gain Stages passively or while attacking/casting them, depending on the Skill in question.

Stages gained for a given Skill apply to that instance of the Skill and will not carry over from one area to another.
Definition.zh:
有些技能可以被动叠加层数，或者在攻击/施放时叠加层数，具体取决于技能本身。

特定技能获得的层数仅对该次技能生效，并且无法保留到下一个区域中。

Definition.en: Normal enemies are Primed for [Pinned|Pin] when they have at least 40% [Pinned|Pin] buildup. Magic enemies are instead Primed at 50% buildup, Rare at 60%, and Unique at 70%.
Definition.zh: 普通敌人具有至少 40% [Pinned|定身]积蓄时可被[Pinned|定身]。魔法敌人为 50%，稀有敌人为 60%，传奇敌人为 70%。

Definition.en:
Elemental Surges are consumed when you use a non-[Melee] [Projectile] [Attack] to suffuse the [Projectile|Projectiles] fired by that [Attack], causing them to trigger a Surging Blast when they reach the end of their flight.

Your weapon can have a maximum of 6 of each type of Surge active by default. Surges last 15 seconds. Surges are specific to your current weapon, so do not affect non-weapon damage and are not carried over if you weapon swap.

[Projectile|Projectiles] which [Split] or [Fork] do not gain the benefits of Surges.
Definition.zh:
元素涌动在你使用非[Melee|近战][Projectile|投射物][Attack|攻击]时被消耗，为该[Attack|攻击]发射的[Projectile|投射物]灌注力量，使它们在飞行结束时触发涌动冲击。

你的武器默认最多可以激活每种类型的元素涌动各 6 个。涌动持续 15 秒，仅对当前武器生效，不影响非武器伤害，切换武器时也不会继承。

[Split|分裂]或[Fork|分叉]的[Projectile|投射物]不会获得涌动的效果。

Definition.en: Chaos Surge behaves identically to [Surge|Elemental Surges], but causes a [Chaos] blast.
Definition.zh: 混沌涌动的效果与[Surge|元素涌动]完全相同，但触发的是[Chaos|混沌]冲击。

Definition.en:
Banner Skills generate [Glory] when you attack a Monster while it is activated. [Glory] generated corresponds to the [Power] of the Monster hit. Once at full [Glory], the Banner can be placed to create powerful [Buff|Buffing] Areas.
Normally you have a limit of a single Banner placed at one time.
Definition.zh:
旗帜技能在激活时攻击怪物会生成[Glory|荣耀]。生成的[Glory|荣耀]与被击中怪物的[Power|威力值]相对应。达到满[Glory|荣耀]后，可以放置旗帜来创造强大的[Buff|增益]区域。
通常你同时只能放置一面旗帜。

Definition.en: Skills which are Conditional require some sort of condition to be met before they can be used. [Combo] is an example of this, but almost anything can be a condition, such as having to have killed a certain number of enemies [Recently] or having to have moved a certain distance.
Definition.zh: 条件性技能只有在满足特定的条件之后才能使用。[Combo|连击]就是一个很好的例子，但几乎所有行动都可以作为条件，例如要求你[Recently|近期]击败一定数量的敌人，或者移动一定的距离。

Definition.en:
Whirlwinds [Blind] and [Slow] the movement speed of enemies within them.  If their creator crosses the edge of the Whirlwind it collapses, damaging and [Knockback|Knocking Back] enemies caught inside. The collapse deals [Melee] damage.

Trying to create a Whirlwind that would overlap with an existing Whirlwind instead moves the existing Whirlwind and grants it a stage, making it larger and more damaging.

A Whirlwind that overlaps an allied [ElementalGround|Elemental Ground Surface] takes on that element, gaining 50% of damage as the corresponding type and applying the Ground Surface's debuff to enemies inside the Whirlwind for 8 seconds.
Definition.zh:
旋风会使内部的敌人[Blind|致盲]并[Slow|减慢]其移动速度。旋风的产生者跨越旋风的边缘时会使其塌缩，对内部的敌人造成伤害和[Knockback|击退]。塌缩会造成[Melee|近战]伤害。

如果试图产生的旋风和现有的旋风重叠，则会改为移动现有的旋风并使其叠加一层，扩大范围并提高伤害。

与友军的[ElementalGround|元素地面效果]重叠的旋风会吸收元素的力量，获得 50% 对应类型的伤害，并对旋风内部的敌人施加地面效果的减益状态，持续 8 秒。

Definition.en:
Volatility explodes after 4 seconds, dealing 100 [Physical] Damage to you per Volatility. For 10 seconds after explosion, you will gain Volatile Power, [Gain|Gaining] 1% of Damage as [Chaos] for each Volatility which exploded. The explosion timer will reset on gaining another stack of Volatility.

Volatility can be gained once every 0.1 seconds, and the default maximum for Volatility stacks on you at once is 200.
Definition.zh:
无常会在 4 秒后爆炸，每层无常对你造成 100 [Physical|物理]伤害。爆炸后 10 秒内你会获得无常之力，爆炸的每层无常使你[Gain|获得] 1% 伤害的[Chaos|混沌]伤害。叠加无常层数会重置爆炸倒计时。

无常每 0.1 秒可以获得一次，你身上的无常最大堆叠层数默认为 200。

Definition.en:
While [Bleeding] enemies build up Bloodstained, gaining the Bloodstained [Debuff] after Bleeding for a total of 6 seconds. Bloodstained builds up 100% faster if the [Bleeding] enemy is moving or the Bleeding is [Aggravate|Aggravated].

Certain skills allow you to view the Bloodstained Debuff on enemies and can consume the Debuff for powerful effects.
Definition.zh:
[Bleeding|流血]的敌人会积蓄血痕，流血总计 6 秒后会获得血痕[Debuff|减益状态]。如果[Bleeding|流血]的敌人在移动，或者流血为[Aggravate|恶性]时，血痕的积蓄速度加快 100%。

部分技能允许你查看敌人身上的血痕减益状态，并消耗该减益状态来触发强力效果。

Definition.en: Revealed Weaknesses are highlighted on enemy Life bars, and occupy a total of 45% of their maximum Life (but in random segments). While the enemy's current Life is within a highlighted segment, they are considered to have an Open Weakness.
Definition.zh: 揭示的弱点会在敌人的生命条上标亮，总共占据其最大生命的 45%（但随机分段）。当敌人的当前生命位于标亮的分段中时，则视作弱点暴露。

Definition.en:
Affinity is a buff granted by the Trinity skill. There are three types of Affinity: Fire, Cold and Lightning. You can have a maximum of 100 of each type of Affinity.

You lose 10 Affinity per second of specific types if you haven't gained Affinity of that type in the past 8 seconds.
Definition.zh:
亲和是三位一体技能提供的增益状态，包含三种类型：火焰、冰霜和闪电。你可以拥有每种类型的亲和最多 100 点。

如果你在过去 8 秒内没有获得某一类型的亲和，则会每秒失去该类型的 10 点亲和。

Definition.en:
Incision is a Debuff which causes the affected target to gain increasingly higher chance to be inflicted with [Bleeding] when [HitDamage|Hit]. All Incision stacks are removed when [Bleeding] is inflicted.

Each stack of Incision applies 10% chance to be inflicted with [Bleeding] when [HitDamage|Hit]. A maximum of 10 Incision stacks can be present on a target at once.
Definition.zh:
创口是一种减益状态，使受影响的目标被[HitDamage|击中]时有更高的几率[Bleeding|流血]。造成[Bleeding|流血]时会移除所有创口层数。

每层创口使[HitDamage|击中]有 10% 的几率施加[Bleeding|流血]。同一目标同一时间最多叠加 10 层创口。

Definition.en:
Retaliating specifically refers only to the inherent ability to deal [Thorns] damage to enemies when they [HitDamage|Hit] you.

Some effects may cause you to deal [Thorns] damage in other ways, but those are not Retaliation, and effects which specifically care about when you Retaliate will ignore them.
Definition.zh:
反击特指敌人[HitDamage|击中]你时对其造成的[Thorns|荆棘]伤害。

部分效果能使你通过其他途径造成[Thorns|荆棘]伤害，但这些途径不属于反击，特别指明反击的效果将忽略这些途径。

Definition.en: Companions are a type of [Reviving] [Minion] that are more complex and powerful than typical [Minion|Minions]. By default you can only have one Companion of any type summoned at a time.
Definition.zh: 伙伴是一种[Reviving|可复活的][Minion|召唤生物]，和通常的[Minion|召唤生物]相比具有更复杂、更强大的能力。在默认情况下，你同一时间只能召唤一名任意类型的伙伴。

Definition.en:
Every Monster has exactly one Monster Category. These are Humanoid, Beast, Undead, Construct, Demon and Eldritch.

Certain Skills interact with specific Monster Categories.
Definition.zh:
每一种怪物都有具体的单一怪物类型，包括人形、野兽、亡灵、构造体、恶魔和古灵。

部分技能可以和特定的怪物类型产生互动。

Definition.en:
Hobbling a target lowers their [Evasion] by a specified amount. If this brings that target's [Evasion] value to 0, they are fully Hobbled for 12 seconds.

Hobble from Players lowers [Evasion] by 3 times as much against Normal Monsters and 2 times as much against Magic Monsters.
Definition.zh:
跛行会使目标的[Evasion|闪避]降低一定数值。如果该效果使目标的[Evasion|闪避]值降低至 0，则会使其在 12 秒内踉跄。

玩家造成的跛行降低的[Evasion|闪避]对普通怪物变为 3 倍，对魔法怪物变为 2 倍。

Definition.en: Hazards are objects created in the world (usually by some player skill) and which are destroyed when traversed by an enemy, dealing damage and/or applying some effect to the enemy which triggered the Hazard.
Definition.zh: 危害是在世界场景中产生的物体（通常由玩家击败敌人而生成），敌人穿越时会将其摧毁，对触发危害的敌人造成伤害并/或施加效果。

Definition.en: Unholy Might is a [Buff] that grants 30% of all damage as [Gain|extra] [Chaos|Chaos Damage].
Definition.zh: 不洁之力是一种[Buff|增益]状态，可提供相当于 30% 所有伤害的[Gain|额外][Chaos|混沌伤害]。

Definition.en:
Impale is a [Debuff] inflicted by [HitDamage|Hits], which stores 30% of the [Premitigation|Pre-mitigation] [Physical] [HitDamage|Hit damage] of the Impaling hit as its [BuffMagnitude|Magnitude].

Subsequent [Attack] [HitDamage|Hits] against Impaled targets will Extract the Impale debuff. When this occurs, the [BuffMagnitude|Magnitude] of the Impale is added to the [Premitigation|Pre-mitigation] [Physical] damage of that attack hit.

A maximum of 60 Impale [Debuff|Debuffs] can be present on a target at once. If multiple Impales are present on a target, each [Attack|Attack's] [HitDamage|Hit] only Extracts and benefits from the strongest one of them.
Definition.zh:
穿刺是一种由[HitDamage|击中]施加的[Debuff|减益状态]，造成穿刺的击中会将 30% 的[Premitigation|减免前][Physical|物理][HitDamage|击中伤害]存储为[BuffMagnitude|强度]。

对被穿刺目标的后续[Attack|攻击][HitDamage|击中]会提取穿刺减益状态。发生时，穿刺的[BuffMagnitude|强度]会添加到该次攻击击中的[Premitigation|减免前][Physical|物理]伤害中。

同一个目标同一时间最多叠加 60 层穿刺[Debuff|减益状态]。如果目标身上具有多个穿刺效果，每次[Attack|攻击][HitDamage|击中]只会提取并获得最强的穿刺效果的加成。

Definition.en: All [Physical] damage over time taken by a target (including [Bleeding]) is accumulated as Blood Loss.
Definition.zh: 目标受到的所有[Physical|物理]持续伤害（包括[Bleeding|流血]）都会积累为失血。

Definition.en:
Perfection lasts for 10 seconds and can stack up to 4 times, granting 5% more Damage per stack. This Damage bonus is not limited to Skills Supported by Perfection Support.

Failing to successfully execute any [PerfectTiming|Perfect Timing] will remove all Perfection stacks on you.
Definition.zh:
完美持续 10 秒，最多可以叠加 4 层，每层使伤害总增 5%。该伤害加成也会对不受完美（辅）辅助的技能生效。

未能抓住[PerfectTiming|完美时机]会移除你身上的所有完美层数。

Definition.en: A Killing Blow is any [HitDamage|Hit Damage] which successfully reduces a target to zero Life, killing them. Damage over time cannot cause Killing Blows.
Definition.zh: 最后一击指的是任意将目标的生命值降低至零并将其击败的[HitDamage|击中伤害]。持续性伤害不能造成最后一击。

Definition.en:
Hits with this weapon roll against their [Critical|Critical Hit] chance twice when determining if they are a [Critical|Critical Hit].

If either roll succeeds, the hit will be a [Critical|Critical Hit], and thus the [CriticalDamageBonus|Critical Damage Bonus] will apply as normal.

If both rolls succeed, the hit will be a [Critical|Critical Hit], and the [CriticalDamageBonus|Critical Damage Bonus] will apply twice to that Hit.

If a modifier makes your Critical Hit Chance [Lucky], that Luck will apply individually to both of these rolls.
Definition.zh:
该武器的击中结算是否造成[Critical|暴击]时，会根据其[Critical|暴击]率判断两次。

如果任意一次结算成功，则击中为[Critical|暴击]，并使[CriticalDamageBonus|暴击伤害加成]正常生效。

如果两次结算全部成功，则击中为[Critical|暴击]，并使该次击中的[CriticalDamageBonus|暴击伤害加成]翻倍。

如果有词缀使你的暴击率[Lucky|特别幸运]，两次结算会独立判断幸运。

Definition.en:
Your Pre-mitigation Damage is the damage of your hits after all your modifiers to damage have been applied, but before the target's mitigation, such as [Armour], [Resistances] or [Block|Blocking], prevents any of that damage.

The target's modifiers to Damage taken apply after their mitigation, so Pre-mitigation Damage also does not include the effects of those modifiers. However, modifiers that cause the target to take damage as a different [DamageTypes|Type] occur before mitigating the damage, so are included in Pre-mitigation Damage.
Definition.zh:
你的减免前伤害指的是击中获得所有伤害词缀加成，但未经[Armour|护甲]、[Resistances|抗性]或[Block|格挡]等效果减免前的伤害。

目标受到伤害的词缀会在减免之后结算，所以减免前伤害不受这些词缀的效果影响。然而，使目标受到的伤害转换[DamageTypes|类型]的效果会在减免之前生效，所以会影响到减免前伤害。

Definition.en: Easy Target is a [Debuff] which causes the next [Projectile] [Attack] [HitDamage|Hit] against the affected target to deal increased Damage, at which point the [Debuff] is consumed.
Definition.zh: 活靶子是一个[Debuff|减益状态]，使受影响目标受到的下一次[Projectile|投射物][Attack|攻击][HitDamage|击中]造成更高的伤害，同时消耗该[Debuff|减益状态]。

Definition.en: The Expected Knockback distance is the distance a target would be [Knockback|Knocked Back] were there nothing impeding that [Knockback], such as terrain, other entities, or other mitigating circumstances.
Definition.zh: 预期击退距离指的是在不受地形、其他实体或减免效果等[Knockback|击退]限制影响时，目标本应被[Knockback|击退]的距离。

Definition.en:
Rogue Exiles are dangerous foes that wander Wraeclast and Maps. 
They have access to the same Skills, Items, and Uniques that you do. This can make them very formidable opponents - however, if they can be defeated they will drop a full set of gear, including any [Rarity|Unique] equipment that they were using in combat.
If any Rogue Exile manages to defeat you, they will portal away, taking their equipment with them.
Definition.zh:
盗贼流放者是游荡于瓦尔克拉斯与地图中的危险敌人。
他们拥有与你相同的技能、物品与传奇物品，因此极具威胁性——但若你击败他们，他们将掉落一整套装备，包括他们战斗时所使用的任何[Rarity|传奇]装备。
若任何盗贼流放者击败你，他们将开启传送门，并携带他们的装备逃走。

Definition.en:
Azmeri Spirits are the spirits of various Azmeri Animal Guardians. 
Azmeri Spirits appear as wisps that flee as you approach them. [Rarity|Normal or Magic] Monsters the Spirit comes into contact with become [SpiritTouched|Spirit-Influenced], making them more powerful.
