Sometimes the Spirit will reach and [SpiritPossessed|Possess] a [Rarity|Rare or Unique] monster, making them substantially stronger and rewarding while occasionally summoning spiritual animals depending on the type of Animal Spirit they represent.
[SpiritPossessed|Possessed] monsters are more rewarding depending on how many [SpiritTouched|Spirit-Influenced] monsters were defeated leading up to possession.
Definition.zh:
阿兹莫里之灵是各类阿兹莫里动物守卫的灵魂。
阿兹莫里之灵表现为当你接近时会逃走的灵光。被其接触的[Rarity|普通或魔法]怪物将成为[SpiritTouched|灵魂影响]怪物，变得更强。
有时灵魂会[SpiritPossessed|附身]于一只[Rarity|稀有或传奇]怪物上，使其大幅强化并提高掉落奖励，偶尔会依照其代表的动物灵魂类型召唤灵体动物。
[SpiritPossessed|附身]怪物的掉落奖励会依据在附身前你击败了多少[SpiritTouched|灵魂影响]怪物而提升。

Definition.en:
A Possessed monster is a [Rarity|Rare or Unique] monster that has had an [AzmeriSpirit|Azmeri Spirit] enter and empower them. The possessed monster is empowered by the spirit and gains bonuses depending on the type of Spirit that possessed them. Occasionally the possessed monster will summon spiritual animals depending on the type of Animal Spirit they represent.
Possessed monsters are more rewarding depending on how many [SpiritTouched|Spirit-Influenced] monsters were defeated leading up to possession.
Definition.zh:
附身怪物是被[AzmeriSpirit|阿兹莫里之灵]进入并强化的[Rarity|稀有或传奇]怪物。附身怪物会被灵体强化，根据附身灵体类型获得加成，有时还会根据附身灵体的动物种类召唤相应的灵体动物。
击败更多[SpiritTouched|灵魂影响]怪物能提升最终附身怪物的奖励。

Definition.en:
A Spirit-Influenced monster is a [Rarity|Normal or Magic] monster that has been passed through by an [AzmeriSpirit|Azmeri Spirit]. These monsters are empowered by the spirit and gain bonuses depending on the type of Spirit that passed through them. 
Defeating Spirit-Influenced monsters makes the resulting [SpiritPossessed|Possessed] monster more rewarding.
Definition.zh:
灵魂影响怪物是被[AzmeriSpirit|阿兹莫里之灵]穿越的[Rarity|普通或魔法]怪物。它们会根据穿越其的灵魂种类获得加成。
击败这些怪物将提高之后出现的[SpiritPossessed|附身]怪物的掉落奖励。

Definition.en: Random Extra Content is [Shrine|Shrines], [Strongbox|Strongboxes], [Essence|Essences], [RogueExile|Rogue Exiles], [AzmeriSpirit|Azmeri Spirits] and [StoneSummoningCircle|Summoning Circles].
Definition.zh: 随机额外内容包括了[Shrine|神龛]、[Strongbox|保险箱]、[Essence|精华]、[RogueExile|盗贼流放者]、[AzmeriSpirit|阿兹莫里之灵]和[StoneSummoningCircle|召唤法阵]。

Definition.en: Seeking [Shrine|Shrines] grant increased [ItemRarity|Rarity] of Items Found.
Definition.zh: 寻觅[Shrine|神龛]可以提高找到的物品的[ItemRarity|稀有度]。

Definition.en: Enlightening [Shrine|Shrines] cause you to gain increased Experience.
Definition.zh: 启迪[Shrine|神龛]可以提高你获得的经验值。

Definition.en: Gloom [Shrine|Shrines] cause you to [Gain|Gain] Damage as Extra [Chaos] Damage and slain enemies can explode dealing Chaos Damage based on their maximum Life.
Definition.zh: 隐忍[Shrine|神龛]使你[Gain|获得]额外[Chaos|混沌]伤害，且被击杀的敌人会爆炸，造成基于其最大生命的混沌伤害。

Definition.en: Greed [Shrine|Shrines] cause item drops to be converted to Gold and monsters to drop increased Gold.
Definition.zh: 贪婪[Shrine|神龛]会使掉落的物品转化为金币，并使怪物掉落更多金币。

Definition.en: Cartographer's [Strongbox|Strongboxes] drop [Waystone|Waystones].
Definition.zh: 制图师的[Strongbox|保险箱]会掉落[Waystone|引路石]。

Definition.en: Researcher's [Strongbox|Strongboxes] drop Currency items.
Definition.zh: 研究员的[Strongbox|保险箱]会掉落通货物品。

Definition.en: Ornate [Strongbox|Strongboxes] have improved dropped [ItemRarity|Item Rarity].
Definition.zh: 华丽的[Strongbox|保险箱]掉落物品的[ItemRarity|物品稀有度]较高。

Definition.en: Basic [Strongbox|Strongboxes] are specifically named "Strongbox" and drop random items.
Definition.zh: 基础[Strongbox|保险箱]就是那些直接叫“保险箱”的箱子，打开会掉落随机物品。

Definition.en:
Some effects manipulate how random chances are rolled in ways that affect the result without changing the stated chance for the effect, such as a chance being [Lucky] causing it to be rolled twice and use the better result, or an effect skipping the roll entirely to force something to succeed or fail. The Effective chance is the real chance to get a specific result, accounting for all such roll-manipulating effects.

For example, if you had a [Critical|Critical Hit] chance of 20%, and your Critical Hit chance was [Lucky], you would have an Effective Critical Hit chance of 36%, which is the chance that at least one of the two 20% rolls succeeds.
Definition.zh:
部分效果可以影响随机几率的选取方式，在不改变效果的规定几率的同时，对其结果产生影响，例如[Lucky|特别幸运]会使其结算两次并使用最佳的结果，有些效果可以直接跳过随机，使结算强制成功或失败。实际几率是考虑到所有影响随机的效果之后获得某项结果的真实几率。

例如，如果你的[Critical|暴击]率为 20%，暴击率[Lucky|特别幸运]，你的实际暴击率为 36%，也就是两次 20% 的随机中有一次成功过的几率。

Definition.en:
[Bleeding] you inflict is [Aggravate|Aggravated]
Base [Bleeding] Duration is 1 second
50% more [BuffMagnitude|Magnitude] of [Bleeding] you inflict
Definition.zh:
你造成的[Bleeding|流血]效果为[Aggravate|恶性]
基础[Bleeding|流血]持续时间为 1 秒
你施加的[Bleeding|流血]效果[BuffMagnitude|强度]提高 50%

Definition.en: Weapon, [EquipArmour|Armour], Belt, and [Jewellery] Items are Equipped to the character in the Inventory Panel. Flasks, Skill Gems, and Jewels are never considered to be Equipped.
Definition.zh: 武器、[EquipArmour|护甲]、腰带和[Jewellery|饰品]物品可以装备在角色的物品栏位里。药剂、技能宝石和珠宝不视作已装备。

Definition.en: Amulets and Rings are considered Jewellery
Definition.zh: 项链和戒指属于饰品

Definition.en: Equipment are items that can be [Equipped]
Definition.zh: 装备是角色能够穿戴并视作[Equipped|已装备]的物品

Definition.en:
[HitDamage|Hits] from a weapon or skill with this property will not roll a random value between the minimum or maximum damage value, but instead will always roll either the minimum value or the maximum value, with a 50% chance for each.

Each [DamageTypes|Damage Type] has its damage value rolled separately, so if the hit deals multiple types of damage, some types may roll the maximum while others roll minimum.

If the damage rolls are [Lucky], that will still apply, make this roll twice and picking the maximum if either roll had that result, only picking minimum damage if both rolls selected minimum. Unlucky damage rolls will prefer minimum damage in the same way.
Definition.zh:
如果武器或技能具有此属性，则其造成的的[HitDamage|击中]不会在最小或最大伤害值之间随机选取，而是必定选取最小或最大值，几率各为 50%。

每种[DamageTypes|伤害类型]的伤害值都会独立选取，如果该击中造成多种类型的伤害，部分伤害类型可能选取到最大值，也有部分可能选取到最小值。

如果伤害随机[Lucky|特别幸运]，该效果依然会生效并进行两次随机，若有一次最大则选取最大值，若都为最小则选取最小值。特别不幸的结算方式相同，但偏向于最小伤害。

Definition.en:
You can have two [Companion|Companions] of different types
30% more [Reservation] [Efficiency] of [Companion] Skills
20% less [Reservation] [Efficiency] of non-[Companion] Skills
Definition.zh:
你可以拥有两个不同类型的[Companion|伙伴]
[Companion|伙伴]技能的[ReservationEfficiency|保留效能]总增 30%
非[Companion|伙伴]技能的[ReservationEfficiency|保留效能]总降 20%

Definition.en: Absorption effects include [Guard], Encased in Jade and Sorcery Ward.
Definition.zh: 吸收效果包括了[Guard|防卫]、青玉囚笼和元素结界。

Definition.en: Parry is a Skill granted by [Buckler|Bucklers] that allows you to [Block] and retaliate against an enemy [HitDamage|Hit], leaving them off balance and inflicting the [ParriedDebuff|Parried Debuff].
Definition.zh: 招架是由[Buckler|轻盾]提供的技能，使你能够[Block|格挡]并反击敌人的[HitDamage|击中]，使敌人失去平衡并施加[ParriedDebuff|被招架减益状态]。

Definition.en: Enemies you [Parry] with a [Buckler] take more [Attack] Damage and cannot [Evasion|Evade] [Attack|Attacks] for a duration.
Definition.zh: 被你使用[Buckler|轻盾]成功[Parry|招架]的敌人在短时间内会受到更高的[Attack|攻击]伤害，并且无法[Evasion|闪避][Attack|攻击]。

Definition.en: When you reach full [EnergyShield|Energy Shield], [Sacrifice] all [EnergyShield|Energy Shield] to gain +5% to all [MaximumResistances|Maximum Resistances] for 4 seconds
Definition.zh: [EnergyShield|能量护盾]回满时，[Sacrifice|牺牲]所有[EnergyShield|能量护盾]，使所有[MaximumResistances|抗性上限]在 4 秒内 +5%

Definition.en:
This effect will occur when a hit with the weapon directly causes at least one [Bleeding] [Debuff] on the target to become [Aggravate|Aggravated].

It will not occur if an on-hit effect tries to [Aggravate] [Bleeding] but there are no [Bleeding] [Debuff|Debuffs] on the target to [Aggravate], or all of them are already [Aggravate|Aggravated], since no [Bleeding] [Debuff|Debuffs] will be [Aggravate|Aggravated] by that hit.
Definition.zh:
该效果会在武器直接击中时生效，使目标身上的至少一个[Bleeding|流血][Debuff|减益状态]变为[Aggravate|恶性]。

如果击中时效果尝试使[Bleeding|流血]变为[Aggravate|恶性]，但目标身上没有能变为[Aggravate|恶性]的[Bleeding|流血][Debuff|减益状态]，或者所有效果都已处于[Aggravate|恶性]状态，则该次击中不会使任何[Bleeding|流血][Debuff|减益状态]变为[Aggravate|恶性]，并将该效果视作没有生效。

Definition.en: Skills with a Detonation Time [Detonator|Detonate] once this time has elapsed. This time is not affected by duration modifiers.
Definition.zh: 具有引爆时间的技能会在经过指定的时间后[Detonator|引爆]。该时间不受持续时间词缀的影响。

Definition.en:
Only the Final [PowerfulMapBoss|Powerful Map Boss] in a Map Area has a chance to drop a [Waystone] of a higher tier than the tier of that Map Area.

The chance diminishes the higher the tier of the [Waystone] used to the create the Map Area, but can be increased again by adding modifiers to [Waystone|Waystones], additional modifiers on [Waystone|Waystones] can give increased chance for [Waystone|Waystones] to drop in the Map Areas they create.
Definition.zh:
只有地图区域中的最终[PowerfulMapBoss|强力地图首领]才有几率掉落比该地图区域更高阶的[Waystone|引路石]。

使用高阶[Waystone|引路石]创建地图区域时，此掉落几率会降低，但可以通过为[Waystone|引路石]添加词缀再次提高。额外的[Waystone|引路石]词缀也能增加其生成的地图区域中掉落[Waystone|引路石]的几率。

Definition.en:
The final [Rarity|Rare Monster] slain in a Map Area has a chance to drop a [Waystone] equal to the tier of the [Waystone] used to create that Map Area. 

The chance diminishes the tier of the [Waystone] used to the create the Map Area, but can be increased again by adding modifiers to [Waystone|Waystones], additional modifiers on [Waystone|Waystones] can give increased chance for [Waystone|Waystones] to drop in the Map Areas they create.
Definition.zh:
地图区域中被击败的最后一只[Rarity|稀有怪物]有几率掉落与该区域所使用的[Waystone|引路石]同阶的[Waystone|引路石]。

使用高阶[Waystone|引路石]创建地图区域时，此掉落几率会降低，但可以通过为[Waystone|引路石]添加词缀再次提高。额外的[Waystone|引路石]词缀也能增加其生成的地图区域中掉落[Waystone|引路石]的几率。

Definition.en: A Corrupted Nexus is the source of immense corruption, guarded by a powerful [CorruptedBoss|Corrupted Boss].
Definition.zh: 腐化枢纽是强大的腐化源头，有一名强大的[CorruptedBoss|腐化首领]守卫着这里。

Definition.en: Each [CorruptedNexus|Corrupted Nexus] is guarded by a powerful Corrupted Boss. Defeat the Corrupted Boss to cleanse the Nexus.
Definition.zh: 每个[CorruptedNexus|腐化枢纽]都由一名强大的腐化首领守卫。击败腐化首领来扫清枢纽。

Definition.en: Irradiated Areas have +1 to Monster Level
Definition.zh: 能量辐照的区域的怪物等级 +1

Definition.en: This allows your [Thorns] to [ThornsRetaliation|Retaliate] against any kind of [HitDamage|Hit] dealt to you by enemies, rather than just [Melee] [Attack|Attacks], except that you can never [ThornsRetaliation|Retaliate] against the enemy's [Thorns] damage.
Definition.zh: 使你的[Thorns|荆棘]能够对敌人对你造成的所有类型[HitDamage|击中]发起[ThornsRetaliation|反击]，而非仅限于[Melee|近战][Attack|攻击]，但敌人的[Thorns|荆棘]伤害依然无法[ThornsRetaliation|反击]。

Definition.en:
[UpfrontCost|Upfront Costs] will result in taking the damage all at once as a [HitDamage|Hit].

A per-second costs will instead result in taking Damage per second, which is damage over time, and thus not a [HitDamage|Hit].
Definition.zh:
[UpfrontCost|预支花费]会使你立即受到等额的[HitDamage|击中]伤害。

每秒消耗会每秒造成伤害，即不属于[HitDamage|击中]的持续伤害。

Definition.en:
An upfront cost is one that lists just an amount of resource to pay, rather than a per-second rate to pay at.

"3 Mana" is an Upfront Cost, while "3 Mana per second" is not.
Definition.zh:
预支花费指的是按固定数额列出的资源花费，而不是每秒花费。

“3 点魔力值”属于预支花费，“每秒 3 点魔力值”则不属于。

Definition.en: Account Bound items cannot be traded to other players, but can be shared between other characters on your account.
Definition.zh: 账户绑定物品无法与其他玩家交易，但可在你账户内的角色间共享。

Definition.en: A monster empowered by an Essence of Delirium will periodically summon the demons that lay behind the [ContainsDelirium|Delirium] Mirror.
Definition.zh: 被谵妄精华强化的怪物会周期性召唤受困于[ContainsDelirium|惊悸迷雾]之镜的恶魔。

Definition.en:
The Corruption in this area has been Cleansed, which may add an additional modifier to the area.

Cleansed areas also contain monsters twisted by the disruption of power in the area.
Definition.zh:
此区域的腐化已被净化，可能为区域添加额外词缀。

净化区域还包含因区域力量紊乱而扭曲的怪物。

Definition.en:
Delirious players are assaulted by illusions, making combat more difficult. Higher delirium causes monsters to deal more damage and have additional [Toughness]. It can also cause additional monsters to appear or can grant additional modifiers to existing monsters. Monster item drops are improved by higher delirium.

Maps within Fog Banks gain Deliriousness as [MapBoss|Map Bosses], [Rarity|Rare] Monsters or Unique Monsters are killed.
Definition.zh:
亢奋玩家受到幻象侵扰，使战斗变得更加困难。亢奋度越高，怪物造成伤害的越高并拥有额外[Toughness|韧性]。还有几率出现额外的怪物，或为现有怪物给予额外词缀。亢奋度越高，怪物的物品掉落就会越好。

迷雾云团内的地图会在[MapBoss|地图首领]、[Rarity|稀有]怪物或传奇怪物被击杀时获得亢奋度。

Definition.en: By default, chance-based stats cap at 100% chance for the result to occur. However, some chances can exceed 100%. Unless otherwise specified, a chance higher than 100% is equivalent to 100% chance - the chance always succeeds. But some effects may scale based on how high the chance is or how much it exceeds 100% by.
Definition.zh: 默认情况下，基于几率的属性上限为 100%，即结果必然发生。但是，某些几率可以超过 100%。除非特别说明，超过 100% 的几率通常等同于 100% 成功率——结果必定触发。但某些效果可能会根据几率的高低或超出 100% 的幅度，按比例计算。

Definition.en:
Players possessed by the Spirit Of The Owl have 60% increased [EnergyShield|Energy Shield], 80% increased Damage and [Gain] 20% of Damage as Extra [Cold] Damage.
Players will also periodically summon a spiritual Owl that conjures a [Cold] tornado.
Definition.zh:
被枭之灵附身的玩家使[EnergyShield|能量护盾]提高 60%、伤害提高 80%，并[Gain|获得]附加[Cold|冰霜]伤害，相当于伤害的 20%。
玩家还会定期召唤灵魂枭，召唤出[Cold|冰霜]龙卷风。

Definition.en:
Players possessed by the Spirit Of The Serpent have [DamageTypes|All Damage] from [HitDamage|Hits] [Contributes|Contributes] to [Poison] Magnitude, Always [Poison] on [HitDamage|Hit] and 80% increased Damage.
Players will also be accompanied by Spiritual Snakes that periodically strike enemies.
Definition.zh:
被蛇之灵附身的玩家[HitDamage|击中]的[DamageTypes|所有伤害]会[Contributes|作用于][Poison|中毒]强度，[HitDamage|击中]时必定[Poison|中毒]，伤害提高 80%。
玩家还会有灵魂之蛇陪伴，定期攻击敌人。

Definition.en:
Players possessed by the Spirit Of The Primate have [DamageTypes|All Damage] from [HitDamage|Hits] [Contributes|Contributes] to [Chill] Magnitude, 60% Increased [Freeze] Buildup and 80% increased Damage.
Players will also periodically summon a group of spiritual Primates.
Definition.zh:
被狂猿之灵附身的玩家[HitDamage|击中]的[DamageTypes|所有伤害]会[Contributes|作用于][Chill|冰缓]强度，[Freeze|冰冻]积蓄提高 60%，伤害提高 80%。
玩家还会定期召唤一群灵魂狂猿。

Definition.en:
Players possessed by the Spirit Of The Bear have 20% Increased Maximum Life, 60% increased [StunThreshold|Stun Threshold], 60% increased [Stun|Stun] Buildup and 20% reduced damage taken.
Players will also periodically summon a spiritual Bear that uses slam attacks.
Definition.zh:
被巨熊之灵附身的玩家使最大生命提高 20%、[StunThreshold|晕眩阈值]提高 60%、[Stun|晕眩]积蓄提高 60% 且受到的伤害降低 20%。
玩家还会定期召唤使用猛击攻击的灵魂巨熊。

Definition.en:
Players possessed by the Spirit Of The Boar [Gain] 20% of Damage as Extra [Fire] Damage, always inflict [Bleeding] on [HitDamage|Hit] and have 20% reduced damage taken.
Players will also periodically summon spiritual Boars that explode, dealing [Fire] Damage.
Definition.zh:
被野猪之灵附身的玩家[Gain|获得]附加[Fire|火焰]伤害，相当于伤害的20%，[HitDamage|击中]时必定造成[Bleeding|流血]，受到的伤害降低 20%。
玩家还会定期召唤会产生爆炸并造成[Fire|火焰]伤害的灵魂野猪。

Definition.en:
Players possessed by the Spirit Of The Ox have 50% reduced [Slow|Slowing] Potency of [Debuff|Debuffs] on them, 60% increased [AilmentThreshold|Elemental Ailment Threshold] and [Armour] and 20% reduced damage taken.
Players will also periodically summon a spiritual stampede of Oxen that tramples over enemies.
Definition.zh:
被蛮牛之灵附身的玩家身上[Debuff|减益状态]的[Slow|减速]效果降低 50%，[AilmentThreshold|元素异常状态阈值]和[Armour|护甲]提高 60%，受到伤害降低 20%。
玩家还会定期召唤灵魂蛮牛，冲锋并践踏敌人。

Definition.en:
Players possessed by the Spirit Of The Wolf have 50% chance to [Maim|Maim] on [Attack] [HitDamage|Hit], 30% increased [SkillSpeed|Skill Speed], 15% increased Movement Speed and [ArmourBreak|Break Armour] equal to 10% of [HitDamage|Hit Damage] dealt.
Players will also periodically summon a spiritual Wolf which uses a dash attack.
Definition.zh:
被头狼之灵附身的玩家[Attack|攻击][HitDamage|击中]时有 50% 几率造成[Maim|瘫痪]，[SkillSpeed|技能速度]提高 30%，移动速度提高 15%，且造成相当于[HitDamage|击中伤害] 10% 的[ArmourBreak|粉碎护甲]。
玩家还会定期召唤使用冲刺攻击的灵魂头狼。

Definition.en:
Players possessed by the Spirit Of The Stag have +30% to all [ElementalDamage|Elemental] [Resistances], 30% increased [SkillSpeed|Skill Speed], 15% increased Movement Speed and [Gain] 20% of Damage as Extra [Lightning] Damage.
Players will also periodically summon a spiritual Stag that calls down [Lightning] bolts.
Definition.zh:
被雄鹿之灵附身的玩家所有[ElementalDamage|元素][Resistances|抗性] +30%，[SkillSpeed|技能速度]提高 30%，移动速度提高 15%，且[Gain|获得]附加[Lightning|闪电]伤害，相当于造成伤害的 20%。
玩家还会定期召唤的灵魂雄鹿发射[Lightning|闪电]光束。

Definition.en:
Players possessed by the Spirit Of The Cat have 60% increased [Evasion] Rating, 100% increased [Critical|Critical Hit chance], 30% increased [SkillSpeed|Skill Speed] and 15% increased Movement Speed.
Players will also periodically summon a ravaging flurry of spiritual Cats.
Definition.zh:
被豹之灵附身的玩家的[Evasion|闪避]率提高 60%，[Critical|暴击率]提高 100%，[SkillSpeed|技能速度]提高 30%，移动速度提高 15%。
玩家还会定期召唤灵魂豹群，肆虐攻击敌人。

Definition.en: Players possessed by Spirits of the Azmeri gain powerful buffs depending on what Spirit Animal has possessed them. Spiritual beasts will occasionally be summoned to aid the player. Players can only be possessed by one Spirit at a time.
Definition.zh: 被阿兹莫里之灵附身的玩家会根据附身的灵魂之兽获得强力增益。阿兹莫里之灵偶尔会召唤灵魂之兽协助玩家。玩家同时只能被一个灵魂附身。

Definition.en: Vulnerability is a [Curse] that lowers the [Armour] of those affected. If not otherwise specified, Vulnerability removes 191 [Armour].
Definition.zh: 脆弱是一种能够降低受影响者[Armour|护甲]的[Curse|诅咒]。除非另有说明，否则脆弱移除 191 点[Armour|护甲]。

Definition.en: Despair is a [Curse] that lowers the [Chaos] [Resistances|Resistance] of those affected. If not otherwise specified, Despair lowers [Chaos] [Resistances|Resistance] by 25%.
Definition.zh: 绝望是一种能够降低受影响者[Chaos|混沌][Resistances|抗性]的[Curse|诅咒]。除非另有说明，否则绝望使[Chaos|混沌][Resistances|抗性]降低 25%。

Definition.en: Temporal Chains is a [Curse] that [Slow|slows] those affected and makes other effects on them expire more slowly. If not otherwise specified, Temporal Chains [Slow|slows] by 26%.
Definition.zh: 时空锁链是一种[Curse|诅咒]，能够让受影响者[Slow|减速]并使其身上其他效果削减速度变慢。除非另有说明，是否时空锁链使目标[Slow|减速] 26%。

Definition.en:
Damage from your [HitDamage|Hits] will effectively ignore the value of the target's relevant [Resistances|Resistance], and instead be mitigated by the specified value of [Resistances|Resistance].

This will still occur even if you [IgnoreResistances|Ignore] the target's [Resistances|Resistance], as this mitigation is not based on their [Resistances|Resistance] stats. Similarly, [Penetration] will not apply to this [Resistances|Resistance] value.
Definition.zh:
你[HitDamage|击中]的伤害不再受目标[Resistances|抗性]影响，转而按指定[Resistances|抗性]数值减免。

即使你[IgnoreResistances|无视]目标[Resistances|抗性]，此效果依然生效，因为该减免与目标自身[Resistances|抗性]属性无关。同样，[Penetration|穿透]也不会影响此指定[Resistances|抗性]数值。

Definition.en:
Glory is a resource that must be spent to use certain powerful Skills. These Skills each have a method of generating Glory, and actions taken against enemies will generate Glory equal to the monster's [Power]. Different Skills gain and lose Glory separately, and each Skill can only generate Glory once every 0.5 seconds per monster.

Different Skills have different Glory requirements. Skills lose 2 Glory per second if they haven't gained Glory in the past 15 seconds. You cannot gain Glory for a Skill while any instance of that Skill is active unless that Skill is a [Banner], but different Skills can generate Glory from the same Glorious action.
Definition.zh:
荣耀是某些强大技能必须消耗的资源。这些技能都有各自生成荣耀的方式，对敌人采取的行动会生成与怪物[Power|威力值]等量的荣耀。不同技能分别获得和失去荣耀，每个技能每 0.5 秒对每个怪物只能生成一次荣耀。

不同技能有不同的荣耀需求。如果技能在过去 15 秒内未获得荣耀，则每秒损失 2 点荣耀。技能的任意效果激活时无法为该技能获得荣耀，除非该技能是[Banner|旗帜]，但不同技能可以从同一荣耀行动中生成荣耀。

Definition.en:
Players with Mounting Greed gain increased [ItemRarity|Rarity of Items] on kill up to a limit of 100%. This increased Rarity decays over time.

Higher [Rarity] monsters grant a greater amount of Rarity.
Definition.zh:
拥有贪婪积聚的玩家击败敌人时会获得更高的掉落[ItemRarity|物品稀有度]，最多可达 100%。该稀有度增益会随时间递减。

[Rarity|稀有度]更高的怪物提供更多稀有度增益。

Definition.en: An Obelisk of Corruption is an object that activates once a player gets close enough; granting a 10 second [Buff] that makes enemies killed by you explode, dealing 10% of their life as [Physical] damage.
Definition.zh: 腐化尖碑会在靠近后激活。你会获得持续 10 秒的[Buff|增益效果]，使你击败的敌人爆炸，造成相当于其 10% 生命的[Physical|物理]伤害。

Definition.en: An Obelisk of Cleansing is an object that activates once a player gets close enough; granting a 10 second [Buff] that grants 100% [ItemRarity|Item Rarity], 50% increased [Armour], [Evasion] and [EnergyShield|Energy Shield] and makes players [Gain] 30% of Damage as extra [Lightning] Damage.
Definition.zh: 净化尖碑会在靠近后激活。你会获得持续10秒的[Buff|增益效果]，提升 100% 的[ItemRarity|物品稀有度]、提高 50%[Armour|护甲]，[Evasion|闪避]和[EnergyShield|能量护盾]，并[Gain|获得] 30% 的额外[Lightning|闪电]伤害。

Definition.en: The Immured Fury is a powerful monster that has appeared due to the Cleansing process. This monster has dangerous abilities but greatly increased rewards.
Definition.zh: 禁锢之怒是因净化过程而出现的强大怪物，虽然技能危险，但掉落奖励极为丰厚。

Definition.en: A Fractured Modifier is locked onto the item permanently. It cannot be removed or altered.
Definition.zh: 分裂词缀是永久锁定在物品上的词缀，无法被移除或改变。

Definition.en:
Your character has two Weapon Sets that can be used independently by equipping items into both sets.

By default your Skills will use the currently active Weapon Set if possible, or automatically swap to your other Weapon Set if required to use the Skill. You can also specify the Weapon Set you want to automatically swap to for each Skill in that Skill's information panel.

In addition to changing your active items, Weapon Sets also have [WeaponSetPassiveSkillPoints|dedicated Passive Skill Points] that can be allocated differently in each Weapon Set.

Weapon Sets can have differing amounts of available [Spirit], due to weapons with Spirit (such as [Sceptre|Sceptres]), [WeaponSetPassiveSkillPoints|Weapon Set Passive Skills], or [Persistent] Skills that are active in specific Weapon Sets.
Definition.zh:
你的角色有两个武器组，可在每个组中独立装备物品。

默认情况下，技能会尽可能使用当前激活的武器组，或在需要时自动切换。你也可在技能信息面板中为每个技能指定要自动切换的武器组。

武器组除了改变激活的装备外，还有各自的[WeaponSetPassiveSkillPoints|天赋点配置]，你可分别为两个武器组配置天赋点数。

武器组可能具有不同数量的[Spirit|精魂]，这取决于具有精魂的武器（如[Sceptre|权杖]）、[WeaponSetPassiveSkillPoints|武器组天赋技能]或在特定武器组中激活的[Persistent|持续]技能。

__col4.en:
Your character has two Weapon Sets that can be used independently by equipping items into both sets.

By default your Skills will use the currently active Weapon Set if possible, or automatically swap to your other Weapon Set if required to use the Skill. You can also specify the Weapon Set you want to automatically swap to for each Skill in that Skill's setting menu.

In addition to changing your active items, Weapon Sets also have [WeaponSetPassiveSkillPoints|dedicated Passive Skill Points] that can be allocated differently in each Weapon Set.

Weapon Sets can have differing amounts of available [Spirit], due to weapons with Spirit (such as [Sceptre|Sceptres]), [WeaponSetPassiveSkillPoints|Weapon Set Passive Skills], or [Persistent] Skills that are active in specific Weapon Sets.
__col4.zh:
你的角色有两个武器组，可在每个组中独立装备物品。

默认情况下，技能会尽可能使用当前激活的武器组，或在需要时自动切换。你也可在技能设置菜单中为每个技能指定要自动切换的武器组。

武器组除了改变激活的装备外，还有各自的[WeaponSetPassiveSkillPoints|天赋点配置]，你可分别为两个武器组配置天赋点数。

武器组可能具有不同数量的[Spirit|精魂]，这取决于具有精魂的武器（如[Sceptre|权杖]）、[WeaponSetPassiveSkillPoints|武器组天赋技能]或在特定武器组中激活的[Persistent|持续]技能。

Definition.en: Monster fires 4 additional [Projectile|Projectiles].
Definition.zh: 怪物发射 4 个额外[Projectile|投射物]。

Definition.en: Monster has 100% Increased Area of Effect.
Definition.zh: 怪物的效果区域扩大 100%。

Definition.en: Monster [ArmourBreak|Breaks Armour] equal to 1000% of [Physical] Damage dealt.
Definition.zh: 怪物[ArmourBreak|粉碎护甲]，相当于造成[Physical|物理]伤害的 1000%。

Definition.en: Monster periodically unleashes barrages of [Fire] projectiles.
Definition.zh: 怪物周期性发射[Fire|火焰]投射物弹幕。

Definition.en: Monster has +50% to [Resistances|Chaos Resistance].
Definition.zh: 怪物的[Resistances|混沌抗性] +50%。

Definition.en: Monster has +50% to [Resistances|Cold Resistance] and +10% to [MaximumResistances|Maximum Cold Resistance].
Definition.zh: 怪物的[Resistances|冰霜抗性] +50%，[MaximumResistances|最大冰霜抗性] +10%。

Definition.en: Monster has 300% increased chance to [Critical|Critically Hit].
Definition.zh: 怪物的[Critical|暴击]几率提高 300%。

Definition.en: Monster [Gain|Gains] 40% of damage as extra [Chaos] damage.
Definition.zh: 怪物[Gain|获得]相当于 40% 伤害的额外[Chaos|混沌]伤害。

Definition.en: Monster [Gain|Gains] 40% of damage as extra [Cold] damage.
Definition.zh: 怪物[Gain|获得]相当于 40% 伤害的额外[Cold|冰霜]伤害。

Definition.en: Monster [Gain|Gains] 40% of damage as extra [Fire] damage.
Definition.zh: 怪物[Gain|获得]相当于 40% 伤害的额外[Fire|火焰]伤害。

Definition.en: Monster [Gain|Gains] 40% of damage as extra [Lightning] damage.
Definition.zh: 怪物[Gain|获得]相当于 40% 伤害的额外[Lightning|闪电]伤害。

Definition.en: Monster creates an [Aura] that grants 20% of Maximum life as added [EnergyShield|Energy Shield] to [Allies] within 5 metres.
Definition.zh: 怪物获得[Aura|光环]，为 5 米内的[Allies|友军]提供相当于 20% 生命上限的[EnergyShield|能量护盾]。

Definition.en: Monster gains extra [Armour] based off of their [Strength].
Definition.zh: 怪物获得基于[Strength|力量]的额外[Armour|护甲]。

Definition.en: Monster gains 25% of Maximum life as added [EnergyShield|Energy Shield].
Definition.zh: 怪物获得相当于生命上限 25% 的[EnergyShield|能量护盾]。

Definition.en: Monster gains extra [Evasion] based off of their [Dexterity].
Definition.zh: 怪物获得基于[Dexterity|敏捷]的额外[Evasion|闪避]。

Definition.en: Monster has +50% to [Resistances|Fire Resistance] and +10% to [MaximumResistances|Maximum Fire Resistance].
Definition.zh: 怪物的[Resistances|火焰抗性] +50%，[MaximumResistances|最大火焰抗性] +10%。

Definition.en: Monster creates circular walls of [Fire] that deal damage to enemies standing in them.
Definition.zh: 怪物产生[Fire|火焰]圆环墙，对站在其中的敌人造成伤害。

Definition.en: Monster creates an [Aura] that removes 3 [Flask] and [Charm] charges from enemies every 3 seconds within 3.6 metres.
Definition.zh: 怪物获得[Aura|光环]，每 3 秒对 3.6 米范围内的敌人移除 3 点[Flask|药剂]与[Charm|咒符]充能。

Definition.en: Monster creates circular walls of [IceCrystals|Ice] around enemies.
Definition.zh: 怪物会在敌人周围制造[IceCrystals|冰晶]墙。

Term.en: Heals Allies and Suppresses Foe Recovery
Term.zh: 治疗友军并压制敌方回复

Definition.en: Monster releases a nova that reduces Enemy Life and [EnergyShield|Energy Shield] Recovery Rate by 60% and causes [Allies] to Regenerate 5.5% of Maximum Life per second for 4 seconds within 5 metres every 8 seconds.
Definition.zh: 怪物释放冲击波，使 5 米范围内敌人的生命与[EnergyShield|能量护盾]回复率降低 60%，使[Allies|友军]每秒再生 5.5% 生命上限，持续 4 秒。每 8 秒释放一次。

Definition.en: Monster creates an [Aura] that [Hinder|Hinders] enemies within 3.6 metres.
Definition.zh: 怪物获得[Aura|光环]，使 3.6 米范围内的敌人[Hinder|缓速]。

Definition.en: Monster releases a nova that makes [Allies] invulnerable for 5 seconds while the monster is alive within 5 metres every 12 seconds.
Definition.zh: 怪物释放冲击波，使 5 米内的[Allies|友军]在怪物存活时获得 5 秒无敌。每 12 秒释放一次。

Definition.en: Monster releases a nova that makes [Allies] invulnerable for 5 seconds while the monster is alive within 5 metres every 12 seconds.
Definition.zh: 怪物释放冲击波，使 5 米内的[Allies|友军]在怪物存活时获得 5 秒无敌。每 12 秒释放一次。

Definition.en: Monster has 50% increased Life.
Definition.zh: 怪物的生命提高 50%。

Definition.en: Monster has 50% reduced [Slow|Slowing] Potency of [Debuff|Debuffs] on them.
Definition.zh: 怪物受到的[Slow|减速][Debuff|异常状态]强度降低 50%。

Definition.en: Monster cannot be [Stun|Stunned].
Definition.zh: 怪物免疫[Stun|晕眩]。

Definition.en: Monster has 200% increased [Accuracy] Rating.
Definition.zh: 怪物的[Accuracy|命中]值提高 200%。

Definition.en: Monster has 30% increased [Attack], Cast and Movement speed.
Definition.zh: 怪物的[Attack|攻击]，施法和移动速度提高 30%。

Definition.en: Monster creates an [Aura] that grants 20% increased [Attack] and Cast speed and 10% increased Movement speed to [Allies] within 5 metres.
Definition.zh: 怪物获得[Aura|光环]，使 5 米范围内的[Allies|友军][Attack|攻击]和施法速度加快 20%，移动速度加快 10%。

Definition.en: Monster Regenerates 2% of Maximum Life per second.
Definition.zh: 怪物每秒再生 2% 最大生命。

Term.zh: 被击中时施放闪电幻象

Definition.en: Monster creates a Mirage when [HitDamage|Hit] that moves towards enemies and explodes when it gets close enough, dealing [Lightning] Damage.
Definition.zh: 怪物在受到[HitDamage|击中]时制造一个幻象，幻象会向敌人移动，并在靠近时爆炸，造成[Lightning|闪电]伤害。

Term.zh: 被击中时施放多个闪电幻象

Definition.en: Monster creates Mirages when [HitDamage|Hit] that move towards enemies and explode when they get close enough, dealing [Lightning] Damage.
Definition.zh: 怪物在受到[HitDamage|击中]时制造多个幻象，幻象会向敌人移动，并在靠近时爆炸，造成[Lightning|闪电]伤害。

Definition.en: Monster has +50% to [Resistances|Lightning Resistance] and +10% to [MaximumResistances|Maximum Lightning Resistance].
Definition.zh: 怪物的[Resistances|闪电抗性] +50%，[MaximumResistances|最大闪电抗性] +10%。

Definition.en: Monster creates Volatile Crystals when [HitDamage|Hit], which explode upon the Monster's death, dealing [Chaos] damage.
Definition.zh: 怪物在受到[HitDamage|击中]时产生无常水晶，会在怪物死亡时爆炸，造成[Chaos|混沌]伤害。

Definition.en: Monster creates a 90% damage absorption barrier that explodes after taking a certain amount of damage, dealing [Fire] Damage
Definition.zh: 怪物获得可吸收 90% 伤害的护盾，护盾在承受一定伤害后爆炸，造成[Fire|火焰]伤害。

Term.en: Siphons Mana and Deals Lightning Damage
Term.zh: 抽取魔力并造成闪电伤害

Definition.en: Monster creates a circular effect that drains Mana and deals [Lightning] Damage over time to enemies near the edge of the circle.
Definition.zh: 怪物制造一个圆形效果区域，对靠近边缘的敌人持续造成[Lightning|闪电]伤害并抽取魔力。

Term.en: Siphons Mana and Deals Lightning Damage
Term.zh: 抽取魔力并造成闪电伤害

Definition.en:
Monster creates a circular effect that drains Mana and deals [Lightning] Damage over time to enemies near the edge of the circle.
Additionally, Monster will periodically create separate circles that drain Mana and deal [Lightning] Damage over time to enemies standing in them.
Definition.zh:
怪物制造一个圆形效果区域，对靠近边缘的敌人持续造成[Lightning|闪电]伤害并抽取魔力。
此外，怪物会周期性地制造多个独立的圆形区域，对站在其中的敌人持续造成[Lightning|闪电]伤害并抽取魔力。

Term.zh: 怪物仆从优先承受伤害

Definition.en: 50% of damage taken from Monster is taken from Monster's [Pack] [MonsterMinion|Minions] instead
Definition.zh: 怪物受到的 50% 伤害将改为由[Pack|群落]中的[MonsterMinion|怪物仆从]承受。

Definition.en: 50% of damage taken from Monster is taken from Monster's [Pack] [MonsterMinion|Minions] instead
Definition.zh: 怪物受到的 50% 伤害将改为由[Pack|群落]中的[MonsterMinion|怪物仆从]承受。

Definition.en: Monster has 25% increased Damage and 50% increased Life
Definition.zh: 怪物造成的伤害提高 25%，生命提高 50%。

Definition.en: [HitDamage|Hits] against this Monster have 80% reduced [CriticalDamageBonus|Critical Damage Bonus].
Definition.zh: 对该怪物的[HitDamage|击中]的[CriticalDamageBonus|暴击伤害加成]降低 80%。

Definition.en: Monster periodically Enrages; gaining 30% increased Damage, 25% increased [SkillSpeed|Skill] and Movement Speed and 33% less damage taken for 5 seconds every 10 seconds.
Definition.zh: 怪物周期性狂暴：每 10 秒获得持续 5 秒的狂暴状态，期间伤害提高 30%，[SkillSpeed|技能施放]与移动速度加快 25%，受到的伤害减少 33%。

Definition.en: Monster is Enraged; gaining 30% increased Damage, 25% increased [SkillSpeed|Skill] and Movement Speed and 33% less damage taken.
Definition.zh: 怪物处于狂暴状态，其伤害提高 30%，[SkillSpeed|技能施放]与移动速度加快 25%，受到的伤害减少 33%。

Definition.en: Monster creates an [Aura] that grants 40% increased [Physical] Damage to [Allies] within 5 metres.
Definition.zh: 怪物获得[Aura|光环]，使 5 米范围内的[Allies|友军]造成的[Physical|物理]伤害提高 40%。

Definition.en: Monster creates an [Aura] that [Debuff|Debuffs] enemies within 4.2 metres, causing their Life and [EnergyShield|Energy Shield] to not be able to recover past 50%.
Definition.zh: 怪物获得[Aura|光环]，[Debuff|减益] 4.2 米范围内的敌人，使其生命与[EnergyShield|能量护盾]无法恢复超过 50%。

Definition.en: Monster cannot be damaged by enemies any further than 3 metres from them.
Definition.zh: 距离怪物超过 3 米的敌人无法对其造成伤害。

Definition.en: Monster creates an [Aura] that grants +35% to all [ElementalDamage|Elemental] [Resistances] to [Allies] within 5 metres.
Definition.zh: 怪物获得[Aura|光环]，使 5 米范围内[Allies|友军]的[ElementalDamage|元素][Resistances|抗性]提高 35%。

Definition.en: Monster periodically revives [Pack] [MonsterMinion|Minions].
Definition.zh: 怪物周期性复活[Pack|群落]中的[MonsterMinion|怪物仆从]。

Definition.en: Monster periodically revives [Pack] [MonsterMinion|Minions] with increased Life and Damage.
Definition.zh: 怪物周期性复活[Pack|群落]中的[MonsterMinion|怪物仆从]，并提升其生命与伤害。

Definition.en: Monster leaves a trail of [ShockedGround|Shocked Ground] as they move.
Definition.zh: 怪物移动时留下一道[ShockedGround|感电地面]轨迹。

Definition.en: Monster periodically teleports to an enemy they can see, creating a [SmokeCloud|Smoke Cloud] where they leave and where they teleport to.
Definition.zh: 怪物会周期性地传送至视野中的敌人处，在原地与目标处各制造一团[SmokeCloud|迷雾]。

Definition.en: Monster periodically teleports to an enemy they can see, creating a [SmokeCloud|Smoke Cloud] where they leave and where they teleport to.
Definition.zh: 怪物会周期性地传送至视野中的敌人处，在原地与目标处各制造一团[SmokeCloud|迷雾]。

Definition.en: Monster's [Pack] [MonsterMinion|Minions] have 25% increased Damage and 50% increased Life.
Definition.zh: [Pack|群落]中的[MonsterMinion|怪物仆从]伤害提高 25%，生命提高 50%。

Definition.en: Monster has 100% increased [Stun] buildup.
Definition.zh: 怪物的[Stun|晕眩]累积提高 100%。

Definition.en: Monster has 250% increased [EnemyStunThreshold|Stun Threshold].
Definition.zh: 怪物的[EnemyStunThreshold|晕眩阈值]提高 250%。

Definition.en: Monster creates an [Aura] that [Debuff|Debuffs] Enemies within 3.2 metres; [Slow|Slowing] by 25%, making effects expire 40% slower and reducing [CooldownRecovery|Cooldown Recovery Rate] by 60%.
Definition.zh: 怪物获得[Aura|光环]，[Debuff|减益] 3.2 米范围内的敌人，使其 [Slow|减速] 25%，效果消减速度减慢 40%，[CooldownRecovery|冷却回复速度]降低 60%。

Definition.en: Monster periodically creates Volatile Plants, releasing orbs that move towards enemies; exploding when they get close enough; dealing [Chaos] Damage.
Definition.zh: 怪物周期性产生无常植物，释放向敌人移动的球体，靠近时爆炸，造成[Chaos|混沌]伤害。

Definition.en: Monster periodically creates Powerful Volatile Plants, releasing orbs that move towards enemies; exploding when they get close enough; dealing [Chaos] Damage.
Definition.zh: 怪物周期性产生强大的无常植物，释放向敌人移动的球体，靠近时爆炸，造成[Chaos|混沌]伤害。

Definition.en: Monster periodically creates Volatile Crag that moves towards enemies; exploding when they get close enough; dealing [Fire] Damage.
Definition.zh: 怪物周期性产生无常碎岩，向敌人移动，靠近时爆炸，造成[Fire|火焰]伤害。

Definition.en: Monster periodically creates Powerful Volatile Crag that moves towards enemies; exploding when they get close enough; dealing [Fire] Damage.
Definition.zh: 怪物周期性产生强大的无常碎岩，向敌人移动，靠近时爆炸，造成[Fire|火焰]伤害。

Definition.en:
A Pack Monster or [MonsterMinion|Minion] is a Monster that naturally spawns as a part of a Monster Pack in areas or from mechanics like [Strongbox|Strongboxes].

Modifiers to Pack Size also provide a chance that there is an [AdditionalRareMonster|Additional Rare Monster] in the Pack.

Monsters summoned or created by other Monsters do not count as Pack Monsters or [MonsterMinion|Minions].
Definition.zh:
群落及[MonsterMinion|怪物仆从]是自然生成于区域中的怪物群的一部分，或来自诸如[Strongbox|保险箱]等机制。

怪物群规模的相关词缀也会使群落有几率出现一个[AdditionalRareMonster|额外稀有怪物]。

由其他怪物创造或召唤的怪物，不计为群落怪物或[MonsterMinion|怪物仆从]。

Definition.en: Crescendo Arrows [Chain] 6 additional times and deal 60% increased Damage for each time they have [Chain|Chained].
Definition.zh: 渐强箭可[Chain|连锁]额外6次，每次[Chain|连锁]都会使伤害提高 60%。

Definition.en: Splintering Arrows [Split] towards 6 targets.
Definition.zh: 裂片箭会向 6 个目标[Split|分裂]。

Definition.en: Reversing Arrows [Pierce] all targets and [Return] to you.
Definition.zh: 回转箭会[Pierce|贯穿]所有目标，并[Return|归返]到你身边。

Definition.en: All [HitDamage|Hits] with Diamond Arrows are [Critical|Critical Hits] with 60% increased [CriticalDamageBonus|Critical Damage Bonus].
Definition.zh: 金刚箭的所有[HitDamage|击中]必定为[Critical|暴击]，并获得 60% 的[CriticalDamageBonus|暴击伤害加成]。

Definition.en: Enemies killed with Covetous Arrows drop items with 600% increased [ItemRarity|Rarity].
Definition.zh: 用贪婪箭击败的敌人掉落的物品[ItemRarity|稀有度]提高 600%。

Definition.en: Blunt Arrows cause 600% increased [Stun|Stun Buildup].
Definition.zh: 钝击箭造成的[Stun|晕眩积蓄]提高 600%。

Definition.en:
Some effects can cause Repeatable Skills to Repeat, causing you to perform the part of the skill where it fires off projectiles or other effects multiple times in quick succession from a single use of the skill.

[Trigger|Triggered] skills, Instant skills, and [Channelling] skills cannot Repeat.

Skills take 5% longer to perform for each time they Repeat.
Definition.zh:
某些效果可以使可重复技能进行重复，即从单次技能使用中，快速连续地多次执行技能中发射投射物或产生其他效果的部分。

[Trigger|触发]技能、瞬发技能和[Channelling|持续吟唱]技能无法重复。

技能每重复一次，其施放时间就会延长 5%。

Definition.en: Meteors rain down around you when in range of enemies.
Definition.zh: 靠近敌人时，陨石会从天而降。

Definition.en: Lightning bolts strike the ground around you when in range of enemies.
Definition.zh: 靠近敌人时，闪电会击中地面。

Definition.en: Freezing shards fire around you in a spiral when in range of enemies.
Definition.zh: 靠近敌人时，急冻碎片会螺旋射出。

Definition.en: Slain enemies explode, dealing [Chaos] damage equal to a quarter of their maximum Life.
Definition.zh: 被击败的敌人会爆炸，造成其生命上限四分之一的[Chaos|混沌]伤害。

Definition.en: Abyssal Wasting reduces Life Regeneration Rate by 50% for 6 seconds
Definition.zh: 深渊耗散会在 6 秒内降低 50% 生命回复速率。

Definition.en: These are [Augment|Augments] which have powerful singular effects, but are more limited. You may not have more than one [Augment] of this type socketed at a time.
Definition.zh: 此类[Augment|增幅器]虽拥有强大的单一特效，但限制也更为严格。一次只能镶嵌一个这种类型的[Augment|增幅器]。

Definition.en: Equippable Armours are pieces of equipment that you can wear to provide various defences. Equippable Armours include Helmets, Body Armours, Gloves, Boots, [Shield|Shields] and [Focus|Foci].
Definition.zh: 可装备护甲是你可穿戴的护甲部件，提供各类防御属性，包括头盔、护甲、手套、靴子、[Shield|盾牌]与[Focus|法器]。

Definition.en: Caster Weapons are Sceptres, Staves and Wands.
Definition.zh: 施法武器指权杖、长杖和法杖。

Definition.en: Targets affected by a Spectral Fire [Debuff] do not take damage from [Ignite]. Instead that damage feeds the Spectral Fire. When the Spectral Fire [Debuff] expires or the target dies, the Spectral Fire explodes, dealing all the damage it has absorbed to all enemies within 1.8m, including the affected target. Damage modifiers do not apply to the explosion.
Definition.zh: 受灵体火焰[Debuff|减益状态]影响的目标不会受到[Ignite|点燃]伤害，该伤害会被灵体火焰吸收。当灵体火焰[Debuff|减益状态]结束或目标被击败时，灵体火焰将会爆炸，对 1.8 米范围内的所有敌人造成所吸收的伤害，包括原先受影响的目标。伤害词缀不能作用于该爆炸伤害。

Definition.en:
Sanctifying an item will multiply the values of an items modifiers by a random value ranging from 78% to 122% for each modifier. The resulting item will now be Sanctified.
Most methods of item crafting and modification cannot be used on Sanctified items.
Definition.zh:
圣化一件物品会将其词缀数值乘以 78% 到 122% 之间的随机值，最终物品将变为已圣化状态。
大多数物品工艺和修改方式无法用于已圣化的物品。

Definition.en: Efficiency modifiers act as divisors to the stat they modify. For example, 50% increased Reservation Efficiency causes your Reservations to be 67% of their base value, 100% increased Reservation Efficiency causes your Reservations to be 50% of their base value, and so on. Reduced Reservation Efficiency will cause the modified stat to grow larger instead of smaller.
Definition.zh: 被效能词缀影响的数值将会除以效能词缀。例如：增加 50% 的保留效能会使你的保留量变为基础值的 67%。增加 100% 的保留效能会使你的保留量变为基础值的 50%。以此类推。若减少保留效能，被效能词缀影响的数值反而会增加，而非减少。

Definition.en:
[Fire] [Spell|Spells] [Conversion|Convert] 100% of Fire Damage to [Chaos|Chaos Damage]
[Chaos|Chaos Damage] from [Fire] [Spell|Spells] [Contributes] to [Flammability] and [Ignite] [BuffMagnitude|Magnitudes]
[Ignite] inflicted with [Fire] [Spell|Spells] deals [Chaos|Chaos Damage] instead of Fire Damage
Definition.zh:
[Fire|火焰][Spell|法术]将 100% 的火焰伤害[Conversion|转化]为[Chaos|混沌伤害]
[Fire|火焰][Spell|法术]的[Chaos|混沌伤害][Contributes|作用于][Flammability|易燃]和[Ignite|点燃][BuffMagnitude|强度]
[Fire|火焰][Spell|法术]施加的[Ignite|点燃]造成[Chaos|混沌伤害]而非火焰伤害

Definition.en: [Invoke|Invocation] Skills instead [Trigger] [Spell|Spells] every 2 seconds. [Invoke|Invocation] Skills cannot gain [Energy] while [Trigger|Triggering] [Spell|Spells]. [Invoke|Invoked] Spells consume 50% less [Energy].
Definition.zh: [Invoke|咒祈]技能改为每 2 秒[Trigger|触发][Spell|法术]。[Invoke|咒祈]技能在[Trigger|触发][Spell|法术]时无法获得[Energy|能量]。[Invoke|咒祈]法术消耗的[Energy|能量]降低 50%

Definition.en: Elemental Weakness is a [Curse] that lowers Elemental [Resistances]. If not otherwise specified, it lowers Elemental Resistances by 30% and has a duration of 20 seconds.
Definition.zh: 元素要害是一种[Curse|诅咒]，会降低元素[Resistances|抗性]。除非另有说明，会使元素抗性降低 30%，持续时间为 20 秒。

Definition.en: Debilitate is a [Debuff] that inflicts 20% reduced movement speed and 10% reduced damage dealt. Unless specified, Debilitate lasts 1 second.
Definition.zh: 疲惫是一种[Debuff|减益状态]，使移动速度降低 20%，造成的伤害降低 10%。除非另有说明，疲惫持续 1 秒。

Definition.en: Every [SupportGem|Support Gem] falls into one or more Categories. [SupportGem|Support Gems] from the same Category cannot be socketed into the same skill simultaneously, but can be used across multiple skills.
Definition.zh: 每个[SupportGem|辅助宝石]都属于一个或多个类别。同一类别的[SupportGem|辅助宝石]无法同时镶嵌到同一个技能中，但可以用于多个不同技能。

Definition.en: Added random Modifiers are at least this level or higher, except if a specific Modifier type would be excluded entirely from being able to roll. Currency with a Minimum Modifier Level cannot be used on items with an item level below the Minimum Modifier Level.
Definition.zh: 添加的随机词缀至少为此等级或更高，除非特定词缀类型完全无法掷出。带有最低词缀等级的通货不能用于物品等级低于该最低词缀等级的物品。

Definition.en: You cannot use this currency on items above this level.
Definition.zh: 你无法在高于此等级的物品上使用此通货。

Definition.en: Heat is gained from using specific [Crossbow] Skills, and can be either beneficial or detrimental depending on the Skill.
Definition.zh: 过热可通过使用特定的[Crossbow|战弩]技能获得，根据技能的不同，过热可能产生有利或不利效果。

Definition.en:
Some Skills create Elemental Infusion [Remnant|Remnants] when specific conditions are met. Picking up the [Remnant] grants you the Infusion for 20 seconds or until it is Consumed by another Skill. You can have up to 3 of each Infusion by default.

Skills that can Consume Infusions specifically mention the type(s) of Infusion they can Consume and the benefits for doing so. If a Skill repeats or reoccurs, each of them must Consume an Infusion separately to gain the effect.
Definition.zh:
某些技能在满足特定条件时会创造元素灌注[Remnant|残片]。拾取[Remnant|残片]会使你获得灌注，持续 20 秒或直到被其他技能消耗。默认情况下，你最多可拥有 3 个同类别灌注。

能够消耗灌注的技能会明确说明它们可以消耗的灌注类型以及消耗的受益。如果技能重复或再次发生，每次都必须单独消耗一个灌注来获得效果。

Definition.en:
Desecrating an item adds an Unrevealed Desecrated modifier. If modifiers are full then a random modifier is also removed. These modifiers can be revealed at the Well of Souls.

Items with Desecrated Modifiers cannot be Desecrated again.
Definition.zh:
渎灵物品会添加一个未揭示的渎灵词缀。如果词缀已满，则会随机移除一个词缀。这些词缀可在灵魂之井处显示。

具有渎灵词缀的物品无法再次被渎灵。

Definition.en: This item can be [Abyssalify|Desecrated] using the Preserved Cranium currency item. There is an increasing chance for it to be destroyed each time it is [Abyssalify|Desecrated].
Definition.zh: 此物品可以使用遗存头骨通货物品进行[Abyssalify|渎灵]。每次[Abyssalify|渎灵]，被摧毁的几率会增加。

Definition.en:
Abyssal Monsters spawned from [ContainsAbyss|Abysses] steal modifiers from monsters killed near their pit, these modifiers can be upgraded to Abyssal Modifiers.

Abyssal Modifiers rarely have a chance to become a more powerful Lichborn Modifier.
Definition.zh:
生成于[ContainsAbyss|深渊]的深渊怪物会偷取被击杀于巨坑附近的怪物的词缀，这些词缀会被升级为深渊词缀。

深渊词缀有极小概率升级为更强大的巫妖血脉词缀。

Definition.en:
Abyssal Depths are an underground dungeon sometimes found when completing the final [ContainsAbyss|Abyss] in the area.

The Abyssal Depths contains many Abyssal monsters and all Rare monsters will have an [AbyssalModifiers|Abyssal Modifier].
At the end of the Abyssal Depths is a more powerful Rare with both a Lichborn Modifier and an Abyssal Modifier. Defeating this Rare will unlock valuable chests nearby.

The chests at the end of the Abyssal Depths can also drop pieces of [Abyssalify|Preserved Bone], but also can rarely drop additional exclusive [Omen|Omens] and [LineageSupports|Lineage Supports].

At higher levels the Abyssal Depths can lead to powerful Boss Fights.
Definition.zh:
绝望深渊是一种地下城，有时可在完成区域中最后一个[ContainsAbyss|深渊]时发现。

绝望深渊内存在大量深渊怪物，且所有稀有怪物都将携带[AbyssalModifiers|深渊词缀]。
在绝望深渊尽头，会出现一名更强大的稀有怪物，其同时拥有巫妖血脉词缀和深渊词缀。击败该怪物可解锁附近的珍贵宝箱。

绝望深渊尽头的宝箱除可能掉落[Abyssalify|遗存颚骨]碎片外，亦有几率额外掉落专属的[Omen|预兆]与[LineageSupports|血脉辅助]。

在更高等级下，绝望深渊还可能展开强大的首领战。

Definition.en: Marked for Death is a [Debuff] that causes you to take 50% increased damage.
Definition.zh: 死亡印记是一种[Debuff|减益状态]，使你受到的伤害提高 50%。

Definition.en:
Lineage Supports are powerful and transformative [SupportGem|Support Gems] which can drop in maps, or come from specific sources like a particular Boss.

You may only Socket one copy of any given Lineage Support across all of your Skills at once.
Definition.zh:
血脉辅助是强大的变革性[SupportGem|辅助宝石]，可在地图中掉落，或来自特定来源，如特定首领。

你同一时间只能镶嵌每种血脉辅助宝石各一个。

Definition.en: Naturally Spawning Monsters are those who are spawned upon entering an area for the first time. Monsters that spawn from Secondary Mechanics like [Strongbox|Strongboxes] or [ContainsExpedition|Expedition] do not count as Naturally Spawning.
Definition.zh: 源生怪物是首次进入区域时生成的怪物。从次要机制如[Strongbox|保险箱]或[ContainsExpedition|先祖秘藏]生成的怪物不算作自然生成。

Definition.en: [DNT-UNUSED] You gain edict declaration when you disable a mod with The Towering Shadow
Definition.zh: 当你使用塔影禁用一条词缀时，你将获得敕令宣告

Definition.en:
The first Gruelling Madness on a target [Slow|Slows] their movement speed by 15%.
Each additional Gruelling Madness instead increases the [Slow|Slowing] Potency of [Debuff|Debuffs] on the targets by 10%, which affects both the first Gruelling Madness and any other [Debuff|Debuffs] that are [Slow|Slowing] the target.

A maximum of 10 Gruelling Madness can be inflicted on each target. Targets will lose 1 Gruelling Madness every 2 seconds that passes without more being inflicted.
Definition.zh:
目标身上的第一层苦痛狂乱会使其移动速度[Slow|减速]15%。
每额外增加一层苦痛狂乱，则会令目标身上[Debuff|减益状态]的[Slow|减速]效力提高 10%。此效果同时作用于第一层苦痛狂乱以及任何其他能[Slow|减速]目标的[Debuff|减益状态]。

每个目标最多可被施加 10 层苦痛狂乱。若在 2 秒内未施加新的层数，目标将失去 1 层苦痛狂乱。

Definition.en: Each Faerie Fire [Debuff] causes [HitDamage|Hits] against the affected target to [Gain] 2% of damage as [Gain|Extra] Damage of a random [ElementalDamage|Element]. The [Debuff] lasts 8 seconds, and up to 10 can be applied to each target.
Definition.zh: 每层仙灵之火[Debuff|减益]状态会使对该目标造成的[HitDamage|击中]，[Gain|获得]2% 的伤害转化为随机的[Gain|额外][ElementalDamage|元素]伤害。该[Debuff|减益]状态持续 8 秒，每个目标最多可被施加 10 层。

Definition.en: Runefather's Challenge is a [Debuff] which raises the [Power] of affected targets by 5.
Definition.zh: 符文之父的挑战是一种[Debuff|减益状态]，使受影响目标的[Power|威力值]提高 5 点。

Definition.en:
You can have up to 10,000 Runefather's Boast [Buff|Buffs].

Each Runefather's Boast grants +1 to [Armour], +1 to [Evasion|Evasion Rating], and +1 to [StunThreshold|Stun Threshold].

Runefather's Boast does not have a duration, but is lost when you die or change area.
Definition.zh:
你最多可拥有 10,000 层符文之父加持[Buff|增益]状态。

每层符文之父加持提供 +1 [Armour|护甲]、[Evasion|闪避值]和 [StunThreshold|晕眩阈值]。

符文之父加持没有持续时间，但会在你死亡或切换区域时消失。

Definition.en: Monster [Pack|Packs] in a Union of Souls transfer their soul to another Monster in their [Pack] when slain, granting the receiving Monsters 6% [Toughness], and 2% increased damage.
Definition.zh: 聚魂中的怪物[Pack|群落]被击败时会将其灵魂转移给同[Pack|群落]的一只其他怪物，使其获得 6% [Toughness|韧性]并且伤害提高 2%。

Definition.en:
While Thaumaturgical Dynamism is active, you passively generate a [Charges|Power, Frenzy or Endurance Charge] once every five seconds. 

The kind of [Charges|Charge] you generate is determined by the Attribute Requirements of the Skills you have socketed in your Skill Gem sockets. The higher the total [Strength] Requirement total of your socketed Skill Gems, the more likely you will be to generate an [Charges|Endurance Charge]. Higher total [Dexterity] Requirement corresponds to a higher chance for [Charges|Frenzy Charges], and [Intelligence] to [Charges|Power Charges].
Definition.zh:
奇术活力激活时，你每 8 秒被动生成一个[Charges|暴击球、狂怒球或耐力球]。

生成的[Charges|能量球]类型由你技能宝石插槽中技能的属性需求决定。镶嵌技能宝石的[Strength|力量]需求总和越高，生成[Charges|耐力球]的可能性越大。[Dexterity|敏捷]需求总和越高，生成[Charges|狂怒球]的可能性越大，[Intelligence|智慧]需求则对应生成[Charges|暴击球]。

Definition.en:
Depending on the type of [EquipArmour|Armour] equipped, Players will have a less Movement Speed penalty applied depending on what [Attributes|Attribute] the Armour requires. These penalties only apply to equipped Body Armours and [Shield|Shields].
For Body Armour, pure [Strength] has a 5% penalty, hybrid [Strength] and [Dexterity] or [Intelligence] has a 4% penalty and pure [Dexterity] or [Intelligence] has a 3% penalty.
For [Shield|Shields], pure [Strength] has a 3% penalty, hybrid [Strength] and [Dexterity] or [Intelligence] has a 1.5% penalty and pure [Dexterity] or [Intelligence] has no penalty.
Definition.zh:
取决于装备的[EquipArmour|护甲]类型，玩家会根据护甲所需的[Attributes|属性]受到移动速度惩罚。这些惩罚只适用于装备的胸甲和[Shield|盾牌]。
胸甲方面，纯[Strength|力量]装备有 5% 惩罚，[Strength|力量]与[Dexterity|敏捷]或[Intelligence|智慧]的混合装备有 4% 惩罚，纯[Dexterity|敏捷]或[Intelligence|智慧]装备有 3% 惩罚。
[Shield|盾牌]方面，纯[Strength|力量]装备有 3% 惩罚，[Strength|力量]与[Dexterity|敏捷]或[Intelligence|智慧]的混合装备有 1.5% 惩罚，纯[Dexterity|敏捷]或[Intelligence|智慧]装备无惩罚。

Definition.en: Merging [Crossbow] bolts have fragments that can hit the same target at the same time to combine their damage into a single [HitDamage|Hit].
Definition.zh: 融合[Crossbow|战弩]弩箭的碎片可以同时击中同一目标，将伤害合并为单次[HitDamage|击中]。

Definition.en: Pacified Enemies cannot deal damage.
Definition.zh: 被宁心的敌人无法造成伤害。

Definition.en:
Archons are a type of [Buff] that significantly augment your prowess with a certain type of Skills, such as [ElementalArchon|Elemental Spells] or [NatureArchon|Plant Skills].

By default, each Archon Buff lasts 10 seconds.

You cannot gain any Archon Buff while you already have one, or during a recovery period after you lose one, which lasts 20 seconds by default.
Definition.zh:
执政官是一种[Buff|增益状态]类型，能显著强化你的特定类型技能的威力，例如例如[ElementalArchon|元素法术]或[NatureArchon|植物技能]。

默认情况下，每个执政官增益状态持续 10 秒。

当你已经拥有一个执政官增益状态时，或在失去一个执政官增益状态后的恢复期间（默认持续 20 秒），你无法获得任何执政官增益状态。

Definition.en:
Ice Archon is a type of [Archon] [Buff]. It grants:
• 25% more [Cold] Damage with [Spell|Spells]
• [StatConversion|Convert] 100% of [ElementalDamage|Elemental] Damage with [Spell|Spells] to [Cold] Damage
• Cannot deal [Cold|Non-Cold] Damage with [Spell|Spells]
• [HitDamage|Hits] with [Spell|Spells] cause 100% more [Freeze] Buildup

Using a non-instant [Attack] causes Ice Archon to be removed immediately.
Definition.zh:
冰霜执政官是一种[Archon|执政官][Buff|增益状态]，能够提供：
•[Spell|法术][Cold|冰霜]伤害总增 25%
•[Spell|法术]的 100% [ElementalDamage|元素]伤害[StatConversion|转化]为[Cold|冰霜]伤害
•[Spell|法术]无法造成[Cold|非冰霜]伤害
•[Spell|法术][HitDamage|击中]造成的[Freeze|冻结]积蓄总增 100%

使用非瞬发[Attack|攻击]会立即移除冰霜执政官。

Definition.en:
Flame Archon is a type of [Archon] [Buff]. It grants:
• 25% more [Fire] Damage with [Spell|Spells]
• [StatConversion|Convert] 100% of [ElementalDamage|Elemental] Damage with [Spell|Spells] to [Fire] Damage
• Cannot deal [Fire|Non-Fire] Damage with [Spell|Spells]
• [Spell|Spells] have 100% more [Flammability] [BuffMagnitude|Magnitude]

Using a non-instant [Attack] causes Flame Archon to be removed immediately.
Definition.zh:
火焰执政官是一种[Archon|执政官][Buff|增益状态]，能够提供：
•[Spell|法术][Fire|火焰]伤害总增 25%
•[Spell|法术]的 100% [ElementalDamage|元素]伤害[StatConversion|转化]为[Fire|火焰]伤害
•[Spell|法术]无法造成[Fire|非火焰]伤害
•[Spell|法术]的[Flammability|易燃][BuffMagnitude|强度]总增 100%

使用非瞬发[Attack|攻击]会立即移除火焰执政官。

Definition.en:
Lightning Archon is a type of [Archon] [Buff]. It grants:
• 25% more [Lightning] Damage with [Spell|Spells]
• [StatConversion|Convert] 100% of [ElementalDamage|Elemental] Damage with [Spell|Spells] to [Lightning] Damage
• Cannot deal [Lightning|Non-Lightning] Damage with [Spell|Spells]
• [HitDamage|Hits] with [Spell|Spells] have 100% more [Shock] chance

Using a non-instant [Attack] causes Lightning Archon to be removed immediately.
Definition.zh:
闪电执政官是一种[Archon|执政官][Buff|增益状态]，能够提供：
•[Spell|法术][Lightning|闪电]伤害总增 25%
•[Spell|法术]的 100% [ElementalDamage|元素]伤害[StatConversion|转化]为[Lightning|闪电]伤害
•[Spell|法术]无法造成[Lightning|非闪电]伤害
•[Spell|法术][HitDamage|击中]的[Shock|感电]几率总增 100%

使用非瞬发[Attack|攻击]会立即移除闪电执政官。

Definition.en:
Elemental Archon is a type of [Archon] [Buff]. It grants:
• 25% more [ElementalDamage|Elemental Damage] with [Spell|Spells]
• Cannot deal [ElementalDamage|Non-Elemental] Damage with [Spell|Spells]
• [HitDamage|Hits] with [Spell|Spells] cause 100% more [Freeze] Buildup
• [Spell|Spells] have 100% more [Flammability] [BuffMagnitude|Magnitude]
• [HitDamage|Hits] with [Spell|Spells] have 100% more [Shock] chance

Using a non-instant [Attack] causes Elemental Archon to be removed immediately.
Definition.zh:
元素执政官是一种[Archon|执政官] [Buff|增益状态]，能够提供：
•[Spell|法术][ElementalDamage|元素]伤害总增 25%
•[Spell|法术]无法造成[ElementalDamage|非元素]伤害
•[Spell|法术][HitDamage|击中]造成的[Freeze|冻结]积蓄总增 100%
•[Spell|法术]的[Flammability|易燃][BuffMagnitude|强度]总增 100%
•[Spell|法术][HitDamage|击中]的[Shock|感电]几率总增 100%

使用非瞬发[Attack|攻击]会立即移除元素执政官。

Definition.en:
Nature's Archon is a type of [Archon] [Buff]. It grants:
• 25% more Damage with [Plant] Skills
• [Plant|Plants] have a 100% chance to immediately [Plant|Overgrow]
• 200% more Skill Effect Duration of [Plant] Skills
• [Plant] Skills have +2 to [Limit]
Definition.zh:
自然执政官是一种[Archon|执政官] [Buff|增益状态]，能够提供：
•[Plant|植物技能与蔓生]伤害总增 25%
•[Plant|植物技能与蔓生]有 100% 几率立即[Plant|蔓生]
•[Plant|植物技能与蔓生]效果持续时间总增 200%
•[Plant|植物技能与蔓生][Limit|上限]+2

Definition.en:
Archon of Undeath is a type of [Archon] [Buff]. It grants:
• 25% more [Minion] Damage
• 200% more [CooldownRecovery|Cooldown Recovery Rate] for [Command] Skills
• [TemporaryMinion|Temporary Minion Skills] have 100% more [Limit] of [Minion|Minions] summoned

When you gain Archon of Undeath all of your Persistent Undead [Minion|Minions] are revived.
Definition.zh:
亡灵执政官是一种[Archon|执政官] [Buff|增益状态]，能够提供：
•[Minion|召唤生物]伤害总增 25%
•[Command|命令][CooldownRecovery|冷却回复速度]总增 200%
•[TemporaryMinion|临时召唤生物技能]的[Minion|召唤生物][Limit|上限]总增 100%

获得亡灵执政官时，你所有持续性的亡灵[Minion|召唤生物]都会被复活。

Definition.en: A Temporary [Minion] is a [Minion] that does not revive after it dies.
Definition.zh: 临时[Minion|召唤生物]是一种在死亡后不会复活的[Minion|召唤生物]。

Definition.en: [Minion] Reforming is similar to [Minion] [Reviving], but only occurs at the end of the "Minion Reforming" [Buff] Timer that is granted while [Persistent] [Minion|Minions] are dead, as opposed to other effects that may revive [Minion|Minions].
Definition.zh: [Minion|召唤生物]重组与[Minion|召唤生物][Reviving|复活]类似，但只有在[Persistent|永久性][Minion|召唤生物]被击败后获得的“召唤生物重组”[Buff|增益状态]持续时间结束时才会发生，而不是通过其他能够复活[Minion|召唤生物]的效果触发。

Definition.en: Gigantic [Minion|Minions] have 20% more Maximum Life, 20% more Damage and 20% increased size.
Definition.zh: 庞然大物[Minion|召唤生物]生命上限总增 20%，伤害总增 20%，体型增大 20%。

Definition.en: [Abyssalify|Desecrating] an item with the Mark of the Abyssal Lord modifier always removes that modifier, replacing it with an Unrevealed Desecrated modifier of a higher tier.
Definition.zh: 使用深渊领主的印记词缀[Abyssalify|渎灵]物品时，总是会移除该词缀，将其替换为更高阶的未揭示渎灵词缀。

Definition.en:
Riven Armour is a [Debuff] inflicted by [HitDamage|Hits], which stores 5% of the [Premitigation|Pre-mitigation] [Physical] [HitDamage|Hit damage] of the Hit that inflicts it as its [BuffMagnitude|Magnitude].

The inflicter's subsequent [Attack] [HitDamage|Hits] against the target will gain additional unscaleable added [Physical] [HitDamage|Damage] equal to that magnitude.

Enemies with Riven Armour cannot get their [ArmourBreak|Armour Broken] further.
Definition.zh:
撕裂护甲是一种由[HitDamage|击中]施加的[Debuff|减益状态]，会将施加它的那次击中的[Premitigation|减免前][Physical|物理][HitDamage|击中伤害]的 5% 储存为其[BuffMagnitude|强度]。

施加者后续对目标的[Attack|攻击][HitDamage|击中]将获得等同于该强度数值的额外不可调整的附加[Physical|物理][HitDamage|伤害]。

拥有护甲撕裂的敌人无法再被进一步[ArmourBreak|护甲破损]。

Definition.en:
Molten Fissures are long-lasting fissures created by some [Slam|Slams] that can themselves be [Slam|Slammed] to create [Aftershock|Aftershocks]. 

Hitting a Molten Fissure with a [Slam] other than another Molten Fissure causes an [Aftershock] to propagate along its length, dealing the Fissure's damage again to enemies standing on it. This [Aftershock] will also spread to other intersecting Molten Fissures. Each Molten Fissure can [Aftershock] no more than once every 0.2 seconds.
Definition.zh:
熔岩裂缝是由某些[Slam|猛击]创造的持续时间很长的裂缝，这些裂缝本身受到[Slam|猛击]时可以产生[Aftershock|余震]。

用[Slam|猛击]（其他熔岩裂缝除外）击中熔岩裂缝会产生沿其长度传播的[Aftershock|余震]，对站在其上的敌人造成裂缝的伤害。此[Aftershock|余震]还会扩散到其他相交的熔岩裂缝。每个熔岩裂缝每 0.2 秒最多产生一次[Aftershock|余震]。

Definition.en: Sands of Time grants 60% increased Skill Speed, scaling down to 1% over 10 seconds, at which point it will then scale back up to 60%. It also grants 1% increased Area of Effect, scaling up to 60% over 10 seconds, at which point it will then scale back down to 1%.
Definition.zh: 时光沙尘使施法速度加快 60%，在 10 秒内逐渐降至 1%，然后再次回升至 60%。同时使效果范围提高 1%，在 10 秒内逐渐增至 60%，然后再次降回 1%。

Definition.en: While affected by Unravelling, your [Chaos] Damage randomly either also contributes to [Freeze] buildup, [Flammability] and [Ignite] [BuffMagnitude|Magnitudes], or [Shock] chance - changing which it contributes to every two seconds.
Definition.zh: 受到解析影响时，你的[Chaos|混沌]伤害随机同时作用于[Freeze|冻结]积蓄、[Flammability|易燃]和[Ignite|点燃][BuffMagnitude|强度]，或[Shock|感电]几率，作用的对象每两秒改变一次。

Definition.en:
[Totem|Totems] you place which grant Embankment Auras give a different Aura [Buff] to Players in range depending on the kind of [Totem], as follows:

Artillery Ballista grants 20% increased [SkillSpeed|Skill Speed].

Siege Ballista grants 25% more Damage against [Immobilised] Enemies.

Mortar Cannon grants 25% of Damage [Gain|Gained] as extra [Fire].

Shockwave Totem grants 30% increased Area of Effect.

Ancestral Warrior Totem grants 40% increased [Glory] Generation.

Dark Effigy grants 40% increased Damage over Time.

Spell Totem grants 50% increased [Critical|Critical Hit Chance].
Definition.zh:
你放置的提供堤防光环的[Totem|图腾]会根据[Totem|图腾]类型为范围内的玩家提供不同的光环[Buff|增益状态]，具体如下：

火力弩炮使[SkillSpeed|技能速度]提高 25%。

攻城炮台对[Immobilised|不可移动]敌人的伤害提高 25%。

迫击大炮[Gain|获得]相当于伤害 25% 的额外[Fire|火焰]伤害。

震波图腾使效果范围扩大 30%。

先祖战士图腾使[Glory|荣耀]生成量提高 40%。

黑暗塑像使持续伤害提高 40%。

法术图腾使[Critical|暴击率]提高 50%。

Definition.en:
Ice Fragments are created by a variety of Skills and [DetonationTime|Detonate] in an Area to deal [Cold] damage. If a Skill creates multiple Ice Fragments at the same time, only one of them can damage a single enemy.

Some skills can interact with Ice Fragments. Unless otherwise specified, each Ice Fragment can only interact with a single Skill use during its lifetime.
Definition.zh:
冰霜碎片由多种技能创造，并在一个区域内[DetonationTime|引爆]以造成[Cold|冰霜]伤害。如果一个技能同时创造多个冰晶碎片，其中只有一个碎片能对同一个敌人造成伤害。

某些技能可以与冰霜碎片互动。除非另有说明，每个冰霜碎片在其存续期间，只能与单个技能互动一次。

Definition.en: Fragments of Divinity are [Consume|Consumed] by certain Skills to grant additional effects. Divine Fragments last 10 seconds.
Definition.zh: 神性碎片会被特定技能[Consume|消耗]以赋予额外效果。神性碎片持续 10 秒。

Definition.en:
Divinity can be spent for skills, similar to Mana.

Divinity inherently Regenerates at a rate of 25% per second.
Definition.zh:
神性可以作为技能的资源消耗，类似于魔力。
神性天然会以每秒 25% 的速度再生。

Definition.en:
Broken Stance is a [Debuff] inflicted by [HitDamage|Hits], which stores 10% of the [Premitigation|Pre-mitigation] [Physical] [HitDamage|Hit damage] of the [HitDamage|Hit] that inflicts it as its [BuffMagnitude|Magnitude].

The inflicter's subsequent [HitDamage|Hits] against the target will gain additional unscaleable added [Physical] [HitDamage|Damage] equal to that magnitude.

Enemies with Broken Stance cannot be [Daze|Dazed] again.
Definition.zh:
破碎姿态是一种由[HitDamage|击中]施加的[Debuff|减益状态]，会将施加它的那次[HitDamage|击中]的[Premitigation|减免前][Physical|物理][HitDamage|击中伤害]的10% 储存为其[BuffMagnitude|强度]。

施加者后续对目标的[HitDamage|击中]将获得等同于该强度数值的额外不可调整的附加[Physical|物理][HitDamage|伤害]。

具有破碎姿态的敌人无法再次被[Daze|恍惚]。

Definition.en:
Umbral Souls grant varying [Buff|Buffs] depending on the kind of Skeletal [Minion] being replaced, as follows -

Umbral Souls from:
• Skeletal Warriors grant 15% increased [Attack] Damage.
• Skeletal Snipers grant 15% increased [Projectile] Speed.
• Skeletal Clerics grant 30% increased [ESRecharge|Energy Shield Recharge Rate].
• Skeletal Arsonists grant 15% increased Area of Effect.
• Skeletal Storm Mages grant 25% increased Spell Damage.
• Skeletal Frost Mages grant 35% increased maximum Energy Shield.
• Skeletal Brutes grant 60% increased [Stun] buildup.
• Skeletal Reavers grant 6% increased Skill Speed.
Definition.zh:
幽影灵魂根据被替换的魔侍[Minion|召唤生物]类型提供不同的[Buff|增益状态]，如下 - 

幽影灵魂来源：
• 魔侍武士使[Attack|攻击]伤害提高 15%。
• 魔侍神射手使[Projectile|投射物]速度提高 15%。
• 魔侍祭司使[ESRecharge|能量护盾充能率]提高 30%。
• 魔侍焚焰使使效果范围扩大 15%。
• 魔侍风暴法师使法术伤害提高 25%。
• 魔侍冰霜法师使最大能量护盾提高 35%。
• 魔侍蛮兵使[Stun|晕眩]积蓄提高 60%。
• 魔侍掠夺者使技能速度提高 6%。

Definition.en:
Deadly Map Bosses are specific [PowerfulMapBoss|Powerful Map Bosses] that appear in specific Maps and are more difficult and drop better rewards.

These rewards are often accompanied by a specific item, usually from a pool of items. For example Unique Items, or [LineageSupports|Lineage Supports].

Deadly Map Bosses can also drop items that grant access to [PinnacleBoss|Pinnacle Bosses].
Definition.zh:
危险的地图首领是出现在特定地图中的特殊[PowerfulMapBoss|强力地图首领]，难度更高且掉落更好的奖励。

这些奖励常伴随特定物品，往往选自一个物品池，如传奇物品或[LineageSupports|血脉辅助]。

危险的地图首领也可能掉落可挑战[PinnacleBoss|巅峰首领]的物品。

Definition.en: Pinnacle Bosses are endgame bosses accessed via specific keys or interactions with their mechanic.
Definition.zh: 巅峰首领是终局游戏首领，需通过特定钥匙或与其相关机制互动才能进入。

Definition.en: Invocation Skills are [Persistent] Skills that gain [Energy] through some condition and can be used once sufficient [Energy] has been gathered to [Invoke] socketed Skills, expending the [Energy] to [Trigger] them. Invocations can [Trigger] socketed Skills multiple times if enough [Energy] is expended, unless otherwise specified.
Definition.zh: 咒祈技能为[Persistent|永久性]技能，在某些条件下可获得[Energy|能量]，在达到足够[Energy|能量]来[Invoke|咒祈]插槽中的技能时，可消耗[Energy|能量][Trigger|触发]。如无另外说明，在有足够[Energy|能量]可供消耗时，可多次[Trigger|触发]插槽中的技能。

Definition.en:
Sundered Armour is a [Debuff] that can be applied to enemies with [ArmourBreak|Fully Broken Armour] that increases the [Physical] damage they take from [HitDamage|Hits] by an additional 20%. This effect stacks with the target's normal [ArmourBreak|Fully Broken Armour].

Unless otherwise specified, modifiers to [ArmourBreak|Fully Broken Armour] also apply to Sundered Armour. Enemies with Sundered Armour cannot get their [ArmourBreak|Armour Broken] further.
Definition.zh:
护甲撕裂是一种[Debuff|减益状态]，可对受到[ArmourBreak|护甲完全破损]效果的敌人施加，使被[HitDamage|击中]时受到的[Physical|物理]伤害额外增加 20%。该效果可与目标一般的[ArmourBreak|护甲完全破损]效果叠加。

如无另外说明，[ArmourBreak|护甲完全破损]的词缀也对护甲撕裂有效。拥有护甲撕裂的敌人无法再被进一步[ArmourBreak|护甲破损]。

Definition.en: A target is Isolated if none of its allies are within 6m of it.
Definition.zh: 若目标周围 6 米内没有友军，则该目标处于孤立状态。

Definition.en: Overflowing Chalice is a buff that causes Life and Mana [Flask|Flasks] to gain 2 charges per second and provide 30% increased recovery.
Definition.zh: 满溢圣杯是一种增益效果，使生命和魔力药剂每秒获得 2 次充能，并提高 30%回复量。

Definition.en: Withering Ground applies [Withered] every second to enemies standing in it.
Definition.zh: 凋零地面每秒对站在地面上的敌人施加[Withered|凋零]。

Definition.en:
Default Attacks are the innate [Attack] skills provided by [MartialWeapon|Martial Weapons], and the innate [UnarmedAttack|Unarmed Attack] skill "Punch".

The skill level of your Default Attacks is determined by your character level, and in turn determines the Attack Damage scaling of the skill, which is the percentage of your [MartialWeapon|Weapon's] damage the Default Attack deals.

Default Attacks never have any cost.
Definition.zh:
普通攻击是由[MartialWeapon|战斗武器]提供的固有[Attack|攻击]技能，以及固有的[UnarmedAttack|徒手攻击]技能“拳击”。
普通攻击的技能等级取决于角色等级，进而决定该技能的攻击伤害系数，即普通攻击会造成你的[MartialWeapon|武器]伤害的一定百分比。

普通攻击没有任何消耗。

Definition.en:
Your Default Attack Damage is the expected damage of a [DefaultAttack|Default Attack], and is determined by the damage of your [MartialWeapon|Weapon] and an Attack Damage scaling value based on your character level.

Your [DefaultAttack|Default Attacks] will always deal Default Attack Damage unless modifiers are applied to change their damage or skill level.

Some [Attack] skills provided by [SupportGem|Support Gems] do not determine their Attack Damage scaling from skill level, but instead deal a percentage of Default Attack Damage.
Definition.zh:
你的普通攻击伤害为[DefaultAttack|普通攻击]的预期伤害，该数值由你的[MartialWeapon|武器]伤害以及随角色等级变化的攻击伤害调幅决定。

你的[DefaultAttack|普通攻击]在未受到任何改变其伤害或技能等级的词缀影响时，始终会造成普通攻击伤害。

某些由[SupportGem|辅助宝石]提供的[Attack|攻击]技能，并非根据技能等级来决定攻击伤害调幅，而是造成一定百分比的普通攻击伤害。

Definition.en: Khatal's Rejuvenation stacks up to 8 times and grants 5% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate per stack. Each stack of Khatal's Rejuvenation lasts for 10 seconds.
Definition.zh: 卡哈塔的复苏可叠加8层，每层提高 5%冷却回复速度。每层持续 10 秒。

Definition.en: While you have this [Buff], damage you take is stored. When the [Buff] expires, you gain [Guard] equal to 50% of the stored damage and [Rage] equal to 3% of the stored damage.
Definition.zh: 当你拥有此[Buff|增益]状态时，你所承受的伤害会被储存。当此[Buff|增益]状态结束时，你将获得相当于储存伤害 50% 的[Guard|防卫]，以及相当于储存伤害 3% 的[Rage|怒火]。

Definition.en:
Two gems are considered Connected if one is socketed into the other, or if both are socketed into a third gem.

A [SupportGem|Support Gem] socketed in a [Meta|Meta] Skill  is still Connected to that [Meta] Skill and to all other Skills socketed in that [Meta] Skill, even if it cannot Support some of those skills.
Definition.zh:
如果一颗宝石镶嵌在另一颗宝石上，或者两颗宝石都镶嵌在第三颗宝石上，则认为这两颗宝石是相连的。

一颗[SupportGem|辅助宝石]镶嵌在[Meta|非凡]技能中，即使无法辅助该[Meta|非凡]技能中的某些技能，它仍然被视为与该[Meta|非凡]技能及镶嵌在该非凡技能中的所有其他技能相连。

Definition.en:
Activating a Summoning Circle will cause a Boss to be spawned. 

If an area contains more than one Summoning Circle it will contain runes to reactivate the Summoning Circle instead of additional Summoning Circles.
Definition.zh:
激活召唤法阵将生成一位首领。

如果一个区域包含多个召唤法阵，那么该区域将包含用于重新激活召唤法阵的符文，而非额外的召唤法阵。

Definition.en:
Adaptations are gained by taking [ElementalDamage|Elemental Damage] from [HitDamage|Hits] and cause you to take less damage of that [ElementalDamage|Type] from subsequent [HitDamage|Hits].

Unless otherwise specified, you can have 3 Adaptations at a time, and Adaptations do not have a duration.
Definition.zh:
适者生存可通过承受来自[HitDamage|击中]的[ElementalDamage|元素伤害]获得，并使你在后续[HitDamage|击中]时受到的相同[ElementalDamage|类型]元素伤害降低。

除非另有说明，否则你最多可同时拥有 3 层适者生存，且效果没有持续时间限制。

Definition.en:
[Shapeshift|Shapeshifting] into a Bear grants access to devastating [Slam|Slams] and [Fire] [Attack|Attacks] fuelled by smouldering [Rage].

While in Bear form, you gain:
• +10 to [Armour] per level
• 30% of [Armour] also applies to [ElementalDamage|Elemental Damage]
• an [Charges|Endurance Charge] for every 15 [Rage] you spend
Definition.zh:
[Shapeshift|变形]为巨熊使你能够使用由闷烧[Rage|怒火]驱动的强力[Slam|猛击]与[Fire|火焰][Attack|攻击]。

处于巨熊形态时，你将获得：
• 每级 +10 点[Armour|护甲]
• 30% 的[Armour|护甲]值同时对[ElementalDamage|元素伤害]生效
• 每消耗 15 点[Rage|怒火]，便获得一个[Charges|耐力球]

Definition.en:
[Shapeshift] into a Werewolf to draw power from the [Cold] light of the moon, leading your pack with rabid [Attack|Attacks].

While in Werewolf form, you drop to all fours after moving for a short time, gaining 30% increased movement speed when not Sprinting.
Definition.zh:
[Shapeshift|变形]为狼人可从月亮的[Cold|冰霜]辉光中汲取力量，并以狂猛的[Attack|攻击]率领你的狼群。

处于狼人形态时，短暂移动后会转为四肢着地奔跑，在非疾跑状态下获得 30% 的移动速度加成。

Definition.en:
[Shapeshift] into a Wyvern to bombard your enemies with [Fire] and [Lightning], then close in for the kill.

While in Wyvern form, you gain:
• 50% increased [StunThreshold|Stun Threshold]
• 50% increased [AilmentThreshold|Elemental Ailment Threshold]
• 50% [FasterESRechargeStart|faster start of Energy Shield Recharge]
Definition.zh:
[Shapeshift|变形]为双足飞龙使你能够使用[Fire|火焰]和[Lightning|闪电]伤害轰炸敌人，最终靠近并击杀敌人。

处于双足飞龙形态时，你将获得：
• [StunThreshold|晕眩阈值]提高 50%
• [AilmentThreshold|元素异常状态阈值]提高 50%
• [FasterESRechargeStart|能量护盾充能启动速度加快] 50%

Definition.en: Plants created by Plant Skills can be Overgrown to gain power in ways detailed on the Plant Skill. This generally cannot be caused by the Skill that creates the Plants, and requires a different Skill or effect that specifically causes them to Overgrow.
Definition.zh: 由植物技能创造的植物可以被蔓生，以此获得植物技能上所详述的强化效果。这通常不能由创造该植物的技能本身触发，而需要依靠其他能专门蔓生植物的技能或效果。

Definition.en:
[HitDamage|Hits] which could potentially be a [Critical|Critical Hit] but do not roll a [Critical|Critical Hit] will re-roll [Critical|Critical Hit] chance until they succeed.

Hits have 30% less [CriticalDamageBonus|Critical Damage Bonus] for each time [Critical|Critical Hit] chance was re-rolled.
Definition.zh:
对于可能造成[Critical|暴击]但未成功判定为[Critical|暴击]的[HitDamage|击中]，将反复重置[Critical|暴击]几率直至成功。

每次[Critical|暴击]几率重置后，击中的[CriticalDamageBonus|暴击伤害加成]都会降低 30%。

Definition.en: For every 2% increased Effectiveness, Monsters gain 2% more [Toughness], 1% more Experience granted and 1% more quantity of items dropped.
Definition.zh: 效能每增加 2%，怪物获得的[Toughness|韧性]就提高 2%，并提供 1%更多经验值和 1%更多物品掉落数量。

Definition.en:
100% more Maximum [Rage]
Regenerate 1 [Rage] per second per 4 [Rage] spent [Recently]
No [Rage] effect
Definition.zh:
[Rage|怒火]上限提高 100%
[Recently|近期]每消耗 4 点[Rage|怒火]，则每秒回复 1 点[Rage|怒火]
[Rage|怒火]效果失效

Definition.en: [ItemRarity|Unique] items may be closely tied to certain cultures as indicated by an icon in their tooltip. These cultures may hold secrets to manipulating these unique items.
Definition.zh: [ItemRarity|传奇]物品可能与特定文化（通过物品提示框中的图标标示）紧密相关。这些文化或许掌握着操控此类传奇物品的秘法。

Definition.en: Wind Skills gain additional interactions with other specified Skills, typically [Fire] Skills.
Definition.zh: 风系技能会与特定其他技能产生额外互动效果，通常为[Fire|火焰]技能。

Definition.en:
You see what is and what might have been. Reveal a suite of Oracle-only passive tree nodes after Ascending as an Oracle.

On taking The Unseen Path Ascendancy Notable, gain the ability to allocate these nodes.
Definition.zh:
你将窥见现实与未成之路。作为神谕者完成升华后，可解锁一系列神谕者专属的天赋树节点。

当分配至升华核心天赋"无踪之道"时，可获得分配这些节点的能力。

Definition.en: Some modifiers on [Rune|Runes] and [Idol|Idols] are available only to players who have allocated the Shaman's Wisdom of the Maji Ascendancy Notable.
Definition.zh: 部分[Rune|符文]与[Idol|雕像]上的词缀仅限已点出“萨满的智慧”众神升华核心天赋的玩家使用。

Definition.en:
An item with a Vaal Siphoner will require a set number of kills to complete. Once complete the tier of a random modifier on the item will be downgraded and all other modifiers will have their numeric values improved.

These improved modifier will have their values randomised between their current value and 10% above their maximum value.
Definition.zh:
带有“瓦尔虹吸者”词缀的物品需要达成一定击杀数才能完成充能。完成后，物品的一个随机词缀的阶位将会降低，而其他所有词缀的数值都将获得提升。

这些被提升的词缀的数值，将在其当前值与比其最大值高 10% 的数值之间随机分配。

Definition.en:
By default, chance-based stats cap at 100% chance for the result to occur. However, some chances can surpass 100%. In this case, the event for which you have a chance to effect will occur once for each 100% chance for that event you have, and then have a normal percentage chance for it to occur again based on the remaining value.

For example, a Surpassing 215% chance for an event to occur will cause the event to occur twice (once for each 100% chance) and have a 15% chance for it to occur a third time.
Definition.zh:
默认情况下，基于几率的属性生效上限为 100%。然而，部分几率可突破此限制。当几率超过 100% 时，每拥有一个 100% 几率即可保证效果触发一次，剩余几率将作为额外触发一次的常规几率独立计算。

例如：若某效果的溢出几率为 215%，则效果将必定触发两次（每100%几率对应一次），并有 15% 的几率额外触发第三次。

Definition.en: The default maximum [Quality] 20%.
Definition.zh: 默认最大[Quality|品质]为 20%。

Definition.en: Thorny Ground deals Spell damage to enemies upon being created, then continues to damage enemies that move over the Ground, no more than twice per second.
Definition.zh: 荆棘地面在生成时对敌人造成法术伤害，之后会对在其上移动的敌人持续造成伤害，每秒最多触发两次。

Definition.en:
[Strike] Skills can be made to deal Splash damage when hitting an enemy, causing an additional [HitDamage|Hit] to other enemies around the one hit by the [Strike].

The base radius of Splash damage is 1.5 metres.
Definition.zh:
[Strike|打击]技能击中敌人时能够造成溅射伤害，并对[Strike|打击]技能击中的敌人附近的其他敌人造成额外一次[HitDamage|击中]。

溅射伤害的基准范围半径为 1.5米。

Definition.en:
[Mark|Marks] all have a condition that makes them Activate.
When a [Mark] Activates, it will cause an extra effect and then be [Consume|Consumed].
Definition.zh: 所有[Mark|印记]均设有可将其激活的特定条件。当[Mark|印记]被激活时，将引发额外效果，随后被[Consume|消耗]。

Definition.en:
Any mechanic where the calculation of a single [HitDamage|Hit] would roll [Critical|Critical Hit] Chance more than once is considered to be Rerolling. This includes anything that makes [Critical|Critical Hit] Chance [Lucky], [Unlucky], [ForksCrit|Bifurcated], or [InevitableCriticalHits|Inevitable].

[Sustained] Skills using an independent [Critical|Critical Hit] Chance roll for each different time they deal damage is not Rerolling.
Definition.zh:
任何机制中，若对单次[HitDamage|击中]的[Critical|暴击]几率进行多次判定，则被视为“重置”。这包含使[Critical|暴击]几率[Lucky|幸运]、[Unlucky|不幸]、[ForksCrit|分叉暴击]或 [InevitableCriticalHits|命定]的所有情况。

[Sustained|持续性技能]在不同时段造成伤害时进行各自独立的[Critical|暴击]几率判定，则不属于重置。

Definition.en:
When [Ignite|Igniting] a target which has already been [Ignite|Ignited] by the same use of this Skill, the existing [Ignite] is removed to boost the new [Ignite], multiplying its [BuffMagnitude|Magnitude] by the total number of [Ignite|Ignites] compounded this way.

[Ignite|Ignites] cannot Compound when reflected, or when applied by [OilGround|Oil Ground] that has been [Ignite|Ignited]. They will neither remove existing [Ignite], nor get any boost to [BuffMagnitude|Ignite Magnitude].
Definition.zh:
当使用同一个技能[Ignite|点燃]一个已被该技能[Ignite|点燃]的目标时，现有的[Ignite|点燃]效果将被移除，用以强化新的[Ignite|点燃]，其效果[BuffMagnitude|强度]将乘以通过此方式累计叠加的[Ignite|点燃]总数。

由反射，或由被[Ignite|点燃]的[OilGround|黏油地面]施加的[Ignite|点燃]，无法进行叠加。这些[Ignite|点燃]既不会移除现有的[Ignite|点燃]，也不会获得任何[BuffMagnitude|点燃强度]加成。

Definition.en: Drenched is a [Debuff] that causes enemies to be easier to [Shock] and [Freeze].
Definition.zh: 浸湿是一种[Debuff|减益状态]，会使敌人更容易[Shock|感电]和[Freeze|冻结]。

Definition.en: Storm Skills are long-duration weather-based Skills that have special interactions with other effects.
Definition.zh: 风暴技能是基于天气的长持续时间技能，可与其他效果产生特殊的相互作用。

Definition.en: The maximum value of this modifier is applied to the whole modifier, including the constant part.
Definition.zh: 该词缀的最大值将应用于整个词缀，包括其恒定部分。

Definition.en:
[Storm|Storm] and [Plant|Plant] [Spell|Spells] deal 50% more damage
[Storm|Storm] and [Plant|Plant] [Spell|Spells] have 75% less duration
[Storm|Storm] and [Plant|Plant] [Spell|Spells] have 50% less cost
Definition.zh:
[Storm|风暴]与[Plant|植物]类[Spell|法术]造成的伤害提高 50%
[Storm|风暴]与[Plant|植物]类[Spell|法术]持续时间缩短 75%
[Storm|风暴]与[Plant|植物]类[Spell|法术]消耗降低 50%

Definition.en:
Energised Crystals are collected by energising [ContainsIncursion|Vaal Beacons] throughout Wraeclast, and are required to access Atziri's Temple.

6 Energised Crystals are required to power the Temple Console.
Definition.zh:
充能水晶可通过激活遍布瓦尔克拉斯的[ContainsIncursion|瓦尔灯塔]进行收集，是进入阿兹里神庙的必要物品。

需要 6 个充能水晶才能为神庙控制台供能。

Definition.en: This refers to the base amount of time to perform an [Attack] Skill, accounting only for the Attacks per Second value of the relevant [MartialWeapon|Weapon] and the percentage of Base Attack Speed listed on the [Attack] gem.
Definition.zh: 指执行一次[Attack|攻击]技能所需的基础时间，其计算仅依据相关[MartialWeapon|武器]的每秒攻击次数，以及[Attack|攻击]技能宝石上所列出的基础攻击速度百分比。

Definition.en:
Each time you enter the Temple a random selection of rooms are Destabilised, removing them permanently when you next exit. 

In addition to the randomly selected rooms, some rooms are Destabilised upon completion. [IncursionRestrictedRoom|Restricted Rooms] that are accessible will always destabilise upon exiting the Temple.

Defeating the Architect or Atziri causes greater Destabilisation.
Definition.zh:
每次进入神庙时，会随机选择若干房间陷入瓦解状态，并在你下次退出时永久移除这些房间。

除了随机选择的房间外，部分房间在完成后也会瓦解。可进入的[IncursionRestrictedRoom|秘藏房间]在离开神庙时总是会瓦解。

击败建筑师或阿兹里将导致更剧烈的瓦解。

Definition.en: Restricted Rooms are those that are placed by using Xipocado's Console in the Architect's Chamber
Definition.zh: 秘藏房间指通过筑师殿堂中的夏波卡多控制台所放置的房间

Definition.en: Juatalotli's Medallion prevents the next [IncursionDestabilization|Destabilisation] of a Room
Definition.zh: 华塔洛蒂的纹章可防止一个房间下次发生[IncursionDestabilization|瓦解]

Definition.en: Hayoxi's Medallion rerolls a [IncursionRestrictedRoom|Restricted Room] in the Temple
Definition.zh: 海幽夏的纹章可重掷神庙中的一个[IncursionRestrictedRoom|秘藏房间]

Definition.en: Quipolatl's Medallion [IncursionRoomUpgrades|Upgrades] the Tier of a Room
Definition.zh: 奎波拉特尔的纹章可[IncursionRoomUpgrades|升级]一个房间的等阶。

Definition.en: Uromoti's Medallion allows you to place a specific Room in the Temple
Definition.zh: 武罗摩提的纹章允许你在神庙中放置一个指定房间

Definition.en: Xopec's Medallion increases your Maximum [IncursionCrystal|Crystal] Capacity by 6 (up to 60)
Definition.zh: 肖佩克的纹章使你的[IncursionCrystal|充能水晶]最大容量增加 6（上限为 60 ）

Definition.en: Azcapa's Medallion increases your Maximum Medallion Capacity by 1 (up to 6)
Definition.zh: 阿兹卡帕的纹章使你的纹章最大容量增加 1（上限为 6 ）

Definition.en: Estazunti's Medallion allows you to place an additional [IncursionRestrictedRoom|Restricted Room Card] after defeating the Architect
Definition.zh: 埃斯塔祖提的纹章允许你在击败建筑师后额外放置一张[IncursionRestrictedRoom|秘藏房间卡牌]

Definition.en: Puhuarte's Medallion allows you to reroll the Room Cards available for placement
Definition.zh: 普华特的纹章允许你重掷可供放置的房间卡牌

Definition.en: Zantipi's Medallion adds one to the number of random [Waystone] Modifiers added to your Temple.
Definition.zh: 赞提佩的纹章使你的神庙增加一个随机[Waystone|引路石]词缀数量。

Definition.en:
Power is provided to connected Paths by Generator rooms. Powered Paths provide Power to adjacent rooms.

The Generator rooms are Dynamo, Shrine of Empowerment, Solar Nexus and Infinite Horizon. 

The Smithy, Synthflesh Lab, Transcendent Barracks and Golem Works rooms can be [IncursionRoomUpgrades|Upgraded] by receiving Power.
Definition.zh:
供能房间会为相连的路径提供能量。被充能的路径会为相邻房间供能。

供能房间包括：动力核心、赋能圣所、烈日核心和无穷天际。

铁匠铺、合成血肉实验室、升华守卫兵营与魔像工坊房间可通过接收能量来[IncursionRoomUpgrades|升级]。

Definition.en: Limb Modification can be performed by using a Transcension Device. Limb Modification will replace a chosen body part with a modified version, granting you an additional stat. Limb Modifications are lost when you resurrect after dying.
Definition.zh: 肢体改造可通过使用升华装置进行。该改造会将选定身体部位替换为具有词缀的新肢体，为你提供额外属性。从死亡中复活后，肢体改造效果将消失。

Definition.en: Medallions are obtained from Atziri's Temple and can be used to modify the Temple in various ways.
Definition.zh: 纹章可从阿兹里的神庙中获得，并可用于以多种方式调整神庙属性。

Definition.en:
Modifiers to [Ailments|Ailment] Application apply to:
[Bleeding], [Poison] and [Shock] chance
[Flammability], [Freeze] and [Electrocute|Electrocution] Buildup.
Definition.zh:
[Ailments|异常状态]应用相关的词缀适用于：
[Bleeding|流血]、[Poison|中毒]与[Shock|感电]的几率
[Flammability|易燃]、[Freeze|冰冻]与[Electrocute|触电]的积蓄。

Definition.en:
Activating Vaal Beacons [IncursionCrystal|Energises Crystals] allowing access to Atziri's Temple.

Within the Vaal Ruins a Vaal architect's console may be activated to allow the manipulation of the Temple before activating a temporal portal to travel back in time to 400 BIC, during the reign of Queen Atziri.
Definition.zh:
激活瓦尔灯塔可为[IncursionCrystal|充能水晶]充能，从而进入阿兹里神庙。

在瓦尔遗迹中，可激活瓦尔建筑师的控制台，以便在开启时空之门回到恒历前 400 年，也就是阿兹里女王统治时期，对神庙进行改造。

Definition.en:
Each Mirror offers a rare item of one of the following base types:
• [FourRingLake1|Dusk Ring]
• [FourRingLake2|Gloam Ring]
• [FourRingLake3|Penumbra Ring]
• [FourRingLake4|Tenebrous Ring]
• [FourAmuletLake1|Dusk Amulet]
• [FourAmuletLake2|Gloam Amulet]
• [FourAmuletLake3|Penumbra Amulet]
• [FourAmuletLake4|Tenebrous Amulet]
Definition.zh:
每面魔镜会提供以下基底类型之一的稀有物品：
• [FourRingLake1|暮色戒指]
• [FourRingLake2|薄暮戒指]
• [FourRingLake3|半影戒指]
• [FourRingLake4|暗黑戒指]
• [FourAmuletLake1|暮色项链]
• [FourAmuletLake2|薄暮项链]
• [FourAmuletLake3|半影项链]
• [FourAmuletLake4|暗黑项链]

Definition.en:
Soaring Ground grants 30% increased [Evasion] Rating, 40% increased damage while on Full Life, and [Onslaught] to you or [Allies] standing on it. These effects Linger for 1 second.

Soaring Ground has a 6 second base duration unless otherwise specified.
Definition.zh:
