腾飞之地能使立于其上的你或[Allies|友军]的[Evasion|闪避]提高 30%，满血时伤害提高 40%， 获得[Onslaught|猛攻]效果。这些效果在离开后持续 1 秒。

除非另有说明，腾飞之地的基础持续时间为 6 秒。

Definition.en:
[Shrine|Shrines] are found with multiple packs of monsters Worshipping the Shrine.

Other monsters may be affected by the Shrine's [Presence] but do not count as Worshippers.
Definition.zh:
[Shrine|神龛]周围常伴有多群敬拜神龛的怪物。

其他怪物可能会受到神坛[Presence|存在]的影响，但不被视为敬拜者。

Definition.en:
Runic Ward is a last line of protection, absorbing fatal damage instead of your Life. If you take damage that would cause your Life to reach 0 while you have Runic Ward, you will drop to 1 Life and your Runic Ward will take the remaining damage. You will still die if you do not have enough Runic Ward to absorb the remaining damage. Runic Ward does not protect against Life loss that is not caused by taking damage.

Runic Ward constantly regenerates at a default rate of 5% per second.

Monsters can also have Runic Ward. While a monster has Runic Ward, it cannot be [CullingStrike|Culled].
Definition.zh:
符文结界是抵御死亡的最终防护，可代替你的生命值吸收致命伤害。当你拥有符文结界时，若受到本会使生命降至 0 的伤害，你会降至 1 点生命，并由符文结界承受剩余的伤害。若你剩余的符文结界不足以吸收剩余伤害，你仍会死亡。符文结界无法抵御非伤害造成的生命损失。

符文结界会以默认每秒 5% 的速度持续再生。

怪物也可拥有符文结界。当怪物拥有符文结界时，其无法被[CullingStrike|终结]。

Definition.en:
Monster Rarity increases the chance for monsters to be [Rarity|Rare and Magic].

Monster Rarity also increases [MonsterModifiers|Monster Modifier] Chance for Rare Monsters.
Definition.zh:
怪物稀有度会提高怪物成为[Rarity|稀有与魔法]怪物的几率。

怪物稀有度也会提高稀有怪物的[MonsterModifiers|怪物词缀]几率。

Definition.en: Stats that refer to an item's [Armour] use the exact value listed on the item. This means that [Quality] and local modifiers on the item are taken into account, but stats from other sources that change the amount of [Armour] actually granted to your character are not considered.
Definition.zh: 涉及物品[Armour|护甲]的属性，使用的是物品上列出的具体数值。这意味着物品的[Quality|品质]及局部词缀都会被纳入计算，但通过其他来源获得的、会改变实际赋予角色的[Armour|护甲]值的属性则不被考虑。

Definition.en: Stats that refer to an item's [Evasion] use the exact value listed on the item. This means that [Quality] and local modifiers on the item are taken into account, but stats from other sources that change the amount of [Evasion] actually granted to your character are not considered.
Definition.zh: 涉及物品[Evasion|闪避]的属性，使用的是物品上列出的具体数值。这意味着物品的[Quality|品质]及局部词缀都会被纳入计算，但通过其他来源获得的、会改变实际赋予角色的[Evasion|闪避]值的属性则不被考虑。

Definition.en: Stats that refer to an item's [EnergyShield|Energy Shield] use the exact value listed on the item. This means that [Quality] and local modifiers on the item are taken into account, but stats from other sources that change the amount of [EnergyShield|Energy Shield] actually granted to your character are not considered.
Definition.zh: 涉及物品[EnergyShield|能量护盾]的属性，使用的是物品上列出的具体数值。这意味着物品的[Quality|品质]及局部词缀都会被纳入计算，但通过其他来源获得的、会改变实际赋予角色的[EnergyShield|能量护盾]值的属性则不被考虑。

Definition.en: [ContainsRitual|Ritual] Free Rerolls allow rerolling Favours an additional time at no Cost.
Definition.zh: [ContainsRitual|驱灵祭坛]免费重置允许你无需消耗即可额外重置一次恩典。

Definition.en:
Monster Minions are any monsters that are part of a [Rarity|Rare] Monster [Pack].

These monsters receive one modifier from each Rare Monster in the Pack.

Monsters summoned or created by other Monsters do not count as Monster Minions.
Definition.zh:
怪物仆从是指作为[Rarity|稀有]怪物[Pack|群落]的一部分的任何怪物。

这些怪物从该群落中的每个稀有怪物处获得一条词缀。

由其他怪物召唤或创造的怪物不计入怪物仆从。

Definition.en: Rogue Exile Hunting Grounds contain 2 additional [RogueExile|Rogue Exiles] and 5 additional [Pack|Packs] of [Rarity|Rare] [MonsterCategory|Beasts].
Definition.zh: 盗贼流放者猎场包含 2 个额外的[RogueExile|盗贼流放者]和 5 群额外的[Rarity|稀有][MonsterCategory|野兽][Pack|群落]。

Definition.en:
Rooms in Atziri's Temple may have their tier upgraded in various ways, up to a default maximum of tier 3.

Most rooms are upgraded via their adjacent rooms, some rooms are upgraded via [IncursionPower|Powered Paths].

Garrisons may be transformed into a Legion Barracks when adjacent to a Viper Spymaster or to a Transcendant Barracks when adjacent to a Synthflesh Lab.

Flesh Surgeon and Thaumaturge instead have their level equal to the highest adjacent Synthflesh Lab or Sacrificial Chamber, respectively.

Quipolatl's Medallion may be used to upgrade the tier of a room by 1.
Definition.zh:
阿兹里神庙中的房间可通过多种方式提升等阶，默认最高为 3 阶。

大多数房间通过与其相邻的房间升级，部分房间则通过[IncursionPower|充能路径]升级。

驻军地在与毒蛇密使的房间相邻时可转变为军团兵营，在与合成血肉实验室相邻时可转变为升华守卫兵营。

血肉外科医师与奇术师的等级，则分别等同于相邻的最高等级合成血肉实验室或献祭室的等级。

奎波拉特尔的纹章可用于将房间的等阶提升 1 级。

Definition.en:
Additional Rare Monsters can spawn in [Rarity|Rare] Monster [Pack|Packs] with larger pack sizes.

Each Rare Monster in the Pack provides one modifier to the Pack's [MonsterMinion|Minions].

Additional Rare Monsters in [Essence] Packs also carry Essences.
Definition.zh:
[Rarity|稀有][Pack|群落]在规模更大时，可以生成额外的稀有怪物。

群落中的每个稀有怪物都会为该群落中的[MonsterMinion|怪物仆从]提供一条词缀。

[Essence|精华]群落中的额外稀有怪物也携带精华。

Definition.en:
Empowered [MonsterMinion|Monster Minions] deal increased damage and have increased health.

Empowerment does not inherently increase rewards but some effects add rewards when Empowering Minions.
Definition.zh:
强化的[MonsterMinion|怪物仆从]会造成更多伤害，并拥有更高的生命值。

强化本身并不会内在增加奖励，但某些效果会在强化怪物仆从时添加奖励。

Definition.en:
Abandoned Cities have very few living inhabitants. 

Monsters in the area are replaced by Undead. These undead have 50% chance to drop non-equipment items instead of equipment.

Abandoned Cities have 25% increased Chests in the area.
Definition.zh:
废弃之城中鲜有活物存留。

该区域的怪物将被亡灵取代。这些亡灵有 50% 的几率掉落非装备物品，而非装备本身。

废弃都市中的宝箱数量提高 25%。

Definition.en:
Exceptional Items have [Quality] over maximum or an additional [Augment] Socket.

High Tier [Rarity|Rare] Items found have a chance to instead drop as an Exceptional Normal Item.
Definition.zh:
卓越物品要么拥有超过上限的[Quality|品质]，要么拥有一个额外的[[Augment|增幅器]插槽。

发现的高阶[Rarity|稀有]物品，有几率以卓越普通物品的形态掉落。

Definition.en: Protects the Bear Spirit's [Allies] while they are in its [Presence], granting them 2% of maximum Life regenerated per second and causing 8% of the damage they would take to be taken by the Bear Spirit instead.
Definition.zh: 熊灵会庇佑其[Presence|存在]范围内的[Allies|友军]，为其提供每秒 2% 最大生命的回复，并令其本会承受的伤害中的 8% 改为由熊灵承担。

Definition.en:
Biomes are found throughout Endgame Maps.

Grass, Forest, Swamp, Desert, Mountain and Water Biomes are all commonly found.

Cities and special biomes are less likely to be encountered.
Definition.zh:
终局地图中分布着多种地貌。

常见的有草原、森林、沼泽、沙漠、山岳与水泽地貌。

城市及特殊地貌则较为罕见。

Definition.en:
Invaded Cities have their natural inhabitants plus 15 extra [Pack|Packs] of another faction.

Invaded Cities gain the [Biome] bonuses of the invading faction.

The Factions are the Ezomyte, Faridun and Vaal.
Definition.zh:
沦陷之城中，除了原有怪物外，还会额外出现 15 [Pack|群落]其他阵营的怪物。

沦陷之城将获得入侵阵营的[Biome|地貌]加成。

可能的阵营有：艾兹麦、法里顿与瓦尔。

Definition.en:
Some methods of item crafting guarantee that a specific Modifier will be crafted onto the item. An item can only have one Crafted Modifier, but they otherwise behave identically to other Modifiers.

Crafted Modifiers are displayed in a lighter blue colour than regular Modifiers.
Definition.zh:
某些物品制作方法能保证将特定词缀制作到物品上。一件物品只能拥有一条工艺词缀，但除此之外，它们的行为与其他词缀一致。

工艺词缀以比普通词缀更浅的蓝色显示。

Definition.en:
A Grand Mirror causes a reflection of the [MapBoss|Map Boss]. When the bosses are defeated [ContainsDelirium|Delirium] fog spreads to nearby Maps.

When the fog reaches 100% [Delirious|Deliriousness] one of the remaining maps will be transformed into a Simulacrum.
Definition.zh:
恢宏之镜会生成一个[MapBoss|地图首领]的镜像，当这些首领被击败后，[ContainsDelirium|惊悸迷雾]会扩散至附近的地图。

当迷雾达到 100%[Delirious|亢奋度]时，剩余地图中的 1 张会转变为梦魇拟像。

Definition.en:
While you have any amount of Mountain's Teachings:
• [Attack|Attacks] you use yourself and [Attack|Attacks] granted by this Ascendancy Class deal 15% more damage
• Enemy [HitDamage|Hits] you take that would deal damage less than or equal to 30% of your maximum Life (after mitigation such as [Armour] and [Resistances], but before other modifiers to damage taken) deal 40% less damage
• You have 50% more [StunThreshold|Stun Threshold]

All Mountain's Teachings are lost if you go 20 seconds without gaining any.
Definition.zh:
当你拥有任意层数的山之教诲时：
• 你亲自发动的[Attack|攻击]以及由该升华职业赋予的[Attack|攻击]造成的总伤害提高 15%
• 你承受的敌人造成的[HitDamage|击中]伤害，若该伤害（在经[Armour|护甲]和[Resistances|抗性]等减免后，但在承受伤害的其他修正生效前）小于或等于你最大生命值的 30%，则其造成的总伤害降低 40%
• 你的[StunThreshold|晕眩阈值]总增 50%

若你在 20 秒内未获得任意层数的山之教诲，则失去所有层数。

Definition.en:
Wombgifts are found within [ContainsBreach|Breaches] and are grown on The Genesis Tree.

The 4 types of Wombgifts are:
* [BreachFruitCurrency|Lavish Wombgift]
* [BreachFruitAmulet|Ornate Wombgift]
* [BreachFruitBelt|Banded Wombgift]
* [BreachFruitRing|Signet Wombgift]
Definition.zh:
孕育赠礼可在[ContainsBreach|裂隙]中找到，并在起源之树上生长。

4 种孕育赠礼分别为：
* [BreachFruitCurrency|丰裕孕育赠礼]
* [BreachFruitAmulet|华丽孕育赠礼]
* [BreachFruitBelt|束带孕育赠礼]
* [BreachFruitRing|印戒孕育赠礼]

Definition.en:
The Rite of the Nameless is a group of maps which each contain [ContainsRitual|Ritual Altars] and a [MapBoss|Map Boss].

Completing all Ritual Altars will drop an [RitualPinnacleEffigyPiece|Effigy Piece].
Definition.zh:
“无名仪式”由一组地图组成，每张地图都包含[ContainsRitual|驱灵祭坛]和 1 个[MapBoss|地图首领]。

完成所有祭坛后，会掉落一个[RitualPinnacleEffigyPiece|雕像碎片]。

Definition.en: Effigy Pieces can be placed on an incomplete Effigy in Caer Tarth to complete the [RitualRiteOfTheNameless|Rite of the Nameless].
Definition.zh: 雕像碎片可以放置在赛尔塔斯的未完成雕像上，以完成[RitualRiteOfTheNameless|无名仪式]。

Definition.en: You are on Low [Ward|Runic Ward] if you have 35% of your maximum [Ward|Runic Ward] or less.
Definition.zh: 若你的[Ward|符文结界]值不高于最大值的 35%，则你处于低[Ward|符文结界]状态。

Definition.en: A Savage Hit is a Hit that removes at least 15% of Maximum Life.
Definition.zh: 残暴打击是指一次击中移除至少 15% 最大生命的击中。

Definition.en: Completing this Map will apply the specified Modifier to other Maps in the [RitualRiteOfTheNameless|Rite of the Nameless].
Definition.zh: 完成此地图会将指定的词缀应用于[RitualRiteOfTheNameless|无名仪式]中的其他地图。

Definition.en: The first list of Favours at [ContainsRitual|Ritual Altars] in this Map will contain the specified Item.
Definition.zh: 此地图中[ContainsRitual|驱灵祭坛]首次列出的恩典将包含指定物品。

Definition.en:
Basic Maps are any maps with no special interaction with areas or access requirements.

Notably, not [ContainsUniqueMap|Unique Maps], [DeadlyMapBoss|Deadly Map Boss] Maps, [PrecursorTower|Precursor Towers], Expedition Areas or Quest Areas.
Definition.zh:
基础地图是指任何不与区域产生特殊互动或没有进入要求的地图。

需要注意的是，[ContainsUniqueMap|传奇地图]、[DeadlyMapBoss|危险地图首领]地图、[PrecursorTower|先驱高塔]、先祖秘藏区域或任务区域并非基础地图。

Definition.en:
An item's Base Type refers to the specific variety of item it is, and grants it inherent properties such as damage on [MartialWeapon|Martial Weapons], defensive bonuses on Armour, or Life recovery on Life [Flask|Flasks]. It is also often responsible for the Level and/or [Attributes|Attribute] Requirements to equip an item.

For example:
• [Quarterstaff1|Wrapped Quarterstaff] and [Quarterstaff2|Long Quarterstaff] are both [Quarterstaff] Base Types
• [GlovesStr1|Stocky Mitts] and [GlovesDexInt2|Linen Wraps] are both Gloves Base Types
• [FlaskMana1|Lesser Mana Flask] and [FlaskMana3|Greater Mana Flask] are both Mana [Flask] Base Types
Definition.zh:
物品的基底类型指其具体种类，并赋予其固有属性，例如[MartialWeapon|战斗武器]的伤害、护甲的防御加成，或生命[Flask|药剂]的回复量。基底类型通常也决定了装备该物品所需的等级和/或[Attributes|属性]需求。

例如：
•[Quarterstaff1|裹布节杖]和[Quarterstaff2|长柄节杖]均为[Quarterstaff|节杖]基底类型
•[GlovesStr1|敦实护手]和[GlovesDexInt2|亚麻裹手]均为手套基底类型
•[FlaskMana1|次级魔力药剂]和[FlaskMana3|良质魔力药剂]均为魔力[Flask|药剂]基底类型

Definition.en:
There are a number of possible Mage's Legacies, each granting a different bonus:
• [LegacyOfAmethyst|Legacy of Amethyst]
• [LegacyOfBasalt|Legacy of Basalt]
• [LegacyOfBismuth|Legacy of Bismuth]
• [LegacyOfDiamond|Legacy of Diamond]
• [LegacyOfGold|Legacy of Gold]
• [LegacyOfGranite|Legacy of Granite]
• [LegacyOfJade|Legacy of Jade]
• [LegacyOfQuicksilver|Legacy of Quicksilver]
• [LegacyOfRuby|Legacy of Ruby]
• [LegacyOfSapphire|Legacy of Sapphire]
• [LegacyOfSilver|Legacy of Silver]
• [LegacyOfStibnite|Legacy of Stibnite]
• [LegacyOfSulphur|Legacy of Sulphur]
• [LegacyOfTopaz|Legacy of Topaz]

Only one instance of each Mage's Legacy can apply its bonus to you at a time.
Definition.zh:
存在多种可能的法师的遗产，每种提供不同的加成：
• [LegacyOfAmethyst|紫晶遗产]
• [LegacyOfBasalt|玄武岩遗产]
• [LegacyOfBismuth|灰岩遗产]
• [LegacyOfDiamond|钻石遗产]
• [LegacyOfGold|黄金遗产]
• [LegacyOfGranite|坚岩遗产]
• [LegacyOfJade|青玉遗产]
• [LegacyOfQuicksilver|水银遗产]
• [LegacyOfRuby|红玉遗产]
• [LegacyOfSapphire|蓝玉遗产]
• [LegacyOfSilver|白银遗产]
• [LegacyOfStibnite|黑锑遗产]
• [LegacyOfSulphur|硫磺遗产]
• [LegacyOfTopaz|黄玉遗产]

每种法师的遗产在同一时间只能有一个实例将其加成作用于你。

Definition.en: Legacy of Amethyst is a [MagesLegacy|Mage's Legacy] which grants +45% to [Chaos] [Resistances|Resistance].
Definition.zh: 紫晶遗产是一种[MagesLegacy|法师的遗产]，提供 45%的[Chaos|混沌] [Resistances|抗性]提高。

Definition.en: Legacy of Basalt is a [MagesLegacy|Mage's Legacy] which grants 150% increased [Armour].
Definition.zh: 玄武岩遗产是一种[MagesLegacy|法师的遗产]，提供 150%[Armour|护甲]提高。

Definition.en: Legacy of Bismuth is a [MagesLegacy|Mage's Legacy] which grants +45% to all [ElementalDamage|Elemental] [Resistances].
Definition.zh: 灰岩遗产是一种[MagesLegacy|法师的遗产]，提供 45%全部[ElementalDamage|元素] [Resistances|抗性]提高。

Definition.en: Legacy of Diamond is a [MagesLegacy|Mage's Legacy] which grants 75% increased [Critical|Critical Hit] Chance.
Definition.zh: 钻石遗产是一种[MagesLegacy|法师的遗产]，提供 75%[Critical|暴击]几率提高。

Definition.en: Legacy of Gold is a [MagesLegacy|Mage's Legacy] which grants 45% increased [ItemRarity|Rarity of Items] found.
Definition.zh: 黄金遗产是一种[MagesLegacy|法师的遗产]，提供 45%[ItemRarity|物品稀有度]提高。

Definition.en: Legacy of Granite is a [MagesLegacy|Mage's Legacy] which grants +2000 to [Armour].
Definition.zh: 坚岩遗产是一种[MagesLegacy|法师的遗产]，提供 2000 [Armour|护甲]提高。

Definition.en: Legacy of Jade is a [MagesLegacy|Mage's Legacy] which grants +2000 to [Evasion] Rating.
Definition.zh: 青玉遗产是一种[MagesLegacy|法师的遗产]，提供 2000 [Evasion|闪避]值提高。

Definition.en: Legacy of Quicksilver is a [MagesLegacy|Mage's Legacy] which grants 30% increased Movement Speed.
Definition.zh: 水银遗产是一种[MagesLegacy|法师的遗产]，提供 30%移动速度提高。

Definition.en: Legacy of Ruby is a [MagesLegacy|Mage's Legacy] which grants +60% to [Resistances|Fire Resistance] and +5% to [MaximumResistances|Maximum Fire Resistance].
Definition.zh: 红玉遗产是一种[MagesLegacy|法师的遗产]，提供 60%[Resistances|火焰抗性]提高和 5%[MaximumResistances|火焰抗性上限]提高。

Definition.en: Legacy of Sapphire is a [MagesLegacy|Mage's Legacy] which grants +60% to [Resistances|Cold Resistance] and +5% to [MaximumResistances|Maximum Cold Resistance].
Definition.zh: 蓝玉遗产是一种[MagesLegacy|法师的遗产]，提供 60%[Resistances|冰霜抗性]提高和 5%[MaximumResistances|冰霜抗性上限]提高。

Definition.en: Legacy of Silver is a [MagesLegacy|Mage's Legacy] which grants 30% increased [SkillSpeed|Skill Speed].
Definition.zh: 白银遗产是一种[MagesLegacy|法师的遗产]，提供 30%[SkillSpeed|技能速度]提高。

Definition.en: Legacy of Stibnite is a [MagesLegacy|Mage's Legacy] which grants 150% increased [Evasion|Evasion Rating].
Definition.zh: 黑锑遗产是一种[MagesLegacy|法师的遗产]，提供 150%[Evasion|闪避值]提高。

Definition.en: Legacy of Sulphur is a [MagesLegacy|Mage's Legacy] which grants 60% increased Damage, and makes the area within 2.5 metres of you [ConsecratedGround|Consecrated Ground] while you're stationary.
Definition.zh: 硫磺遗产是一种[MagesLegacy|法师的遗产]，提供 60%伤害提高，并且在你静止时，你周围 2.5 米内的区域变为[ConsecratedGround|奉献地面]。

Definition.en: Legacy of Topaz is a [MagesLegacy|Mage's Legacy] which grants +60% to [Resistances|Lightning Resistance] and +5% to [MaximumResistances|Maximum Lightning Resistance].
Definition.zh: 黄玉遗产是一种[MagesLegacy|法师的遗产]，提供 60%[Resistances|闪电抗性]提高和 5%[MaximumResistances|闪电抗性上限]提高。

Definition.en:
Some Remnant encounters have Bonus Rewards which provide guaranteed rewards, in addition to allowing you to choose a Runeshape Combination. 

Bonus rewards are granted to all party members who have not previously claimed the reward and were in the area when the Remnant was encountered.
Definition.zh:
部分残片事件拥有额外奖励，除了允许你选择一组符文组合外，还会提供固定的奖励。

额外奖励将给予所有尚未领取过该奖励、且在该残片事件发生时位于区域内的队伍成员。

Definition.en:
A Verisium Infusion can be used instead of any of the [ElementalInfusion|Elemental Infusions]. Skills will prioritise using non-Verisium Infusions. Verisium Infusions last for 20 seconds or until Consumed by another Skill.

Your maximum number of Verisium Infusions is equal to the maximum number of any single type of [ElementalInfusion|Elemental Infusion] you can have (3 by default).
Definition.zh:
维金灌注可以用来替代任意一种[ElementalInfusion|元素灌注]。技能会优先使用非维金灌注。维金灌注将持续 20 秒，或被其他技能消耗为止。

维金灌注数量上限等同于你拥有的任意一种[ElementalInfusion|元素灌注]的最大数量（默认 3 个）。

Definition.en: Secured [Strongbox|Strongboxes] are guarded by additional [Pack|Packs] of [Rarity|Rare] Monsters and may roll Modifiers which add [MonsterModifiers|Monster Modifiers] to any Rares guarding the Strongbox.
Definition.zh: 受保护的[Strongbox|保险箱]由额外的[Rarity|稀有]怪物[Pack|群落]守卫，并且可能具有随机词缀，为守卫保险箱的任意稀有怪物添加[MonsterModifiers|怪物词缀]。

Definition.en: [Slow|Slows] by 10%, reapplying this [Debuff] stacks and refreshes it's duration.
Definition.zh: [Slow|减速] 10%，重复施加此[Debuff|减益状态]会叠加并刷新其持续时间。

Definition.en:
Each "Boss Encounter" icon on the World Screen is a face which can be broken by beating the encounter.

"Rare Monster Encounter" icons do not provide any bonus when broken.
Definition.zh:
世界地图上的每个“首领遭遇战”图标都是一张可击碎的面孔，击败该遭遇即可将其击碎。

“稀有怪物遭遇战”图标在击碎时不会提供任何奖励。

Definition.en:
Allocated Sinister [Jewel] Sockets are visible on the left edge of the character portrait in the centre of the passive skill tree.

[ItemRarity|Unique] [Jewel|Jewels] cannot be socketed in Sinister Jewel Sockets, and modifiers to the effect of Jewel Sockets do not apply to Sinister Jewel Sockets.

They are entirely disconnected from the rest of your passive skill tree - they are not considered to be within any radius of any other passive skill, and no passive skill is within any radius of a Sinister [Jewel] Socket. Multiple Sinister [Jewel] Sockets are also not within any radius of each other. Radius effects of [Jewel|Jewels] will therefore have no effect when socketed in Sinister Sockets.
Definition.zh:
已分配的凶邪[Jewel|珠宝]插槽会显示在天赋树中央角色头像的左侧边缘。

[ItemRarity|传奇][Jewel|珠宝]无法镶嵌在凶邪珠宝插槽中，且珠宝插槽效果的修正不适用于凶邪珠宝插槽。

它们与天赋树的其他部分完全断开连接——不被视为处于任何其他天赋技能的范围内，也没有任何天赋技能处于凶邪[Jewel|珠宝]插槽的范围内。多个凶邪[Jewel|珠宝]插槽之间也互不在范围内。因此，镶嵌在凶邪插槽中的[Jewel|珠宝]的范围效果将不会生效。

Definition.en:
Socket-bound [Augment|Augments] permanently fill any [Augment] Socket they are placed into.

Once Socketed, they cannot be removed, replaced or extracted by any means.
Definition.zh:
插槽绑定的[Augment|增幅器]物品会永久填充它们所放入的[Augment|增幅器]插槽。

一旦镶嵌，便无法以任何方式移除、替换或提取。

Definition.en:
[Warcry|Warcries], and Non-[Channelling] [Spell|Spells] that affect an area around you or a targeted location, are Cascadable.

Certain effects can cause Cascadable Skills to Cascade, making them also affect other locations, or to Echo, affecting the same targeted location again after a delay.

A Cascadable Spell that [Repeat|Repeats] will not Cascade or Echo while [Repeat|Repeating].
Definition.zh:
[Warcry|战吼]，以及影响你周围或目标地点的非[Channelling|持续吟唱][Spell|法术]，都是可扩散的。

某些效果可以使可扩散技能产生扩散，使其也影响其他位置，或者产生回响，在延迟后再次影响同一个目标位置。

一个可扩散且[Repeat|可重复]的法术在[Repeat|重复]期间不会扩散或回响。

Definition.en: Anaemia is a [Debuff] that allows more than 10 [CorruptedBlood|Corrupted Blood] debuffs to be applied to a target. The [BuffMagnitude|Magnitude] of Anaemia determines how many additional Corrupted Blood stacks to be applied.
Definition.zh: 贫血是一种[Debuff|减益状态]，允许对目标施加超过 10 层的[CorruptedBlood|腐化之血]。贫血的[BuffMagnitude|强度]决定了可额外施加的腐化之血层数。

Definition.en:
Phased Form is a notable Ascendancy Passive Skill granted by Chronomancer granting the following stats:

Take 30% less Damage.
4 seconds after being Damaged by an Enemy Hit, take Damage equal to 30% of that Hit's Damage.
Definition.zh:
迷踪形态是塑时术师升华天赋提供的一个核心天赋，具有以下属性：

承受的伤害总降 30%。
在受到敌人击中伤害的 4 秒后，承受相当于该击中伤害 30% 的伤害。

Definition.en:
The number of Kalguuran Support Gems you can use is limited by your character level:
Level 1+: 1
Level 17+: 2
Level 33+: 3
Level 45+: 4
Level 65+: 5
Level 80+: 6
Definition.zh:
你可使用的卡古兰辅助宝石数量受角色等级限制：
等级 1+：1 个
等级 17+：2 个
等级 33+：3 个
等级 45+：4 个
等级 65+：5 个
等级 80+：6 个

Definition.en:
Activating a Precursor Terraformer will change a group of nearby [BasicMap|Basic Maps] to the shown Biome.

The Terraformer shows which biome it will change maps to. All maps in the Terraformed area will be replaced with maps that can appear in the shown biome.
Definition.zh:
激活先驱地形改造器会将一组相邻的[BasicMap|基础地图]转变为所显示的地貌。

地形改造器会显示其将地图转变为哪种地貌。被改造区域内的所有地图都将替换为该地貌类型中可能出现的地图。

Definition.en: Ancient Modifiers are fragments of Precursor power, adding many varied bonus effects to areas throughout the Precursor Fortress and beyond.
Definition.zh: 远古词缀是先驱者力量的碎片，能为先驱者要塞内外的区域添加多种多样的增益效果。

Definition.en: A mysterious [Augment] that shifts and shimmers. Is that whispering you hear?
Definition.zh: 一个神秘而闪烁的[Augment|增幅器]。你是否听到了低语？

Definition.en:
Sealed Skills are skills which gain Seals. Only skills you use yourself can be Sealed.

When you use a Sealed Skill, its Seals are broken, and that use of the skill will gain some benefit based on how many Seals it had.
Definition.zh:
“封印技能”是指能够获得封印的技能。只有你自身使用的技能才能被获得封印。

当你使用封印技能时，其封印会被打破，此次技能使用将根据其拥有的封印数量获得相应的增益。

Definition.en:
Raven-Touched items have been warped by the Raven Trickster, Tangmazu.

The influence of the mist allows you to instil the item with a Notable Passive Skill at the Withered Willow.

Items that are already instillable will not be able to gain an additional instillment if they become Raven-Touched.
Definition.zh:
沾染“渡鸦之触”的物品已被黑鸦欺诈者唐玛祖扭曲。

迷雾的影响允许你在萎败细柳处为该物品灌注 1 个核心天赋。

可灌注的物品如果沾染了“渡鸦之触”，将无法再获得额外灌注。

Definition.en: Great Beasts are [MapBoss|Map Bosses] marked by Hilda as worthy targets to defeat. Defeating a Great Beast will earn you [HildasFavour| Hilda's Favour].
Definition.zh: 巨兽是希尔达标记为值得击败的[MapBoss|地图首领]。击败巨兽将为你赢得[HildasFavour|希尔达的青睐]。

Definition.en: Hilda will reward you with an Atlas Master point to spend on Atlas Keystones.
Definition.zh: 希尔达会奖励你 1 点异界大师点数，用于分配异界核心天赋。

Definition.en:
Temple Currency are currency items found primarily throughout the Temple.

These currency items typically interact with [Corrupted|Corrupted Items] in a variety of ways.
Definition.zh:
神庙通货主要是在神庙各处找到的通货物品。

这些通货物品通常会以各种方式与[Corrupted|腐化物品]互动。

Definition.en:
Anomaly Maps have added requirements to access on the World Map. 

Bosses of these maps are [DeadlyMapBoss|Deadly] and may drop an additional lineage support.
Definition.zh:
异常地图在世界地图上具有额外的进入要求。

这些地图中的首领是[DeadlyMapBoss|危险的]地图首领，并可能掉落 1 个额外血脉辅助宝石。

Definition.en: Landmark Areas in the Atlas may be accessed multiple times and do not require a [Waystone] to access.
Definition.zh: 异界图鉴中的地标区域可以多次进入，且无需[Waystone|引路石]即可进入。

Definition.en:
Hiveblood is used to birth Wombgifts from The Genesis Tree in Monastery of the Keepers.

The maximum amount of Hiveblood you can have is 100,000.
Definition.zh:
虫巢之血可用于在守护者修道院的起源之树上孕育孕育赠礼。

你最多可拥有 100,000 点虫巢之血。

Definition.en:
Vivid Spirits are a type of [AzmeriSpirit|Azmeri Spirit].

Monsters [SpiritTouched|Influenced] or [SpiritPossessed|Possessed] by Vivid Spirits gain increased Skill Speed, in addition to any bonuses from the specific spirit type.

Monsters [SpiritPossessed|Possessed] by Vivid Spirits drop [Dexterity] items.
Definition.zh:
活性鬼灵是[AzmeriSpirit|阿兹莫里之灵]的一种。

受活性鬼灵[SpiritTouched|影响]或[SpiritPossessed|附身]的怪物，除了获得该鬼灵类型带来的加成外，还会获得技能速度提高。

被活性鬼灵[SpiritPossessed|附身]的怪物会掉落[Dexterity|敏捷]物品。

Definition.en:
Wild Spirits are a type of [AzmeriSpirit|Azmeri Spirit].

Monsters [SpiritTouched|Influenced] or [SpiritPossessed|Possessed] by Wild Spirits gain increased [Toughness], in addition to any bonuses from the specific spirit type.

Monsters [SpiritPossessed|Possessed] by Wild Spirits drop [Strength] items.
Definition.zh:
狂野鬼灵是[AzmeriSpirit|阿兹莫里之灵]的一种。

受狂野鬼灵[SpiritTouched|影响]或[SpiritPossessed|附身]的怪物，除了获得该鬼灵类型带来的加成外，还会获得[Toughness|韧性]提高。

被狂野鬼灵[SpiritPossessed|附身]的怪物会掉落[Strength|力量]物品。

Definition.en:
Primal Spirits are a type of [AzmeriSpirit|Azmeri Spirit].

Monsters [SpiritTouched|Influenced] or [SpiritPossessed|Possessed] by Primal Spirits deal increased damage, in addition to any bonuses from the specific spirit type.

Monsters [SpiritPossessed|Possessed] by Primal Spirits drop [Intelligence] items.
Definition.zh:
原始鬼灵是[AzmeriSpirit|阿兹莫里之灵]的一种。

受原始鬼灵[SpiritTouched|影响]或[SpiritPossessed|附身]的怪物，除了获得该鬼灵类型带来的加成外，还会获得造成的伤害提高。

被原始鬼灵[SpiritPossessed|附身]的怪物会掉落[Intelligence|智慧]物品。

Definition.en:
Puppet Master is a stacking [Buff] which grants: 
10% increased Skill Speed with Command Skills
10% reduced Movement Speed Penalty with Command Skills
Minions deal 10% increased damage with Command Skills
Minions have 2% increased Movement Speed
Minions have 3% increased Skill Speed

Each stack has an independent duration of 8 seconds. Maximum 5 stacks.
Definition.zh:
傀儡大师是一种可叠加的[Buff|增益]状态，每层提供：
命令技能的技能速度提高 10%
命令技能的移动速度惩罚降低 10%
使用命令技能指挥召唤生物造成的伤害提高 10%
召唤生物移动速度提高 2%
召唤生物技能速度提高 3%

每层增益有独立的持续时间。最多 5 层。

Definition.en: Aldur's Legacies are [Augment|Augments] which have taken the power of a Unique Ezomyte or Kalguuran Unique. You may not have more than one [Augment] of this type socketed at a time.
Definition.zh: 奥杜尔的遗产是一种[Augment|增幅器]，汲取了艾兹麦或卡古兰传奇物品的力量。你每次无法镶嵌超过 1 个此类[Augment|增幅器]物品。

Definition.en:
Corrupted Monsters have an additional Corrupted [MonsterModifiers|Modifier].

These modifiers may increase the difficulty and reward of the Monster, or may make it easier to defeat.
Definition.zh:
腐化怪物拥有额外已腐化的[MonsterModifiers|词缀]。 

这些词缀可能增加怪物的难度和奖励，也可能使其更容易被击败。

Definition.en: A skill created by Ailith that increases the [MonsterEffectiveness|Effectiveness] of Monsters in [Breach] Hive encounters.
Definition.zh: 艾利丝创造的技能，可提高[Breach|裂隙]遭遇战中的怪物[MonsterEffectiveness|效能]。

Definition.en:
A skill created by Ailith that creates a zone which upgrades the [MonsterRarity|Rarity] of Breach Monsters which enter it.

Monsters can only have their [MonsterRarity|Rarity] upgraded once, and can not be upgraded beyond Rare.
Definition.zh:
艾利丝创造的技能，可创造一个区域，提升进入其中的裂隙怪物的[MonsterRarity|稀有度]。

怪物的[MonsterRarity|稀有度]只能被提升一次，且无法被提升至稀有以上。

Definition.en:
Adds an additional Modifier to the area. These modifiers generally add danger and reward.

These modifiers will apply for all remaining waves in the Simulacrum.
Definition.zh:
为区域添加一条额外词缀。这些词缀通常会增加危险性和奖励。

这些词缀将应用于梦魇拟像中剩余的所有波次。

Definition.en:
Adds an additional Boss to the encounter. 

Additional bosses will be summoned into all remaining waves in the Simulacrum.
Definition.zh:
为遭遇添加一个额外首领。

额外首领将在梦魇拟像中剩余的所有波次中被召唤。

Definition.en:
Adds additional monster packs to the encounter. 

Additional monster packs will be added to all remaining waves in the Simulacrum.
Definition.zh:
为遭遇添加额外的怪物群。

额外的怪物群将被添加到梦魇拟像中剩余的所有波次中。

Definition.en: A skill created by Ailith that adds an additional Pack with a Rare Monster to each wave.
Definition.zh: 艾利丝创造的技能，每波额外增加一群包含稀有怪物的群怪。

Definition.en:
A skill created by Ailith that creates a zone which adds a [MonsterModifiers|Modifier] to Rare Breach Monsters which enter it.

A Rare Monster can only have one Modifier added.
Definition.zh:
艾利丝创造的技能，创造一个区域，为进入其中的稀有裂隙怪物添加一条[MonsterModifiers|词缀]。

稀有怪物只能被添加一条词缀。

Definition.en: A skill created by Ailith that sacrifices half her life to grant players 100% increased [ItemRarity|Item Rarity] in Breach Hives.
Definition.zh: 艾利丝创造的技能，牺牲她一半的生命，使玩家在裂隙虫巢中的物品稀有度提高 100%。

Definition.en: A skill created by Ailith that sacrifices half her life to grant players 1000% more Damage and immunity to Damage for 10 seconds.
Definition.zh: 艾利丝创造的技能，牺牲她一半的生命，使玩家在 10 秒内造成 1000% 更多伤害，并免疫伤害。

Definition.en:
Verisium Sentries are ancient remnants of Kalguuran technology found within [ContainsExpedition|Expeditions].

When unearthed they follow the player, adding Runic [MonsterModifiers|Modifiers] to Monsters throughout the area.
Definition.zh:
维金哨卫是在[ContainsExpedition|先祖秘藏]中发现的远古卡古兰科技的遗物。

挖掘出来后，它们会跟随玩家，为整个区域的怪物添加符文[MonsterModifiers|词缀]。

Definition.en: The Power Rune upgrades all other Runic [MonsterModifiers|Modifiers] on the [ContainsExpedition2|Remnant] to a more powerful and rewarding variant.
Definition.zh: 力量符文会将该[ContainsExpedition2|残片]上所有其他符文[MonsterModifiers|词缀]升级为更强大、奖励更丰厚的变体。
